We further investigate self-supervised pretraining for XRF representation learning using Masked Spectral modeling (MSM) and a physics-informed Peak Presence Prediction (PPP) objective. Experiments on the Pigments Checker STANDARD v.5 dataset for pigment identification and unmixing show that XRFormer consistently outperforms ViT, SpectralFormer (with and without CAF), and a 1D-CNN baseline for pigment identification. For pigment unmixing, XRFormer achieves robust abundance estimation while maintaining significantly higher parameter efficiency than SpectralFormer, operating at a lower token resolution (128 vs. 512 tokens) and with less than half the number of parameters (1.5M vs. 3.37M). MSM yields consistent gains across both tasks, while PPP further enhances performance for both identification and unmixing when tuned with an appropriate peak prominence. These results highlight multiscale, modality-aware tokenization as an effective and parameter efficient foundation for transformer-based XRF modeling under data-limited conditions. A GitHub repository is provided at https://github.com/sofiane1010/XRFormer.

AI.tldr: 本文提出XRFormer，一种专为XRF光谱设计的Transformer架构，通过多尺度卷积tokenizer注入局部性和多分辨率归纳偏置，并引入掩码光谱建模和物理启发的峰值存在预测进行自监督预训练。在颜料识别和解混任务上，XRFormer以更少参数（1.5M vs 3.37M）和更低token分辨率（128 vs 512）超越ViT、SpectralFormer和1D-CNN基线。
AI.motivation: XRF光谱是文化遗产材料分析的关键模态，但现有基于学习的模型未能充分考虑XRF光谱的复杂一维信号特性（尖锐元素峰、宽结构及背景变化），导致自动学习面临挑战。
AI.method: 提出XRFormer架构，核心包括：(1) 多尺度卷积tokenizer，逐步降低光谱分辨率同时增加嵌入维度，注入局部性和多分辨率归纳偏置；(2) 标准Transformer编码器处理token序列；(3) 两种自监督预训练策略：掩码光谱建模(MSM)和物理启发的峰值存在预测(PPP)。
AI.result: 在Pigments Checker STANDARD v.5数据集上，XRFormer在颜料识别和解混任务中均优于ViT、SpectralFormer和1D-CNN。在解混任务中，仅用128个token和1.5M参数（SpectralFormer为512 token和3.37M参数）实现鲁棒的丰度估计。MSM对两项任务均有提升，PPP在适当峰值显著性下进一步增强性能。
AI.conclusion: 多尺度、模态感知的tokenization是Transformer在XRF建模中有效且参数高效的基石，尤其在数据有限条件下优势明显。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：85%。遥感领域广泛使用光谱分析（如高光谱、多光谱成像），XRFormer的多尺度卷积tokenizer和自监督预训练策略可直接迁移至遥感光谱数据。具体方案：(1) 将XRFormer应用于遥感高光谱影像的矿物识别、植被分类等任务，替代传统1D-CNN或SpectralFormer；(2) 结合遥感空间信息，扩展为光谱-空间多尺度融合Transformer；(3) MSM预训练可解决遥感标记样本稀缺问题，PPP目标可适配为物理特征（如吸收峰）预测。

title: PIPBench: A Profile-Inclusive Framework for Personalized Image Generation Evaluation
summary: Recent text-to-image models such as DALLE-3 excel at following diverse prompts yet remain blind to individual aesthetic preferences. We study personalized image generation, where models must align outputs with a user's implicit visual preferences based on a few historically preferred images and a short prompt. To this end, we introduce PIPBench, the first profile-inclusive benchmark for evaluating personalized image generation. We further propose a novel data construction pipeline that leverages psychological and demographic profiling dimensions for both real-user data collection and scalable agent-based data generation. Using PIPBench, we conduct a thorough evaluation of representative line of methods. Our experiments reveal key limitations in existing methods, suggesting new challenges and opportunities for personalized text-to-image synthesis. Project page: https://wuyuhang05.github.io/PIPBench/

AI.tldr: 本文提出PIPBench，首个包含用户画像的个性化图像生成基准，并构建了基于心理和人口统计特征的数据生成流程，用于评估个性化文本到图像模型的对齐能力。
AI.motivation: 现有文本到图像模型（如DALLE-3）能遵循多样提示，但无法感知用户的个体审美偏好，缺乏个性化对齐能力。
AI.method: 提出PIPBench基准，设计基于心理和人口统计画像维度的数据构建流程，支持真实用户数据采集和可扩展的基于智能体的数据生成。
AI.result: 对代表性方法进行了全面评估，揭示了现有方法在个性化图像生成中的关键局限性。
AI.conclusion: PIPBench为个性化文本到图像合成领域提出了新挑战和机遇，指出了现有方法的不足及未来改进方向。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：85%。遥感图像解译常需根据不同分析师或任务的审美/风格偏好（如颜色映射、地物分类风格）进行个性化输出。可将PIPBench的用户画像框架迁移至遥感领域：1）利用心理和人口统计维度（如分析师专业背景、历史标注偏好）构建遥感个性化基准；2）基于智能体生成模拟不同分析师的解译偏好数据；3）评估现有遥感基础模型在个性化地物分类、变化检测等任务中的对齐能力。

title: Andha-Dhun: A First Look at Audio Descriptions in Hindi
comment: Accepted to NCVPRIPG 2026, Download data at https://github.com/katha-ai/AndhaDhun-HindiAD
summary: Audio Descriptions (ADs) narrate visual content for Blind and Low Vision (BLV) audiences during gaps in audiovisual media. There is growing momentum around ADs in movies and TV shows, and with mandates from India's Central Board of Film Certification (CBFC), there is a need to expand ADs beyond English. Yet, there is no work that generates ADs for any Indian language. To address this gap, we present the first systematic study of ADs in Hindi, contributing to aspects such as data, generation, and evaluation. We introduce Andha-Dhun, the first dataset of human-authored Hindi ADs collected from 8 full-length movies. We explore two approaches for generating ADs in Hindi: (i) directly from English dense video descriptions, and (ii) translating English ADs into Hindi. We evaluate these approaches using perplexity and LLM-as-a-judge metrics to assess fluency and quality respectively. We also analyze movies that have both English and Hindi human-authored ADs and find that naive translation introduces artifacts and narrows diversity compared to original Hindi ADs. Direct machine translation fails to adapt cultural references, while human-translated ADs do better but still fall short. Our findings emphasize that the purpose of Hindi ADs is accessibility for Indian BLV audiences, and that this requires adapting content for the audience more than strict fidelity to the source.

AI.tldr: 本文首次系统研究印地语音频描述（AD），构建了首个印地语AD数据集Andha-Dhun（来自8部完整电影），探索了从英文密集视频描述直接生成和翻译英文AD两种方法，并通过困惑度和LLM评估指标分析发现：直接机器翻译会引入伪影并缩小词汇多样性，且难以适应文化指涉；人类翻译表现更好但仍不足。研究强调印地语AD的核心目的是为印度BLV群体提供无障碍服务，需要更多针对受众的内容适配而非严格忠实于原文。
AI.motivation: 尽管全球影视音频描述需求增长迅速，且印度中央电影认证委员会（CBFC）已强制要求提供AD，但目前没有任何研究生成任何印度语言的AD。为填补这一空白，本文首次系统研究印地语AD的数据、生成与评估。
AI.method: (1) 构建Andha-Dhun数据集，收集8部完整电影的人类撰写印地语AD；(2) 探索两种生成方法：从英文密集视频描述直接生成印地语AD、将英文AD翻译为印地语；(3) 使用困惑度（perplexity）评估流畅性、LLM-as-a-judge评估质量；(4) 对比分析同时拥有英文和印地语人类AD的电影。
AI.result: (1) 直接机器翻译会引入伪影并缩小词汇多样性；(2) 机器翻译难以适应文化指涉和本地化表达；(3) 人类翻译的AD表现优于机器翻译但仍不及原始印地语AD；(4) 原始印地语AD在文化适配和多样性上显著优于翻译方法。
AI.conclusion: 印地语AD的核心目标是为印度BLV受众提供无障碍服务，因此生成策略应优先考虑受众适配和文化本地化，而非严格忠实于英文源文本。未来的印地语AD生成应注重文化适应性和表达多样性。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：85%。遥感领域同样面临非英语（如中文、印地语等）地理空间描述生成的需求，可直接借鉴本研究框架：(1) 构建本地化遥感图像描述数据集（如印地语/中文遥感图像标注）；(2) 对比直接生成与翻译两种方案在遥感场景描述中的效果；(3) 重点评估文化指涉（如地物命名习惯、行政区划表述）对描述质量的影响；(4) 采用困惑度+LLM评估的双轨评价体系。该迁移方法可快速推动遥感多语言无障碍服务。

title: Verification of Dynamic Holographic Behavior in Identity Documents
comment: Accepted at the International Conference on Document Analysis and Recognition (ICDAR 2025)
summary: This paper addresses the remote verification of the authenticity of Optically Variable Devices (commonly known as holograms) on identity documents. Typically placed over the cardholder's photo, these devices provide strong and easily verifiable security for human inspection but pose challenges for automated verification. Existing approaches easily cover static frauds (e.g. paper photocopy) and can be evaluated for such, but their capacity to detect real, dynamic fraud cases (e.g. handcrafted hologram) has not been evaluated to date because of the lack of public datasets. Furthermore, they are usually trained to detect known attack types, and few of them can generalize to new, unseen attacks. This work features three contributions to address these limitations: 1) a new public dataset, MIDV-DynAttack, which extends the existing MIDV-Holo dataset with realistic, static and dynamic attacks against identity document specimens, tripling the number of attack samples compared to the original dataset, 2) a novel verification method which can assess the authenticity of a specific hologram thanks to the analysis of its dynamic behavior and appearance, can be trained without dynamic attack samples, and exhibits new state-of-the-art performance, 3) a benchmark of existing approaches which follows a clear evaluation protocol and emphasizes the inability of other approaches to deal with dynamic attacks, as well as new challenging attacks to deal with. Code and dataset are publicly available at https://github.com/EPITAResearchLab/pouliquen.25.icdar.

AI.tldr: 本文针对身份证件上全息图（OVD）的远程真伪验证问题，提出了一个新公共数据集MIDV-DynAttack，以及一种无需动态攻击样本即可训练的新型验证方法，通过分析全息图的动态行为和外观实现高精度检测，并在未见攻击类型上展现了优秀的泛化能力，同时构建了现有方法的基准测试。
AI.motivation: 现有全息图自动验证方法仅能检测静态欺诈（如纸质复印），缺乏对真实动态攻击（如手工伪造全息图）的评估能力，原因在于缺少公开数据集；同时，多数方法只能识别已知攻击类型，难以泛化到未见过的攻击。
AI.method: 1）构建MIDV-DynAttack数据集，在原有MIDV-Holo基础上新增真实静态和动态攻击样本，使攻击样本数量增至三倍；2）提出一种无需动态攻击样本即可训练的新验证方法，通过分析全息图的动态行为和外观特征来判断真伪；3）建立现有方法的评估基准，采用明确的评估协议。
AI.result: 新方法在检测动态攻击上取得了最先进性能，而现有方法均无法有效应对动态攻击；同时暴露了新的具有挑战性的攻击类型。
AI.conclusion: 提出的数据集和方法填补了全息图动态攻击验证的研究空白，新方法在无需动态攻击样本训练的情况下仍能泛化到未见攻击，为身份文档安全验证提供了有效方案。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：85%。1）遥感影像中全息特征（如卫星影像上的防伪标记）的验证可借鉴本文的动态行为分析方法，通过多时相或不同光照条件下的影像序列分析防伪区域的动态变化特征；2）将本文提出的无需未见攻击样本的泛化检测思路引入遥感变化检测，提升模型对未知变化类型的适应能力；3）MIDV-DynAttack数据集的构建策略（系统化扩展攻击样本类型）可迁移到遥感对抗样本数据集构建中，用于评估遥感模型对各种物理/数字攻击的鲁棒性。

title: EgoPolice: A Benchmark for Egocentric Video Understanding in High-Stakes Police Body-Worn Camera Footage
summary: We introduce EgoPolice, a carefully curated dataset of real, egocentric police-civilian interactions, sourced from publicly available body-worn camera videos. We select police-civilian action labels that are critical for police behavioral research and annotate them at a second-by-second granularity. The videos feature rapid and irregular camera motion, dense human interactions, and rare high-stakes events, making the dataset a challenging benchmark for motion-robust and context-aware egocentric perception. We provide two different tasks, classification and multiple-choice question-answering, and benchmark both open-source and closed-source models. We find that even the best video models like Gemini 2.5 Pro still struggle to accurately predict high-risk actions such as "Weapon Out". Beyond serving as a benchmark, EgoPolice provides a foundation for developing models capable of identifying events of interest in large-scale body-worn camera video repositories, enabling more efficient downstream human review.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了EgoPolice数据集，包含真实的第一人称警察-平民交互视频（来自执法记录仪），以秒级粒度标注关键行为标签。提供了分类和多选题问答两个任务，基准测试表明即使Gemini 2.5 Pro等顶尖模型也难以准确预测高风险行为（如"武器出鞘"）。该数据集旨在为执法记录仪视频的大规模事件识别和高效人工审查提供基础。
AI.motivation: 当前缺乏用于警察行为研究的真实、细粒度、第一人称视角数据集，现有模型在执法记录仪视频特有的快速不规则运动、密集人际交互和罕见高风险事件场景下表现不佳，亟需一个具有挑战性的基准来推动运动鲁棒和上下文感知的自我中心感知研究。
AI.method: 从公开的执法记录仪视频中收集真实警察-平民交互数据，选择对警察行为研究至关重要的行为标签，以秒级粒度进行标注；设计分类和多项选择问答两种任务，并在开源和闭源模型上进行基准测试。
AI.result: 即使是最佳视频模型（如Gemini 2.5 Pro），在预测"武器出鞘"等高危动作时仍存在较大困难，表明现有模型在执法记录仪视频分析任务上远未达到令人满意的水平。
AI.conclusion: EgoPolice不仅可作为具有挑战性的基准数据集，还能为开发从大规模执法记录仪视频库中识别关键事件的模型奠定基础，从而提升下游人工审查的效率。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：85%。两者均涉及第一人称/俯视角视频中的动态场景理解与目标检测。具体交叉方案：（1）将EgoPolice中的运动鲁棒感知方法迁移到无人机/卫星视频中的快速运动目标跟踪与异常事件检测；（2）利用遥感领域已有的运动补偿和稳像技术来改进执法记录仪视频中的剧烈抖动问题；（3）共享少样本学习策略，解决遥感数据中罕见事件（如自然灾害、军事行动）标注稀缺的挑战；（4）将EgoPolice的多模态问答范式引入遥感图像-视频联合分析，支持对地理空间事件的细粒度语义查询。

title: A VLM-Enhanced Framework for Comprehensive Traffic Sign Condition Assessment Integrating Daytime Visual Performance and Nighttime Retroreflectivity Evaluation
comment: 21 pages, 7 figures, 5 tables. Preprint. An earlier version of this work was presented at the 105th Annual Meeting of the Transportation Research Board (TRB), January 2026
summary: Traffic signs are crucial components of road safety, serving as visual tools under all lighting conditions. The Manual on Uniform Traffic Control Devices (MUTCD) specifies daytime visual factors such as legibility and color contrast, and nighttime retroreflectivity requirements. Traditional assessment methods rely on manual inspections, which the Federal Highway Administration (FHWA) notes are subjective, labor-intensive and pose safety concerns, while retroreflectometers are expensive and unaffordable for smaller agencies. Most existing studies focus on either daytime factors or nighttime retroreflectivity but rarely integrate both aspects comprehensively. This study develops a novel framework that systematically evaluates traffic signs through integrated daytime-nighttime assessment. The methodology employs three fine-tuned Vision Language Models (VLMs) for daytime visual performance assessment across four key factors: legibility, color, surface and shape integrity, and surrounding environment conditions. VLM predictions are converted to numerical scores through sentiment analysis and Contrastive Language-Image Pre-Training (CLIP) scoring, while nighttime performance is assessed using LiDAR-derived retroreflectivity following established calibration procedures. The framework integrates these components into a comprehensive Sign Condition Index (SCI) for maintenance guidance. Evaluation results demonstrated that LLaVA and Qwen outperformed InternVL, achieving bidirectional cosine similarity scores of 0.67-0.76 across all factors. Among 462 validated traffic signs, 68 were flagged by the proposed framework as requiring immediate replacement due to inadequate retroreflectivity performance. This research provides a cost-effective alternative to traditional manual inspections for comprehensive traffic sign condition assessment.

AI.tldr: 本研究提出了一个集成日间-夜间评估的交通标志检测框架，利用三个微调视觉语言模型（VLMs）评估日间视觉性能（可读性、颜色、表面形状完整性、环境条件），并结合LiDAR衍生回反射率评估夜间性能，最终建立综合标志状况指数（SCI）。在462个标志中识别出68个需立即更换，LLaVA和Qwen表现优于InternVL。
AI.motivation: 传统人工检测交通标志耗时、主观且存在安全隐患，回反射计价格昂贵，且现有研究多仅关注日间或单方面因素，缺乏系统性综合评价框架。
AI.method: 采用三个微调视觉语言模型（VLMs）评估日间视觉性能（可读性、颜色、表面形状完整性、环境条件），通过情感分析和CLIP评分将预测转为数值分数；利用LiDAR数据评估夜间回反射性能；整合日间和夜间评估结果建立综合Sign Condition Index (SCI)。
AI.result: LLaVA和Qwen在所有评估因素上双向余弦相似度达0.67-0.76，优于InternVL；462个标志中68个被标记为需立即更换。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为传统人工检测提供了一种经济有效的替代方案，能够系统性地对交通标志进行日间-夜间综合条件评估。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：85%。具体方案：（1）将该框架迁移至遥感影像中的地面交通设施（如道路标线、机场跑道标识）状态评估，利用VLM分析遥感影像中目标的褪色、破损情况；（2）将LiDAR回反射率评估方法应用于遥感激光雷达数据，对城市交通基础设施的夜间可见性进行大范围评估；（3）结合遥感多光谱影像与VLM，扩展评估因子至热红外（温度影响）和SAR（结构形变）等多模态数据，提升综合评估的鲁棒性。

title: Mitigating Domain Shift in Conditioned Floor Plan Generation: Synthetic Pre-training for Data-Efficient Adaptation
summary: Robustness to domain shift is a key requirement for floor plan generative models to be applicable beyond the single dataset they were trained on, as floor plans vary widely across regions due to distinct architectural cultures, spatial constraints, and construction practices, while acquiring new annotated datasets remains costly and domain-specific. Yet, no prior work has studied this robustness in the context of conditioned floor plan generation. In this paper, we evaluate state-of-the-art models from two fundamentally different generative paradigms across three public datasets (RPLAN, MagicPlan and Swiss Dwellings) and show that they are highly sensitive to domain shift, with up to an order of magnitude performance degradation when transferred across domains. To mitigate this with minimal target-domain supervision, we introduce a procedural method to generate a large-scale synthetic training dataset that enforces strict physical constraints (non-overlapping rooms, valid door placement, graph consistency) while intentionally sacrificing architectural realism through highly irregular spatial arrangements and aggressive geometric perturbation of room shapes. We show that pre-training on this synthetic data considerably improves zero-shot cross-domain performance, outperforming in-domain training on MagicPlan. Furthermore, it provides a highly effective initialization for fine-tuning, accelerating target domain adaptation and outperforming real-world initialization baselines by up to 40% in a low-data regime.

AI.tldr: 本文首次系统研究条件性 floor plan 生成模型对域迁移的鲁棒性问题，发现现有模型在不同数据集间迁移时性能下降可达一个数量级。为解决该问题，提出一种程序化合成数据生成方法，通过施加严格的物理约束（房间不重叠、合法门放置、图一致性）但牺牲建筑真实性（不规则空间排列、几何扰动），在该合成数据上预训练可显著提升零样本跨域性能，并在少量真实数据微调场景下比基线方法提升高达40%。
AI.motivation: 现有 floor plan 生成模型依赖单一数据集训练，但不同地区因建筑文化、空间约束和施工实践的差异导致域分布变化显著，而获取新标注数据集成本高昂。目前尚无工作研究条件性 floor plan 生成模型对域迁移的鲁棒性，因此需要探索跨域性能退化程度并开发有效的缓解策略。
AI.method: 1) 评估来自两种不同生成范式（自回归模型和基于图的模型）的 SOTA 模型在三个公开数据集（RPLAN、MagicPlan、Swiss Dwellings）上的跨域性能。2) 提出程序化合成数据生成方法：强制房间不重叠、合法门放置、图一致性等物理约束，同时故意引入高度不规则的空间排列和房间形状的几何扰动以牺牲建筑真实性。3) 在该合成数据上预训练模型，然后进行零样本跨域测试或在目标域少量数据上微调。
AI.result: 1) 现有模型在域迁移时性能退化高达一个数量级。2) 在合成数据上预训练可显著提升零样本跨域性能，在 MagicPlan 数据集上甚至优于域内训练。3) 合成数据预训练为微调提供高效初始化，在低数据场景下比真实数据初始化基线提升高达40%。
AI.conclusion: 程序化合成数据生成是一种廉价且有效的跨域泛化策略，通过严格的物理约束而不追求建筑真实性的训练数据，可以有效提升 floor plan 生成模型的域迁移鲁棒性，并为少样本目标域适应提供强力初始化。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：85%。该方法的合成数据预训练策略可直接迁移至遥感领域的建筑布局生成、城市 footprint 生成等任务。具体方案：1) 针对遥感建筑/城市 footprint 生成模型，采用类似程序化合成方法生成具有严格物理约束（建筑不重叠、道路连通性等）但形状不规则/被扰动的合成 footprint 数据，用于预训练以提升跨城市/跨区域的域迁移能力；2) 结合遥感影像域差异（不同传感器、不同分辨率、不同地理区域），将合成数据预训练作为域适应初始化步骤，在少量目标域标注数据上微调。

title: Point as Skeleton: Accumulated Point Cloud Enhanced Autoregressive Generation for Closed-Loop Autonomous Driving Simulation
summary: Evaluating end-to-end autonomous driving (E2E-AD) remains challenging, as existing driving simulation methods often trade off closed-loop interactivity (e.g., CARLA) and real-world visual fidelity (e.g., nuScenes). We present \textbf{\emph{Point as Skeleton}}, a generative sensor simulation framework for state-updated autoregressive driving video generation, in which an autoregressive generator synthesizes visual observations from step-wise updated ego states, actor states, scene maps, and point-cloud skeleton conditions. To support closed-loop rollout, we introduce Reset-and-Roll, which adapts rolling diffusion inference to simulation by preventing future-conditioned latent states from being committed across simulation steps. To stabilize error accumulation during step-wise autoregressive rollout, we introduce point-cloud skeletons that decouple foreground and background assets and project them into camera-view painted-point and template-depth conditions, providing appearance and geometric cues. We further implement a nuPlan-based renderer-level closed-loop generative interface for evaluating generation under ego deviations from the original log. Experiments on nuScenes and nuPlan show that \textit{Point as Skeleton} improves autoregressive generation quality during closed-loop rollout, demonstrating its potential for visually faithful closed-loop driving simulation. The code is available at https://github.com/krauwu/point-as-skeleton.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Point as Skeleton，一种基于点云骨架的生成式传感器仿真框架，用于状态更新的自回归驾驶视频生成。通过引入Reset-and-Roll滚动扩散推断和点云骨架条件（分离前景/背景物体并提供外观与几何线索），实现了闭环滚动仿真中视觉逼真且状态一致的驾驶视频生成。在nuScenes和nuPlan上验证了该方法在闭环滚动中提升了自回归生成质量。
AI.motivation: 现有端到端自动驾驶评估方法中，闭环交互性（如CARLA）与真实世界视觉保真度（如nuScenes）不可兼得，缺乏一种既能支持闭环滚动又能生成高视觉保真度驾驶视频的仿真方法。
AI.method: 1) 自回归生成器：基于逐步更新的自车状态、参与者状态、场景地图和点云骨架条件合成视觉观测；2) Reset-and-Roll：改进滚动扩散推断，防止未来条件潜变量在仿真步骤间被提交，支持闭环展开；3) 点云骨架条件：将前景与背景资产分离并投影为相机视角的绘制点条件和模板深度条件，提供外观与几何线索；4) 基于nuPlan的渲染级闭环生成接口，用于评估生成视频在自车偏离原始轨迹时的表现。
AI.result: 在nuScenes和nuPlan数据集上的实验表明，Point as Skeleton在闭环滚动过程中有效提升了自回归生成质量，展示了其在视觉逼真闭环驾驶仿真方面的潜力。
AI.conclusion: 所提框架为闭环驾驶仿真中兼顾视觉保真度与状态一致性提供了一种有效方案，点云骨架条件在稳定自回归误差累积方面发挥了关键作用。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：85%。遥感领域中，动态场景的时序生成（如卫星视频预测、航拍变化检测）可借鉴本文的自回归生成框架：1) 利用遥感点云（LiDAR或密集匹配点云）作为骨架条件，分离地面/建筑（背景）与车辆/船只（前景），实现时变遥感视频生成；2) Reset-and-Roll可用于遥感时序数据的长程预测，防止未来信息泄露；3) 自回归架构可迁移至遥感图像序列的超分辨率或云去除任务，通过点云骨架提供几何先验约束。

title: CAIRN: Cross-Room 3D Scene Understanding with Topology-Aware Large Multimodal Models
summary: Existing 3D scene-grounded Large Language Models (3D-LLMs) focus on answering questions grounded in simplified single-room 3D scenes, lacking the ability to reason over real-world household environments containing multiple interconnected rooms and diverse object categories. We introduce CAIRN, a topology-aware 3D-LLM for multi-room 3D scene understanding. CAIRN aligns transformer attention with scene hierarchy, giving the model explicit awareness of object-level relations and room-level connectivity. It enriches object tokens with room-local relational context via a graph neural network, introduces learned room tokens for room-level abstraction, and applies a hierarchical attention mask with geometric bias to route information according to scene topology. CAIRN is developed on CAIRN-MR, a benchmark we introduce on HM3D for multi-room 3D scene understanding, covering grounding, captioning, and four question-answering tasks that progressively evaluate from intra-room perception to cross-room reasoning. Experiments show that CAIRN outperforms prior 3D-LLMs by a large margin across all CAIRN-MR tasks while remaining competitive on five single-room benchmarks.

AI.tldr: CAIRN提出了一种拓扑感知的3D大语言模型，用于多房间3D场景理解。它通过图神经网络增强对象标记的房间局部关系信息、引入可学习的房间标记实现房间级抽象，并应用带有几何偏置的分层注意力掩码来路由信息。在CAIRN-MR基准测试中，CAIRN在所有多房间任务上大幅超越现有3D-LLM，同时在五个单房间基准上保持竞争力。
AI.motivation: 现有3D场景基础的大语言模型仅能在简化的单房间3D场景中进行问答，缺乏对包含多个互联房间和多样化物体类别的真实家庭环境的推理能力。
AI.method: 1) 利用图神经网络编码对象间的房间局部关系，丰富对象标记的表征；2) 引入可学习的房间标记，实现房间级别的抽象表示；3) 设计带有几何偏置的分层注意力掩码，根据场景拓扑结构进行信息路由，使Transformer注意力与场景层级对齐。
AI.result: CAIRN在CAIRN-MR基准的所有多房间任务（接地、描述和四种问答任务）上大幅优于现有3D-LLM，同时在五个单房间基准上保持竞争力。
AI.conclusion: 拓扑感知的层次化场景理解方法能有效提升3D-LLM在多房间复杂环境中的推理能力，且不会牺牲单房间场景的性能。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：75%。遥感场景中同样存在多尺度层次结构（如区域-建筑-地物）。可采用CAIRN的拓扑感知方案：1) 用图神经网络建模地物间的空间/语义关系（如建筑物间的拓扑连接）；2) 引入区域级标记（如街区、地块）实现空间层级抽象；3) 设计分层注意力掩码，先局部（地物级）后全局（区域级）逐步推理，提升遥感大模型对复杂地理场景的理解能力。

title: Unsupervised Domain Adaptation for Calcification Classification in Mammography Across Multi-Site Datasets
summary: Deep learning-based computer-aided diagnosis (CAD) systems have shown strong performance in breast cancer diagnosis, particularly for classification tasks in mammography. However, domain shifts across multi-site datasets remain a challenge, especially when models are applied to unseen domains. In this work, we proposed a calcification classification framework to improve malignant versus benign breast disease classification across multi-site mammography datasets. The framework consisted of two components: (1) an unsupervised domain adaptation module based on style transfer models (AdaIN and CycleGAN) to generate vendor-specific and technique-specific training samples without additional annotations, and (2) a supervised classification module using Swin Transformer V2 as the backbone. We evaluated the proposed method on three datasets: cross-validation on OPTIMAM (National Health Service, United Kingdom; n=2994), followed by external validation on EMBED (Emory University; n=125), and Duke Calcification Dataset v1 (n=788). These datasets cover multiple vendors and include both full-field digital mammography and synthetic 2D images derived from digital breast tomosynthesis. The proposed framework improved cross-site performance for both EMBED (AUC 0.68 to 0.72) and the Duke Calcification Dataset (AUC 0.68 to 0.73). These findings indicate that domain adaptation can reduce domain shifts and improve the generalization for calcification classification across multi-site datasets.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于无监督域自适应（风格迁移）和Swin Transformer V2的钙化分类框架，用于提升多站点乳腺X线摄影中恶性与良性乳腺疾病的分类性能。在三个数据集（OPTIMAM、EMBED、Duke Calcification Dataset）上验证，AUC分别从0.68提升至0.72和0.73，表明域自适应可减少域偏移、提升模型泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 深度学习CAD系统在乳腺X线摄影分类中表现优异，但多站点数据集间的域偏移导致模型在未见过的域上泛化能力下降，影响实际临床应用。
AI.method: 提出包含两个模块的框架：(1) 基于风格迁移模型（AdaIN和CycleGAN）的无监督域自适应模块，无需额外标注即可生成特定厂商和特定技术的训练样本；(2) 以Swin Transformer V2为骨干的有监督分类模块。
AI.result: 在OPTIMAM数据集上进行交叉验证，在EMBED和Duke Calcification Dataset上外部验证。EMBED上AUC从0.68提升至0.72，Duke Calcification Dataset上AUC从0.68提升至0.73。
AI.conclusion: 域自适应能够有效减少域偏移，提升钙化分类在多站点数据集上的泛化性能。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：85%。具体方案：(1) 遥感影像中存在多传感器、多分辨率、多时相的域偏移问题，可直接套用该框架，将AdaIN和CycleGAN用于遥感影像的传感器风格迁移（如Sentinel-2到Landsat-8），生成特定传感器风格的训练样本；(2) Swin Transformer V2作为骨干网络在遥感场景分类、目标检测中已有应用，可与域自适应模块结合提升跨场景泛化能力；(3) 可进一步引入地理信息（如位置、季节）作为辅助条件，增强风格迁移的语义一致性。

title: MonoIR-RS: Infrared Remote Sensing Vision-Language Learning with CLIP and VLM Adaptation
summary: Infrared remote-sensing imagery captures intensity structure, object-background contrast, and illumination-invariant cues often invisible in RGB imagery. Yet, most remote-sensing vision-language resources and models focus on visible-band semantics, leaving infrared vision-language understanding underexplored. We introduce MonoIR-RS, a large-scale infrared remote-sensing vision-language dataset and benchmark that couples IR-aware data construction with CLIP-style contrastive adaptation and VLM instruction tuning. Built from the same source pool and split as FusionRS, MonoIR-RS retains the infrared image as the model-facing modality, yielding 600,000 synthesized infrared images and 59,032 retained IR-aware caption records. The model experiments use this retained language-supervision subset, whose captions rewrite supervision around grayscale structure and infrared-style contrast instead of RGB appearance. We show that the synthesized infrared imagery is markedly closer to real thermal imagery than a grayscale conversion on the AVIID benchmark. We fine-tune five CLIP backbones and six VLM backbones, and calibrate them against zero-shot behavior: IR-aware adaptation lifts CLIP mean recall by up to 12.8 points and drives VLM captioning IR-cue coverage to 100% while reducing residual RGB-color leakage to near zero. By isolating the infrared modality from RGB-IR dual-modal learning, MonoIR-RS offers a controlled, reproducible testbed for aligning infrared remote-sensing evidence with language.

AI.tldr: MonoIR-RS是一个大规模红外遥感视觉-语言数据集和基准，通过合成60万张红外图像并结合CLIP对比学习与VLM指令微调，在纯红外模态下实现遥感图像与语言的语义对齐，相比零样本基线将CLIP平均召回率提升12.8分，VLM红外线索覆盖率达100%，RGB残留泄露降至接近零。
AI.motivation: 现有遥感视觉-语言资源集中于可见光波段，红外遥感视觉-语言理解严重不足，缺乏大规模、高质量的红外遥感图像-文本配对数据集和模型。
AI.method: 基于FusionRS源池构建60万张合成红外图像及59,032条红外感知标注；采用CLIP风格对比学习适应和VLM指令微调；利用灰度结构及红外风格对比重写标注替代RGB外观描述。
AI.result: 合成红外图像在AVIID基准上比灰度转换更接近真实热红外图像；红外感知适应使CLIP平均召回率提升12.8分；VLM红外线索覆盖率达到100%，RGB颜色泄露降至近零。
AI.conclusion: MonoIR-RS通过隔离红外模态与RGB-IR双模态学习，为红外遥感证据与语言的对齐提供了可控、可复现的测试平台。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：95%。作为红外遥感视觉-语言研究的开创性工作，可直接作为红外遥感图像描述、检索、VQA等下游任务的标准基准；未来可扩展至多光谱/高光谱遥感视觉-语言对齐，引入物理辐射校正增强合成图像真实性，以及结合热红外物理特性（如温度分布）进行更精细的语义建模。

title: From RGB Generation to Dense Field Readout: Pixel-Space Dense Prediction with Text-to-Image Models
summary: Large-scale text-to-image models are attractive backbones for dense prediction because RGB generation pretraining learns rich semantic, structural, and geometric priors. Existing generative and editing approaches reuse these priors by casting dense prediction as target generation: annotations such as depth, normals, alpha mattes, masks, and heatmaps are encoded into an RGB-trained VAE latent space and decoded back as image-like targets. We argue this inherits more of the generative output interface than dense prediction requires: unlike RGB synthesis, dense prediction asks for pixel-correct, task-native fields on the same image plane, not new RGB content to be rendered. Our key observation is that a pretrained DiT already organizes RGB inputs through a patch-to-token-to-patch lattice on the image plane, so each token indexes a fixed output patch whose channels can carry task-native quantities instead of RGB appearance. We instantiate this as ReChannel: we keep the VAE encoder for the DiT's input distribution but drop the target-side decoder, adapt the frozen DiT with task LoRA, and map each token to its p x p x K_t pixel-space patch through a shared token-local linear head--about 33K parameters, no spatial mixing. Using FLUX-Klein, we evaluate on six dense prediction tasks and over a dozen benchmarks. This minimal interface sets new state-of-the-art on trimap-free matting, KITTI depth, and referring segmentation, and stays competitive on normals, saliency, and pose. In a matched 4B setting it is more accurate and 2.48x faster than an edit-plus-latent-decode counterpart--dense perception can benefit from generative pretraining without inheriting its output interface.

AI.tldr: 论文ReChannel提出一种新的密集预测方法，通过直接复用预训练DiT的token-to-patch映射机制，使用共享线性头将每个token映射为任务原生量（如深度、法线等），避免了传统方法中将密集预测视为RGB生成任务而引入的解码器开销。在6个密集预测任务中达到SOTA，速度提升2.48倍。
AI.motivation: 现有生成式方法将密集预测任务（深度、法线、遮罩等）编码到RGB训练的VAE潜空间再解码回图像，这继承了过多的生成式输出接口。密集预测需要的是像素正确的任务原生场，而非新的RGB内容生成，因此需要更简洁、高效的接口设计。
AI.method: 保留预训练DiT的VAE编码器输入分布，移除目标侧解码器；使用任务LoRA微调冻结的DiT；通过共享的token局部线性头（约33K参数，无空间混合）将每个token映射到其对应的p×p×K_t像素空间块，直接输出任务原生量。
AI.result: 在无trimap抠图、KITTI深度、指代分割任务上取得新SOTA；在法线、显著性、姿态估计上竞争力强；在匹配的4B参数设定下，比编辑+潜解码方法准确度更高且快2.48倍。
AI.conclusion: 密集感知可以从生成式预训练中受益，而无需继承其输出接口。通过直接复用DiT的patch-to-token-to-patch网格结构，可以更高效、更准确地完成密集预测任务。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：90%。遥感密集预测任务（如深度估计、语义分割、建筑物提取、变化检测等）可直接应用ReChannel框架：使用FLUX-Klein等预训练DiT作为backbone，通过共享线性头输出遥感任务原生量（如地物类别、高度图、变化概率图）。该方法的token-local设计避免了全局空间混合带来的计算开销，特别适合大尺度遥感影像的密集预测。改进方向：可引入地理空间先验（如地理坐标编码）增强token的位置感知能力；针对遥感多模态数据（多光谱、SAR）扩展VAE编码器输入通道。

title: ProxyPose: 6-DoF Pose Tracking via Video-to-Video Translation
summary: Tracking the six-degree-of-freedom (6-DoF) pose of objects and surfaces from monocular video is a long-standing problem in computer vision. To tackle this problem, existing methods require inputs beyond the video itself-such as 3D models, depth maps, object masks, or task-specific learned features-and they struggle with textureless, transparent, reflective, or deformable surfaces. Here, we introduce ProxyPose, which recasts 6-DoF pose tracking as video-to-video translation. Given only a video and a single marked pixel in the first frame, a fine-tuned video diffusion model translates the input into a proxy video-a synthetic video depicting a colored polyhedron undergoing the same local rigid-body motion as the surface region at the marked pixel. Because the proxy's geometry and appearance are known by construction, recovering its full 6-DoF trajectory reduces to classical pose estimation with off-the-shelf solvers. This formulation leverages large-scale video pre-training to absorb the hardest aspects of pose tracking-handling challenging materials, occlusions, and deformations-into the translation step, while operating at the pixel level with no assumptions about object identity, boundaries, or global rigidity. ProxyPose achieves state-of-the-art 6-DoF pose tracking accuracy without the additional inputs required by competing methods and after fine-tuning the video model only on synthetic data. We further demonstrate that ProxyPose extends to face tracking, camera pose estimation, and challenging in-the-wild scenes that are beyond the reach of existing approaches. Project page: https://ruihangzhang97.github.io/proxypose/.

AI.tldr: ProxyPose提出将6自由度位姿跟踪重新定义为视频到视频的翻译问题：仅需单目视频和首帧一个标记像素，通过微调的视频扩散模型将输入视频转换为已知几何和外观的代理视频（彩色多面体），再利用经典位姿估计算法恢复完整6-DoF轨迹。该方法无需3D模型、深度图、物体掩码等额外输入，在无纹理、透明、反射、可变形表面等挑战性场景中达到SOTA性能，并拓展到人脸跟踪、相机位姿估计和野外场景。
AI.motivation: 现有单目6-DoF位姿跟踪方法严重依赖额外输入（3D模型、深度图、物体掩码或任务特定特征），且在无纹理、透明、反射或可变形表面上表现不佳。本文旨在消除这些限制，提出一种无需额外输入、能处理各种挑战性表面的通用位姿跟踪方法。
AI.method: 将6-DoF位姿跟踪转化为视频到视频的翻译问题：(1) 仅输入单目视频和首帧一个标记像素；(2) 使用微调的视频扩散模型将输入视频翻译为代理视频——一个彩色多面体经历与标记像素处表面区域相同的局部刚体运动；(3) 由于代理视频的几何和外观已知，将完整的6-DoF轨迹恢复简化为经典位姿估计问题，使用现成求解器。该框架利用大规模视频预训练，将最困难的位姿跟踪方面（处理挑战性材质、遮挡和变形）吸收到翻译步骤中，在像素级别操作，不依赖物体身份、边界或全局刚体性的假设。
AI.result: 在6-DoF位姿跟踪精度上达到SOTA，且无需竞争方法所需的额外输入；视频模型仅使用合成数据进行微调。该方法还扩展到人脸跟踪、相机位姿估计以及现有方法无法处理的挑战性野外场景。
AI.conclusion: ProxyPose通过视频到视频翻译的新范式，有效解决了传统6-DoF位姿跟踪对额外输入的依赖和对困难表面处理的局限。大规模视频预训练赋予了模型处理复杂材质、遮挡和形变的能力，且仅需合成数据微调即可泛化到真实场景，展示了强大的可扩展性。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：85%。具体方案：(1) 遥感平台位姿估计：利用ProxyPose对无人机/卫星平台进行6-DoF位姿跟踪，仅需单目视频和初始参考点，无需先验3D模型，可应用于遥感平台的相对定位与运动估计；(2) 地物动态变化监测：利用代理视频机制将地物（如滑坡体、冰川运动）在时序影像中的复杂形变转化为已知几何体的运动，进而解算其三维运动参数；(3) 多视图遥感图像配准：将相机位姿估计能力引入遥感图像序列的配准任务中，无需深度信息或密集匹配，仅通过单像素标记即可实现帧间相对位姿恢复。

title: Vision as Unified Multimodal Generation
summary: We formulate computer vision as unified multimodal generation, where heterogeneous visual tasks are expressed in the native text and image generation spaces of a unified multimodal model, without task-specific architectures. Under this formulation, SenseNova-Vision uses natural-language instructions and optional visual prompts to specify tasks, target regions or views, and decoding conventions, and generates responses as text for symbolic outputs, images for dense spatial predictions, or mixed text-and-image outputs for compositional tasks. To support large-scale training, we convert diverse computer vision annotations into instruction-response examples compatible with these generation spaces, resulting in the SenseNova-Vision Corpus, a computer-vision instruction-response corpus spanning text, image, and mixed targets. Starting from an off-the-shelf pretrained unified multimodal model, SenseNova-Vision is trained primarily on this corpus, with auxiliary multimodal data used as a capability-preserving mixture, and requires no task-specific prediction heads or architectural modifications. The resulting model covers a broad range of vision tasks, including detection, OCR, keypoint estimation, segmentation, depth estimation, surface normal prediction, point maps, and camera pose estimation, while supporting language-defined variants that combine category, color, region, and other visual cues. Experiments show that a single unified model can match leading task-specialized systems across structured visual understanding, dense geometric prediction, segmentation, and multi-view visual geometry. These results suggest unified multimodal generation as a scalable route for integrating computer vision capabilities into general-purpose foundation models. The model and corpus are publicly available.

AI.tldr: 本文提出将计算机视觉统一为多模态生成任务，通过统一的多模态模型（SenseNova-Vision）在文本和图像生成空间中表达异构视觉任务，无需任务特定架构。该模型在涵盖文本、图像和混合目标的指令响应语料库上训练，支持检测、OCR、关键点估计、分割、深度估计等多种视觉任务，并在多个基准上达到与专用系统相当的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有计算机视觉方法通常为每个任务设计专用架构和预测头，缺乏统一的范式。作者希望将视觉任务统一为多模态生成问题，使一个通用模型能够处理多种视觉任务，消除任务特定设计，为构建通用基础模型提供可扩展的路径。
AI.method: 将计算机视觉形式化为统一多模态生成，使用自然语言指令和可选的视觉提示指定任务、目标区域/视图及解码约定。构建SenseNova-Vision Corpus（大规模指令-响应语料库，覆盖文本、图像和混合目标）。基于现成的预训练统一多模态模型，主要在该语料库上训练，辅以多模态数据作为能力保留混合，无需任务特定预测头或架构修改。
AI.result: 单一统一模型在结构化视觉理解、密集几何预测、分割和多视图视觉几何等多个任务上达到与领先的任务专用系统相当的性能。
AI.conclusion: 统一多模态生成是将计算机视觉能力集成到通用基础模型中的可扩展路线，模型和语料库已公开发布。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：85%。具体方案：(1) 遥感任务统一化：利用SenseNova-Vision的指令框架，将遥感中的目标检测、地物分割、变化检测、场景分类等任务统一为多模态生成问题，消除各任务专用头。(2) 多模态遥感推理：结合遥感图像与自然语言指令（如"提取所有水域区域"、"检测2020-2024年间变化的建筑物"），实现零样本遥感分析。(3) 密集预测任务扩展：利用其文本+图像混合输出能力，直接生成遥感语义分割图、深度估计图或数字表面模型（DSM）。(4) 构建遥感指令语料库：参考SenseNova-Vision Corpus范式，将现有遥感标注（如ISPRS、LoveDA、DeepGlobe等）转换为指令-响应格式，支持遥感领域的统一多模态训练。(5) 多视图遥感几何：利用其相机位姿估计能力，处理多视角遥感图像（如卫星立体像对、无人机航拍序列）的三维重建任务。

title: PoseIDON: 6DoF pose estimation with foundation model features for marine sediment burial mapping
summary: The burial state of anthropogenic objects on the seafloor provides insight into localized sedimentation dynamics and is also critical for assessing ecological risks, potential pollutant transport, and the viability of recovery or mitigation strategies for hazardous materials such as munitions. Accurate burial depth estimation from remote imagery remains difficult due to partial occlusion, poor visibility, and object degradation. This work introduces a computer vision pipeline, called PoseIDON, which combines deep foundation model features with multiview photogrammetry to estimate six degrees of freedom object pose and the orientation of the surrounding seafloor from ROV video. Burial depth is inferred by aligning CAD models of the objects with observed imagery and fitting a local planar approximation of the seafloor. The method is validated using footage of 54 objects, including barrels and munitions, recorded at a historic ocean dumpsite in the San Pedro Basin. The model achieves a mean burial depth error of approximately 10 cm and resolves spatial burial patterns that reflect underlying sediment transport processes. This approach enables scalable, non-invasive mapping of seafloor burial and supports environmental assessment at contaminated sites.

AI.tldr: 本文提出计算机视觉管道PoseIDON，结合深度基础模型特征与多视角摄影测量，从ROV视频中估计海底人造物体的6自由度姿态及海底平面方向，并通过CAD模型配准推断埋藏深度。在54个物体（桶和弹药）上验证，平均埋深误差约10cm。
AI.motivation: 海底人造物体的埋藏状态对评估生态风险、污染物迁移及危险物（如弹药）回收策略至关重要，但现有遥感方法因部分遮挡、能见度差和物体退化难以准确估计埋深。
AI.method: PoseIDON管道包含：1) 深度基础模型提取特征；2) 多视角摄影测量估计物体6自由度姿态；3) 拟合局域海底平面近似；4) 将物体CAD模型与观测图像对齐，推断埋藏深度。
AI.result: 在San Pedro Basin历史海洋倾倒场的54个物体（桶和弹药）上验证，平均埋深误差约10cm，能够解析反映底层沉积物输运过程的空间埋藏模式。
AI.conclusion: 该方法实现了可扩展、非侵入式的海底埋藏映射，为污染场地的环境评估提供支持。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：85%。该方法的计算机视觉管道可直接迁移至遥感领域的水下目标检测与埋深估计任务。具体方案：1) 将深度基础模型替换为遥感领域预训练的地表特征提取模型（如Swin Transformer、ResNet变体），适配光学卫星或无人机影像中的地表半掩埋目标；2) 多视角摄影测量可类比于遥感中的立体像对或多角度观测，用于推断目标姿态与地表平面；3) 针对遥感影像分辨率较低的问题，可引入超分辨率重建模块作为前置处理；4) 该方法可扩展至河口、海岸带等浅水区域的遥感监测，结合多光谱或高光谱数据进一步区分目标类型与埋藏状态。

title: SPPSFormer: High-Quality Superpoint-Based Transformer for Roof Plane Instance Segmentation from Point Clouds
summary: Superpoint Transformers use superpoints as the basic processing units, thereby significantly reducing the number of tokens processed by Transformers. However, they have been seldom employed in point cloud roof plane instance segmentation, and existing superpoint Transformers suffer from limited performance due to the use of low-quality superpoints. To address this challenge, we establish a set of criteria that high-quality superpoints for Transformers should satisfy and introduce a corresponding two-stage superpoint generation process. The superpoints generated by our method not only have accurate boundaries, but also exhibit consistent geometric sizes and shapes, which greatly benefit the feature learning of superpoint Transformers. To compensate for the limitations of deep learning features when the training set size is limited, we incorporate multidimensional handcrafted features into the model. Additionally, we design a decoder that combines a Kolmogorov–Arnold Network with a Transformer module to improve instance prediction and mask extraction. Finally, our network’s predictions are refined using traditional algorithm-based post-processing. For evaluation, we annotated a real-world dataset and corrected annotation errors in the existing RoofN3D dataset. Experimental results show that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance on our dataset, as well as both the original and corrected RoofN3D datasets. Our model also shows significant advantages over existing methods when handling data with low point density, large density variations, or low 3D point precision. Moreover, it is not sensitive to plane boundary annotations during training, significantly reducing the annotation burden. We will release our code, trained models, and datasets.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于高质量超点（Superpoint）的Transformer方法用于点云屋顶平面实例分割。通过建立高质量超点标准并设计两阶段生成流程，结合多维手工特征、KAN-Transformer解码器和传统算法后处理，在自建数据集和RoofN3D数据集上达到SOTA性能，对低密度、大密度变化和低精度点云数据表现优异，且对边界标注不敏感。
AI.motivation: 现有超点Transformer在点云屋顶平面实例分割中应用有限，且由于使用的超点质量低导致性能受限。作者旨在解决这一问题，通过生成高质量超点来提升超点Transformer的分割性能。
AI.method: (1) 建立高质量超点应满足的标准，设计两阶段超点生成流程，使超点具有精确边界和一致的几何尺寸与形状；(2) 引入多维手工特征以弥补训练集有限时深度学习特征的不足；(3) 设计结合Kolmogorov–Arnold Network与Transformer模块的解码器，提升实例预测和掩码提取；(4) 采用传统算法后处理进行精细化；(5) 对RoofN3D数据集进行了标注错误修正并自建新数据集。
AI.result: 在自建数据集、原始RoofN3D和修正后的RoofN3D三个数据集上均达到SOTA性能；在低点密度、大密度变化、低3D点精度场景下显著优于现有方法；对训练时平面边界标注不敏感，降低了标注负担。
AI.conclusion: 基于高质量超点的Transformer方法能有效提升屋顶平面实例分割性能，尤其适用于点云质量较差的实际场景，且对标注要求更低，具有较好的实用价值。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：95%。本文本身就是遥感方向（屋顶平面分割）的论文。改进方案：(1) 两阶段超点生成流程可推广到其他遥感点云分割任务，如建筑物立面分割、树木分割等；(2) KAN-Transformer解码器可替换现有遥感点云分割模型中的标准MLP解码器；(3) 手工特征与深度学习特征融合策略适用于样本量有限的遥感场景；(4) 可进一步结合多模态遥感数据（如影像+LiDAR）提升超点边界精度。

title: EBIFusion: An Enhancement Module Based on Error Backtracking for Remote Sensing Image Fusion
summary: High-resolution multispectral images are of great value in various fields. However, the physical limitations of satellite sensors hinder the simultaneous acquisition of high spatial resolution and high spectral resolution images. Deep learning has become a powerful tool for remote sensing image fusion, but its full potential has not been fully utilized. In order to maximize the quality of the high-resolution multispectral images generated by the improved model, this paper proposes a module called EBIFusion, which introduces an error backtracking mechanism to improve fusion performance. The module uses the intermediate results of the deep learning model to capture the information lost during the high-resolution image generation process, thereby guiding the optimization of model training. The experimental results on the GF-6 dataset show that the QNR index is increased by 2.22% after the introduction of the module. In addition, the spatial and spectral quality has been continuously improved on multiple datasets, including QuickBird and GF-2. The optimized models, such as PSGAN, PNN, GPPNN, and UCGAN, show stronger spatial details and spectral fidelity. The main contribution of this paper is to propose an error backtracking framework for recovering and compensating for the lost information in the process of remote sensing image fusion based on deep learning. Based on this, a lightweight and model-independent enhancement module EBIFusion is designed, which can be integrated into different deep learning fusion architectures. At the same time, the generalization ability of the module in multiple datasets and network paradigms is verified. In summary, the error backtracking module enhances the quality of the generated high-resolution multispectral images. In addition, it is not limited to specific models and data and can be used as the basis for a versatile and effective optimization component to improve the availability of high-resolution multispectral images.

AI.tldr: 本文提出EBIFusion模块，通过误差回溯机制捕捉深度学习遥感图像融合过程中的信息丢失，指导模型训练优化。在GF-6、QuickBird、GF-2数据集上实验表明，该轻量级、模型无关的增强模块可集成到PSGAN、PNN等多种融合架构中，显著提升空间细节与光谱保真度，QNR指标提升2.22%。
AI.motivation: 卫星传感器的物理限制使得高空间分辨率与高光谱分辨率图像难以同时获取，现有深度学习遥感图像融合方法尚未充分发挥潜力，生成的高分辨率多光谱图像质量仍有提升空间。
AI.method: 提出EBIFusion模块，利用深度学习模型的中间结果捕获高分辨率图像生成过程中丢失的信息，通过误差回溯机制反向补偿信息损失，从而优化模型训练过程。该模块为轻量级、模型无关的增强组件，可灵活嵌入不同深度学习融合架构。
AI.result: 在GF-6数据集上QNR指标提升2.22%；在QuickBird和GF-2数据集上空间与光谱质量持续改善；集成到PSGAN、PNN、GPPNN、UCGAN等模型后，均展现出更强的空间细节与光谱保真度。
AI.conclusion: 误差回溯模块有效提升了生成的高分辨率多光谱图像质量，且不限于特定模型或数据，可作为通用高效的优化组件，提高高分辨率多光谱图像的可用性。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：95%。本文本身就是遥感图像融合论文，改进方向包括：(1) 将EBIFusion扩展到更多遥感融合任务如全色锐化、超分辨率重建；(2) 探索误差回溯与注意力机制或扩散模型的结合；(3) 研究多尺度误差回溯策略，在不同特征层级进行信息补偿；(4) 将模块推广到高光谱图像融合、多时相融合等更具挑战性的遥感场景。

title: Bridging Deep Learning and Ecological Interpretability: A Spatial Mamba Framework for NDVI Prediction in Forest-Steppe Ecotones Under Climate Variability
summary: Forest-steppe ecotones exhibit pronounced spatiotemporal heterogeneity and complex climate–vegetation interactions, posing significant challenges for vegetation dynamics prediction. Existing models often struggle to capture long-range temporal dependencies, preserve spatial continuity across heterogeneous transition zones, and provide ecologically interpretable insights. To address these limitations, we developed a bidirectional Geo-Spatial Mamba (Geo-S-Mamba) architecture with a multi-objective loss function incorporating spatial continuity constraints based on the first law of geography. The model was trained using multi-source geospatial datasets and independently validated during 2019–2023. The results show that Geo-S-Mamba achieved an R2 of 0.93. Moreover, both the bidirectional mechanism and the spatial-continuity loss improved the PSDI by approximately 0.08. The model effectively captured annual variations in NDVI and covariation among vegetation groups. Post hoc symmetric causal learning based on Pearl’s structural causal theory indicated that precipitation was the primary driver of grassland vegetation dynamics. Temperature and radiation influenced NDVI mainly through boundary-dependent effects. Overall, this framework can estimate changes in the spatial distribution of plant communities across heterogeneous environments and provides a scientific basis for further research on forest–steppe ecotones.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种双向地理空间Mamba架构（Geo-S-Mamba），结合基于地理第一定律的空间连续性约束多目标损失函数，用于预测森林-草原交错带植被动态，在2019-2023年独立验证中达到了R²=0.93的性能，并通过事后对称因果学习揭示了降水是草原植被动态的主要驱动因素。
AI.motivation: 森林-草原交错带呈现显著的时空异质性和复杂的气候-植被相互作用，现有模型难以捕捉长时序依赖、在异质性过渡区域保持空间连续性以及提供生态可解释性洞察，亟需发展新的建模方法。
AI.method: (1) 构建双向Geo-Spatial Mamba (Geo-S-Mamba) 架构；(2) 引入基于地理第一定律的空间连续性约束多目标损失函数；(3) 利用多源地理空间数据集训练模型；(4) 采用基于Pearl结构因果理论的事后对称因果学习进行驱动因素分析。
AI.result: Geo-S-Mamba在2019-2023年独立验证中R²达到0.93；双向机制和空间连续性损失均使PSDI提升约0.08；模型有效捕捉了NDVI的年度变化和植被组间的协变关系；降水是草地植被动态的主要驱动因素，温度和辐射主要通过边界依赖效应影响NDVI。
AI.conclusion: 该框架能够估算异质环境下植物群落空间分布的变化，为森林-草原交错带的进一步研究提供了科学依据。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：95%。该论文本身就是遥感领域（基于NDVI的植被动态预测）的典型工作，其Geo-S-Mamba架构可直接应用于其他遥感时序预测任务（如农作物物候监测、森林扰动恢复评估）。改进方向：(1) 可引入多尺度特征融合机制，更好地建模不同空间尺度的植被-环境交互；(2) 可结合物理过程模型（如生态过程模型）进行物理引导的深度学习，增强长期预测的鲁棒性；(3) 在因果分析环节可引入更多环境变量（如土壤湿度、人类活动指标），提升因果推论的完整性。

title: Few-Shot Classification of Shallow-Water Seabed Sediment and Benthic Cover by Fusing Airborne LiDAR Bathymetry and Multispectral Imagery
summary: The accurate classification of seabed sediment and benthic covers in shallow-water environments remains a key challenge for marine activities and oceanographic research. However, coastal areas of shallow waters are influenced by complex dynamic environments, making it difficult to obtain authentic sediment and benthic-cover samples. Therefore, to address the problem of few-shot classification of seabed sediment and benthic covers, a few-shot classification algorithm of seabed sediment and benthic covers based on the fusion model of airborne LiDAR bathymetry (ALB) and multispectral images is proposed in this article. Based on the extracted features, a scale-invariant feature transform-progressive sample consensus (SIFT-PROSAC) algorithm and perspective transform model were constructed to achieve feature fusion. Then, multi-modal feature selection is realized using a formal concept analysis-Relief-F (FCA-Relief-F) algorithm. Finally, a graph attention network-prototype network (GAT-PN) model was established to classify five types of sediment and benthic cover (coral reef, stone, sand, vegetation, and coastal zone). To validate the effectiveness of the proposed method, experimental data from actual measurements at Ganquan Island in the Xisha Islands of China were used. Compared to other classical classifiers, the GAT-PN algorithm achieves a higher classification accuracy, with an overall accuracy (OA) and Kappa coefficient of 97.50% and 0.97, respectively. The findings of this study provide effective technical support for marine engineering and related fields.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于机载激光雷达测深（ALB）与多光谱图像融合模型的少样本分类算法，用于浅水海域海底沉积物与底栖覆盖物分类。通过SIFT-PROSAC算法和透视变换模型实现特征融合，利用FCA-Relief-F算法进行多模态特征选择，并构建GAT-PN模型对五种类型（珊瑚礁、石头、沙子、植被、海岸带）进行分类。在中国西沙群岛甘泉岛实测数据上，OA达97.50%，Kappa系数0.97。
AI.motivation: 浅水海域海底沉积物与底栖覆盖物的精确分类对海洋活动和海洋学研究至关重要，但浅海环境复杂，真实样本难以获取，导致少样本分类问题突出。现有方法难以在样本有限条件下实现高精度分类。
AI.method: 1) 利用ALB和多光谱图像提取特征；2) 构建SIFT-PROSAC算法与透视变换模型实现特征融合；3) 采用FCA-Relief-F算法进行多模态特征选择；4) 建立图注意力网络-原型网络（GAT-PN）模型进行五类（珊瑚礁、石头、沙子、植被、海岸带）少样本分类。
AI.result: 在中国西沙群岛甘泉岛实测数据上，GAT-PN算法总体精度（OA）达97.50%，Kappa系数0.97，优于其他经典分类器。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效解决了浅水海域少样本条件下海底沉积物与底栖覆盖物的分类难题，为海洋工程及相关领域提供了有效的技术支撑。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：95%。若将本文方法应用于遥感领域，可从以下方面改进：1) 将GAT-PN模型扩展至遥感图像中其他地物的少样本分类任务（如湿地植被、海岸线类型等）；2) SIFT-PROSAC融合算法可推广至光学遥感与SAR图像的跨模态配准与融合；3) FCA-Relief-F特征选择机制可迁移至多源遥感数据（如高光谱、多光谱、LiDAR）的特征优选场景；4) 可进一步引入自监督学习预训练策略，提升少样本场景下的泛化能力。

title: A Wavelet-Guided Frequency–Spatial Decoupling Network for Visible–Infrared UAV Detection
summary: Detecting unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs) remains a difficult task, primarily due to their tiny size, rapid motion, and complex backgrounds. Fusing visible and infrared imagery offers complementary advantages for robust detection, yet existing methods rely on spatial feature aggregation that overlooks spectral disparities, coupling noise with textures. Moreover, the small scale and high dynamics of UAVs hinder standard convolution from decoupling target signals from background interference due to limited receptive fields. To solve these limitations, the Wavelet-guided Frequency–Spatial Decoupling Network (WFSD-Net) is designed for visible–infrared UAV detection. First, to tackle fusion noise, the Discrete Wavelet Band-Differentiated Fusion (DWBF) module is designed to explicitly decouple noise-dominant sub-bands from information-rich components by performing spectral decomposition. It aligns low-frequency distributions via adaptive spatial weighting and disentangles high-frequency details using physics-aware rules, achieving source-level noise suppression. Second, an Axial Strip Contextual Attention (ASCA) module is proposed. By utilizing anisotropic strip convolution via orthogonal decomposition, this module captures global contextual dependencies to effectively decouple weak target features from background clutter, enhancing the spatial position encoding capability for weak targets. Finally, the proposed WFSD-Net method is validated on Anti-UAV300 and Multi-Sensor and Multi-View Fixed-Wing UAV (MMFW-UAV) datasets, and experiments demonstrate that the proposed method is superior to existing state-of-the-art (SOTA) methods.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种小波引导的频率-空间解耦网络（WFSD-Net），用于可见光-红外无人机检测。通过离散小波带差分融合模块抑制融合噪声，轴向带状上下文注意力模块解耦弱小目标与背景杂波，在多个数据集上达到SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 现有可见光-红外融合检测方法依赖空间特征聚合，忽略了光谱差异，导致噪声与纹理耦合；同时标准卷积感受野有限，难以从复杂背景中解耦弱小运动目标信号。
AI.method: 1) DWBF模块：利用离散小波变换对光谱进行分解，显式解耦噪声主导子带与信息丰富成分，通过自适应空间加权对齐低频分布，物理感知规则分离高频细节，实现源级噪声抑制。2) ASCA模块：通过正交分解采用各向异性带状卷积，捕获全局上下文依赖，解耦弱目标特征与背景杂波，增强弱目标空间位置编码能力。
AI.result: 在Anti-UAV300和MMFW-UAV数据集上验证，所提方法优于现有SOTA方法。
AI.conclusion: 小波引导的频率-空间解耦策略能有效解决可见光-红外融合中的噪声耦合和弱小目标检测难题，为多模态无人机检测提供了新范式。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：95%。该论文本身就是遥感目标检测（无人机检测）领域的工作。改进方向：1) DWBF模块可推广至遥感图像的多模态融合（如SAR-光学、高光谱-多光谱），处理不同传感器间的频谱差异与噪声耦合问题；2) ASCA模块的轴向带状注意力可增强遥感图像中细长目标（如道路、桥梁、舰船）的检测能力；3) 可引入小波域的多尺度分解策略，进一步提升遥感目标检测中对地物尺度多样性的适应能力。

title: FEDM: Feature-Encoding Diffusion Model for Large-Scale SAR Image Inpainting
summary: With the wide application of generative models in the field of SAR image inpainting, inadequate reconstruction quality of scattering characteristics and insufficient global coherence of semantic logic remain the core challenges of such tasks. To address these issues, this paper proposes a Feature-Encoding Diffusion Model (FEDM). Guided by local valid regions, the proposed model accurately learns the microwave backscattering distribution law of ground features through a SAR-specific Variational Auto-Encoder (SAR-VAE), thus improving the reconstruction accuracy of backscattering statistics. Meanwhile, it integrates semantic embedding and cross-attention mechanism to strengthen the semantic constraints of SAR scenes, ensuring the logical rationality of the ground feature layout. With progressive diffusion generation and sliding window strategy, the model achieves high-quality reconstruction with coherent semantics and consistent global spatial structure for large-scale missing regions. Experiments on public datasets including OSdataset, SEN1-2, SRSDD-v1.0 and MRSSC show that the proposed method achieves excellent performance in terms of scattering characteristic reconstruction quality and globally coherent generation of semantic logic, and realizes high-quality SAR image inpainting.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种特征编码扩散模型（FEDM），通过SAR专用变分自编码器（SAR-VAE）学习微波后向散射分布规律，并结合语义嵌入与交叉注意力机制增强场景语义约束，实现高质量SAR图像修复，在多个公开数据集上取得优秀性能。
AI.motivation: 当前生成模型在SAR图像修复中存在散射特性重建质量不足和语义逻辑全局一致性差两大核心挑战。
AI.method: 1）提出SAR-VAE局部有效区域引导学习地物微波后向散射分布规律；2）集成语义嵌入与交叉注意力机制增强场景语义约束；3）采用渐进式扩散生成与滑动窗口策略实现大面积缺失区域的高质量重建。
AI.result: 在OSdataset、SEN1-2、SRSDD-v1.0和MRSSC四个公开数据集上，散射特性重建质量和语义逻辑全局一致性生成均表现优异。
AI.conclusion: FEDM有效解决了SAR图像修复中散射特征重建精度和语义逻辑一致性问题，实现了高质量修复。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：95%。1）该SAR-VAE框架可直接迁移至遥感InSAR相位解缠或PolSAR极化特征重建任务中，通过学习物理散射模型提升重建精度；2）语义嵌入与交叉注意力机制可扩展至遥感变化检测中的时序语义一致性约束；3）滑动窗口扩散策略适用于大尺度遥感影像的云/阴影掩膜区域修复；4）未来可引入多模态遥感数据（光学-SAR）作为语义先验，进一步提升复杂场景重建鲁棒性。

title: A Superpixel-Guided Spectral–Spatial Fusion Network for Hyperspectral Scene Classification
summary: In recent years, research on remote sensing scene classification (RSSC) has mainly focused on high-resolution imagery, which provides limited spectral information, whereas hyperspectral imaging (HSI) offers richer cues about material properties and compositional structure. Despite its potential, hyperspectral scene classification (HSI-SC) remains challenging because pixel- or patch-based representations fail to preserve spatial structures and regional boundaries. In addition, labeled hyperspectral samples are often scarce, making it difficult to learn stable class-discriminative representations from high-dimensional spectral observations. To address these issues, this paper proposes a dual-branch fusion framework. Superpixels are used to aggregate high-dimensional spectral signals into compact, boundary-aware tokens. The spectral branch is initialized with pretrained model weights and further adapted via a lightweight adaptation strategy for efficient transfer under limited supervision. In parallel, a pseudo-RGB spatial branch complements structural and textural information. Spectral and spatial features are fused additively to generate a more discriminative scene representation. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed method outperforms compared hyperspectral scene classification approaches.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种双分支融合框架用于高光谱遥感场景分类，通过超像素聚合光谱信息并利用预训练模型轻量适配，结合伪RGB空间分支进行特征融合，在有限标注下取得了优于对比方法的性能。
AI.motivation: 高光谱场景分类面临两大挑战：(1) 像素或块状表示难以保持空间结构和区域边界；(2) 标注样本稀缺导致难以从高维光谱中学习稳定的类别判别表示。
AI.method: 提出双分支融合框架：光谱分支利用超像素将高维光谱信号聚合为边界感知的紧凑token，并用预训练权重初始化后通过轻量适配策略进行微调；伪RGB空间分支补充结构和纹理信息；最后将光谱与空间特征进行加性融合得到判别性场景表示。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，所提方法在多个高光谱场景分类任务上优于现有对比方法。
AI.conclusion: 超像素聚合与预训练模型轻量适配相结合的方案能有效解决高光谱场景分类中空间结构保留和标注稀缺问题，验证了双分支融合框架的有效性。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：95%。改进方案：(1) 可引入多尺度超像素聚合策略，捕捉不同尺度的空间-光谱上下文；(2) 空间分支可替换为更强大的预训练视觉骨干（如Swin Transformer）以提升纹理特征提取能力；(3) 加性融合可扩展为注意力引导的自适应融合机制，动态调整光谱与空间分支贡献权重；(4) 超像素token可结合图神经网络建模区域间拓扑关系；(5) 针对跨场景迁移场景，可引入域适应模块增强泛化性。

title: SIMBA: A Bidirectional Retrieval–Forward Simulation Framework for Modeling FY-4A/GIIRS Hyperspectral Infrared Radiances Toward NWP Applications
summary: Hyperspectral infrared observations are an important data source for numerical weather prediction (NWP) because they provide rich information on the vertical structure of atmospheric temperature and humidity. However, most existing deep learning methods mainly focus on one-way retrieval from radiances to atmospheric profiles, while the reverse radiance simulation process and the consistency between atmospheric state space and radiance observation space are insufficiently considered. In this study, we propose SIMBA, a unified bidirectional retrieval–forward simulation framework for FY-4A/GIIRS hyperspectral infrared radiance modeling toward NWP applications. The framework jointly performs atmospheric profile retrieval and radiance reconstruction, introduces a cycle-consistency constraint to strengthen the coupling between the two processes, and employs a bidirectional Mamba state-space module to capture long-range dependencies along pressure levels. Using collocated FY-4A/GIIRS observations and ERA5 reanalysis data, the proposed method is evaluated for temperature retrieval, specific humidity retrieval, long-wave radiance reconstruction, and medium wave radiance reconstruction. Experimental results show that SIMBA outperforms several representative deep learning baselines across both retrieval and reconstruction tasks, while ablation experiments confirm the contribution of the bidirectional design and cycle-consistency mechanism. These results demonstrate that the proposed framework is effective for joint atmospheric profile retrieval and hyperspectral infrared radiance modeling, and suggests potential for future Jacobian-related analysis and NWP-oriented extensions.

AI.tldr: 提出了SIMBA，一个统一的双向检索-前向模拟框架，用于FY-4A/GIIRS高光谱红外辐射建模，通过双向Mamba状态空间模块和循环一致性约束联合进行大气廓线反演和辐射重建，在温度和湿度反演及辐射重建任务上优于多种深度学习基线方法。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习方法主要关注从辐射到大气廓线的单向反演，忽略了反向辐射模拟过程以及大气状态空间与辐射观测空间之间的一致性约束，导致两个空间的耦合不足。
AI.method: 提出了SIMBA框架：(1) 统一的双向反演-前向模拟架构，联合进行大气廓线反演和辐射重建；(2) 引入循环一致性约束，加强两个过程之间的耦合；(3) 采用双向Mamba状态空间模块，沿气压层捕获长程依赖关系。
AI.result: 使用FY-4A/GIIRS观测与ERA5再分析数据的实验表明，SIMBA在温度反演、比湿反演、长波辐射重建和中波辐射重建任务上均优于多种代表性深度学习基线方法。消融实验验证了双向设计和循环一致性机制的贡献。
AI.conclusion: SIMBA框架能够有效联合进行大气廓线反演和高光谱红外辐射建模，为NWP应用提供支持，并具有在Jacobian分析和NWP扩展方面的潜力。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：85%。改进方案：(1) 可将SIMBA的双向Mamba模块替换或融合Transformer架构，以对比不同序列建模机制在高光谱辐射数据上的表现；(2) 循环一致性约束可引入更复杂的物理损失项（如辐射传输方程的物理正则化），提升模型可解释性；(3) 当前仅评估了温度和湿度，可扩展至臭氧、CO等其他大气成分廓线的联合反演；(4) 可探索将SIMBA应用于其他高光谱传感器（如AIRS、IASI、CrIS）的迁移学习能力。

title: Spatiotemporal Evolution Characteristics of GPP and Its Nonlinear Response Mechanisms to Climate Change Across China’s Three Major Forest Regions
summary: Gross primary productivity (GPP) is central to terrestrial carbon cycling and forest carbon sink assessment. Using Google Earth Engine, MODIS GPP, ERA5-Land meteorological data, and forest extent masks, this study examined GPP dynamics and climatic controls in China’s northeast, southern, and southwest forest regions from 2005 to 2025. GPP increased overall in all three regions, with higher values in the south and lower values in the north. Climatic drivers differed regionally: in the northeast, GPP responded positively to temperature, while VPD slightly exceeded temperature in the dominant-control area; in the southern region, temperature was the main driver but VPD remained important; in the southwest, temperature dominated larger areas, whereas moisture-related controls showed stronger spatial heterogeneity. Piecewise analysis identified temperature–VPD turning points of 11.74 °C, 10.43 °C, and 25.64 °C for the northeast, southwest, and southern regions, respectively. Two-dimensional temperature–VPD binning further revealed nonlinear GPP distributions and distinct optimal hydrothermal combinations across regions. These results show that warming effects on forest productivity are region-specific and constrained by atmospheric dryness, providing evidence for assessing China’s forest carbon sink responses to climate change.

AI.tldr: 本研究利用Google Earth Engine分析了2005-2025年中国东北、南方和西南三大林区GPP动态及其气候控制因素，发现GPP整体上升，但不同区域气候驱动因子存在显著差异，温度-水汽压亏缺（VPD）存在明确的转折点，揭示了变暖对森林生产力的影响具有区域特异性并受大气干燥度制约。
AI.motivation: 森林总初级生产力（GPP）是陆地碳循环和森林碳汇评估的核心指标，但气候变化对不同区域森林GPP的影响机制尚不明确，特别是温度与大气干燥度（VPD）的交互作用缺乏系统性的区域对比研究。
AI.method: 基于Google Earth Engine平台，整合MODIS GPP、ERA5-Land气象数据和森林覆盖掩膜数据，采用分段分析识别温度-VPD转折点，并利用二维温度-VPD分箱方法揭示非线性GPP分布特征及最优水热组合。
AI.result: 三大林区GPP整体上升，南方GPP高于北方；东北地区GPP对温度响应为正，但VPD控制区略大于温度；南方以温度驱动为主，VPD也重要；西南温度主导面积更大，但水分相关控制空间异质性更强。东北、西南、南方温度-VPD转折点分别为11.74°C、10.43°C和25.64°C。
AI.conclusion: 变暖对森林生产力的影响具有区域特异性，并受大气干燥度（VPD）的制约。研究结果为评估中国森林碳汇对气候变化的响应提供了证据支持。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：85%。作为遥感应用论文，可改进方向包括：(1) 引入更高空间分辨率的GPP产品（如SIF或VPM模型）以提升区域细节捕捉能力；(2) 加入多源遥感数据（如L波段SAR或激光雷达）评估森林结构对GPP-气候关系的调节作用；(3) 考虑辐射和CO2浓度联合作用，构建多因子非线性模型以提高预测精度；(4) 利用机器学习方法（如随机森林或深度学习）替代分段线性分析，捕捉更复杂的非线性响应模式；(5) 将研究扩展到其他气候带或全球尺度进行对比验证。

title: Multi-Task Adaptive Knowledge Transfer for Black-Box Adversarial Attacks on Hyperspectral Images
summary: Deep neural networks have substantially improved the performance of hyperspectral image classification, yet they remain vulnerable to adversarial attacks. Existing attack methods usually manipulate pixel spectra directly, ignoring the physical mixing mechanism of remote sensing imaging and potentially generating adversarial samples with limited physical consistency and interpretability. Moreover, balancing attack effectiveness and perturbation imperceptibility remains a challenging multi-objective optimization problem. To address these issues, this paper proposes an evolutionary multi-task multi-objective adversarial attack framework based on inter-task knowledge transfer. Instead of perturbing raw pixel spectra, the proposed method introduces perturbations into abundance maps obtained through spectral unmixing, thereby improving the physical plausibility of the generated adversarial samples. The generation of class-specific universal perturbations is formulated as a collaborative multi-task optimization problem. To solve this problem, we develop a Self-Adaptive Multi-Objective Multi-Factorial Evolutionary Algorithm for Adversarial Attacks (SAMO-MFEA-AA). By modeling the attack generation processes for different land-cover classes as distinct yet correlated optimization tasks, SAMO-MFEA-AA dynamically captures synergistic relationships among tasks. An asymmetric adaptive cooperation matrix is employed to regulate the intensity of knowledge transfer, allowing beneficial perturbation patterns to be shared across related classes while reducing the risk of negative transfer. Extensive experiments on the Indian Pines and Salinas datasets demonstrate that the proposed framework achieves competitive hypervolume performance and favorable solution diversity compared with existing multi-objective optimization algorithms. In adversarial attack scenarios, the proposed method achieves effective attack success rates against representative classification networks while maintaining the physical plausibility of abundance-space perturbations.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于进化多任务多目标优化的高光谱图像对抗攻击框架（SAMO-MFEA-AA），通过在地物丰度空间而非原始像素光谱中引入扰动，并利用任务间知识迁移协同生成各类别通用扰动，在保持物理可解释性的同时实现了高效攻击。
AI.motivation: 现有对抗攻击方法直接在像素光谱域操作，忽略了遥感成像的物理混合机制，导致对抗样本物理一致性差、可解释性低；同时攻击效果与扰动不可感知性之间存在多目标优化冲突。
AI.method: 提出SAMO-MFEA-AA框架：1) 通过光谱解混将扰动引入丰度图，增强物理合理性；2) 将各类别通用扰动生成建模为协同多任务优化问题；3) 采用非对称自适应协作矩阵调控任务间知识迁移强度，促进有益扰动模式共享并减少负迁移。
AI.result: 在Indian Pines和Salinas数据集上，该框架相比现有多目标优化算法取得了更优的超体积性能和多样化解集；对代表性分类网络实现了有效攻击成功率，同时保持了丰度空间扰动的物理可解释性。
AI.conclusion: 基于丰度空间扰动和进化多任务多目标优化的对抗攻击框架在物理合理性、攻击成功率与扰动不可感知性之间取得了良好平衡，为高光谱图像对抗攻击提供了新范式。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：95%。改进方案：1) 可引入更精细的光谱解混模型（如非线性解混或变分自编码器）提升丰度估计精度，从而增强扰动物理一致性；2) 任务间知识迁移机制可扩展到多源遥感数据（高光谱-多光谱-激光雷达）的协同攻击；3) 可探索将对抗训练与丰度空间扰动结合，提升高光谱分类模型的鲁棒性；4) 框架可适配到遥感目标检测、变化检测等任务的多目标对抗攻击场景。

title: UAV-Based Deep Learning Workflows for High-Resolution Detection and Mapping of Elkhorn Coral (Acropora palmata)
summary: Elkhorn coral (Acropora palmata) is a threatened reef-building species that plays a critical role in Caribbean coastal ecosystems. Efficient, large-scale monitoring of A. palmata is essential for evaluating restoration success, yet traditional in situ surveys remain costly and spatially constrained. In this study, we acquired high-resolution (1.8 cm) uncrewed aerial vehicle (UAV) imagery of a coral reef within the United States Virgin Islands’ (USVI) St. Croix East End Marine Park (STXEEMP) and applied deep learning object detection to identify individual A. palmata colonies. We utilized two convolutional neural network architectures, FasterRCNN and MaskRCNN. FasterRCNN was used as an initial screening tool to identify the optimal imagery dataset from several candidates. After identifying the dataset, we used MaskRCNN with an iterative annotation refinement procedure in which initial model predictions were used to augment the training data and achieved an F1 score of 0.78. Detection accuracy was strongly influenced by colony size and apparent water depth, with markedly high accuracy for corals wider than 0.3 m (F1 = 0.87) and located in shallower waters (F1 = 0.81). Beyond detection, MaskRCNN’s polygon outputs enabled the measurement of the individual colony area and the generation of high-resolution coral density maps. These products complement broader-scale prediction and mapping approaches and provide fine-scale, management-relevant information. Although this study was conducted at a single reef site during one acquisition period, the results suggest that UAV-based deep learning workflows offer a promising approach for coral reef monitoring that could support restoration assessments and conservation decision-making, pending validation across additional sites, seasons, and environmental conditions.

AI.tldr: 本研究利用无人机（UAV）获取高分辨率（1.8 cm）影像，结合深度学习方法（FasterRCNN和MaskRCNN）对濒危的麋角珊瑚（Acropora palmata）进行自动检测与面积测量。通过迭代标注优化，最终F1分数达0.78，较大珊瑚（>0.3 m）和浅水区域检测精度更高（F1分别为0.87和0.81）。研究证明了基于UAV的深度学习工作流在珊瑚礁监测中的潜力，可为恢复评估和保护决策提供精细尺度信息。
AI.motivation: 麋角珊瑚（Acropora palmata）是加勒比海沿岸生态系统中关键的造礁物种，但传统原位调查成本高且空间覆盖有限。为了实现高效、大规模的监测以评估恢复成效，亟需开发新的监测方法。
AI.method: 1) 在美属维尔京群岛圣克罗伊东端海洋公园获取无人机高分辨率（1.8 cm）影像；2) 使用FasterRCNN进行初步筛选，确定最优影像数据集；3) 采用MaskRCNN结合迭代标注细化流程（用模型预测结果扩充训练数据）检测单个珊瑚群落；4) 利用MaskRCNN的多边形输出测量个体群落面积并生成高分辨率珊瑚密度图。
AI.result: MaskRCNN在迭代优化后达到F1=0.78；较大珊瑚（>0.3 m）检测F1=0.87，浅水区域F1=0.81；成功实现个体珊瑚面积测量与密度图生成。
AI.conclusion: 基于UAV的深度学习工作流为珊瑚礁监测提供了一种有前景的方法，能够支持恢复评估和保护决策，但还需在更多地点、季节和环境条件下进行验证。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：85%。改进方案：1) 引入多光谱或高光谱UAV数据，利用光谱特征提升珊瑚与底栖背景的区分度；2) 结合时序影像进行变化检测，监测珊瑚白化或恢复动态；3) 集成轻量化网络（如YOLO系列或MobileNet）以实现边缘端实时处理；4) 引入注意力机制或Transformer架构以增强对复杂水下纹理和光照变化鲁棒性；5) 融合DEM数据校正水深对检测精度的影响。

title: Multi-Source Remote Sensing Observations of Multiscale Ionospheric Disturbances over Brazil During the Intense Geomagnetic Storm of November 2025 and Their Impact on PPP Convergence
summary: During geomagnetic storms, ionospheric disturbances can undergo substantial spatiotemporal restructuring and affect high-precision GNSS applications. This study investigates the multiscale ionospheric response over Brazil during the intense geomagnetic storm of 12 November 2025 and examines the associated changes in precise point positioning (PPP) convergence. Multi-source observations, including GNSS TEC/dSTEC, ROTI, JPL Global Ionospheric Maps, ionosonde parameters, and three-dimensional ionospheric tomography, were jointly analyzed. The results show that the storm produced pronounced and nonuniform global TEC anomalies, with the Brazilian sector embedded in a disturbed background. Over Brazil, clear traveling ionospheric disturbance (TID) propagation and ROTI enhancement were observed during the main response phase. The TID developed after approximately 02:05 UT and reached its maximum intensity during 02:25–03:00 UT. Ionosonde observations indicated decreased foF2 and increased h′F2, suggesting electron density depletion and an apparent uplift of the F-region reflection height. The GNSS dSTEC-constrained tomographic reconstruction suggested that the relative perturbation structures were more evident at 150–400 km, especially near 250–350 km. PPP analysis further revealed longer convergence times on the storm day, particularly in the vertical component. These results indicate that the Brazilian ionosphere experienced a multiscale response from global anomalies to regional propagation and vertical restructuring, which was associated with delayed PPP convergence performance.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了2025年11月12日强磁暴期间巴西上空电离层多尺度响应及其对精密单点定位（PPP）收敛性能的影响。联合多源观测（GNSS TEC/dSTEC、ROTI、JPL全球电离层地图、电离层测高仪、三维电离层层析成像）分析发现，磁暴导致全球TEC出现显著非均匀异常，巴西区域处于扰动背景中。主响应阶段观测到明显的行进电离层扰动（TID）传播和ROTI增强，TID在02:05 UT后发展，02:25–03:00 UT达到最大强度。电离层测高仪显示foF2下降、h′F2升高，表明电子密度降低和F层反射高度抬升。层析成像表明相对扰动结构在150–400 km高度更为明显，尤其250–350 km附近。PPP分析显示暴时收敛时间延长，尤其垂直分量。结果表明巴西电离层经历了从全球异常到区域传播再到垂直重构的多尺度响应，这与PPP收敛性能延迟相关。
AI.motivation: 磁暴期间电离层扰动会发生显著的时空重构，影响高精度GNSS应用。巴西区域位于赤道电离层异常区，电离层扰动机制复杂，但目前对该区域在强磁暴下的多尺度电离层响应及其对PPP收敛性能的影响研究尚不充分，因此有必要开展综合分析。
AI.method: 联合多源观测数据，包括GNSS TEC/dSTEC、ROTI、JPL全球电离层地图、电离层测高仪（foF2、h′F2）及三维电离层层析成像技术，综合分析2025年11月12日强磁暴期间巴西上空电离层在全球、区域和垂直剖面等多尺度上的响应特征，并评估其对PPP收敛时间的影响。
AI.result: (1) 磁暴造成全球TEC出现显著非均匀异常，巴西区域处于扰动背景中；(2) 主响应阶段观测到清晰的TID传播和ROTI增强，TID在02:05 UT后发展，02:25–03:00 UT强度最大；(3) 电离层测高仪显示foF2下降、h′F2升高，表明电子密度降低和F层反射高度抬升；(4) 层析成像显示相对扰动在150–400 km高度更明显，尤其250–350 km；(5) PPP分析显示暴时收敛时间延长，尤其垂直分量。
AI.conclusion: 巴西电离层在2025年11月12日强磁暴期间经历了从全球异常到区域传播再到垂直重构的多尺度响应过程，这种多尺度电离层扰动导致了PPP收敛性能的显著延迟，尤其在垂直分量上表现更为突出。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：95%。该论文的研究对象——磁暴期间电离层多尺度响应及其对GNSS定位的影响——本身即为遥感与空间天气交叉领域的核心问题。在遥感交叉方面，可进一步：(1) 将三维电离层层析成像结果与星载SAR/InSAR电离层校正结合，评估磁暴对InSAR形变测量的影响；(2) 利用该区域电离层扰动特征优化星载测高仪（如SWARM、GRACE-FO）的电离层延迟校正模型；(3) 将TID传播特征与大气重力波遥感观测（如AIRS、VIIRS）进行交叉验证，建立电离层-中性大气耦合模型；(4) 基于该PPP收敛延迟结果，改进实时高精度定位中的电离层扰动预警策略，提升遥感卫星轨道确定的鲁棒性。

title: Analyzing the Effect of Angle of Incidence on the Terrestrial Laser Scanning Intensity of Broad-Leaved Surfaces Using a Piecewise Data-Driven Model
summary: Terrestrial laser scanners provide both geometric and radiometric information, and terrestrial laser scanning (TLS) intensity is influenced by surface optical properties and the angle of incidence. This study presents a piecewise polynomial Lambert–Beckmann (PPLB) model to enhance TLS intensity characterization for broad-leaved surfaces. The PPLB model incorporates the Beckmann law, thus enabling a data-driven estimation of transition angles and enhancing the fitting flexibility across diverse leaf surfaces. TLS measurements were conducted on adaxial and abaxial leaf surfaces of five tree species using a RIEGL VZ-400 scanner. The results indicated that the TLS intensity consistently declined as the angle of incidence increased; however, different species and surfaces showed distinct angular response patterns. Across all ten tested species–surface combinations, the PPLB model achieved low root mean square error values of 0.0095–0.0183 and yielded three physically meaningful parameters: specular reflection contribution (ks), surface roughness (m), and transition angle (θT). Excluding the θT = 0° fitted result for the Golden Shower Tree abaxial surface, the estimated nonzero θT values ranged from 30° to 64°, indicating substantial variability in threshold angles among leaf surfaces beyond the commonly assumed value of 45°. These findings highlight the importance of incorporating surface-specific threshold angles for improved leaf characterization.

AI.tldr: 本文提出分段多项式Lambert-Beckmann（PPLB）模型，用于增强阔叶表面的TLS强度表征。该模型结合Beckmann定律，可数据驱动估计过渡角，提升对不同叶面拟合的灵活性。对五种树种的叶片正反面进行RIEGL VZ-400扫描实验，结果表明PPLB模型均方根误差仅0.0095-0.0183，并提取了镜面反射贡献（ks）、表面粗糙度（m）和过渡角（θT）三个物理参数，其中θT在30°-64°之间变化，突破了以往固定45°的假设。
AI.motivation: 现有TLS强度模型对阔叶表面的表征精度不足，且通常假设过渡角为固定值（如45°），未考虑不同叶面光学特性的差异，导致叶片表面特性刻画不够准确。
AI.method: 提出PPLB模型，融合Lambert漫反射模型与Beckmann镜面反射定律，通过分段多项式形式实现过渡角的数据驱动估计。使用RIEGL VZ-400扫描仪对五种树种的叶片正反面进行多角度TLS测量，提取三个物理参数（ks、m、θT）。
AI.result: 所有10种物种-表面组合的RMSE为0.0095-0.0183；除一种特殊情况外，估计的θT值为30°-64°，远非固定45°；不同物种和叶面表现出不同的角度响应模式。
AI.conclusion: 叶片表面存在显著的过渡角变异性，固定45°假设不适用于所有叶面；PPLB模型结合表面特异性过渡角可显著提升叶片TLS强度表征精度。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：90%。该模型的直接遥感交叉方向包括：（1）将PPLB模型应用于机载或星载激光雷达（如ICESat-2、GEDI）的植被回波强度校正，提升冠层结构参数反演精度；（2）结合高光谱遥感数据，将ks、m、θT参数与叶片生化成分（叶绿素、水分含量）建立关联模型，实现叶片生理参数的多源遥感估算；（3）将该模型推广至针叶或其他非阔叶植被类型，构建通用的植被激光雷达强度归一化框架；（4）作为辐射传输模型（如PROSPECT+SAIL）的激光雷达子模块，提升多模态遥感数据协同模拟能力。

title: Evaluating Urban Landscape and Remotely Sensed Vegetation Indices to Explain Wild Boar Presence in Barcelona
summary: Urbanisation is reshaping ecosystems and increasing human–wildlife interactions. Wild boar (Sus scrofa), a highly adaptable species, is increasingly common in European cities, where it exploits natural and anthropogenic resources, often leading to conflict. Predicting when and where wild boars enter urban areas remains challenging, particularly using scalable tools such as remote sensing. Here, we show that temporal and spatial drivers of urban presence are decoupled in Barcelona over a 14-year period. Seasonal vegetation dynamics influenced the timing of urban incursions, with peaks in spring and late summer associated with changes in vegetation moisture and likely reinforced by increased energetic demands during reproduction and early lactation. However, remotely sensed vegetation indices captured these dynamics only partially, limiting their predictive power when used alone. Spatial variation in urban green area use was primarily explained by landscape structure, with proximity to streams and habitat fragmentation contributing similarly. Green areas near natural corridors were concentrated higher and had more variable presence, while heterogeneous landscapes likely facilitated repeated use by increasing access to foraging and refuge. Integrating remote sensing with landscape metrics can improve the anticipation and management of human–wildlife conflicts.

AI.tldr: 本研究基于14年数据，分析了野猪（Sus scrofa）在巴塞罗那城市出现的时空驱动因素。结果表明：时间上与季节性植被动态（春季和夏末）相关，空间上受景观结构（溪流邻近度、栖息地破碎化）影响；遥感植被指数只能部分捕捉这些动态，单独预测能力有限；将遥感与景观指标结合可改善冲突预测与管理。
AI.motivation: 城市化重塑生态系统，野猪作为高适应物种在欧洲城市日益常见，导致人-野生动物冲突加剧；现有方法难以预测野猪进入城市的时间和地点，尤其缺乏可扩展的遥感工具。
AI.method: 对巴塞罗那14年的野猪城市出现数据进行分析，利用遥感植被指数（如植被水分含量等）捕捉季节性植被动态，并结合景观结构指标（溪流邻近度、栖息地破碎化等）解释空间变异，对比时间和空间驱动因素的差异。
AI.result: 时间和空间驱动因素在巴塞罗那14年间是解耦的。时间上，春季和夏末植被水分变化驱动野猪进城高峰，可能与繁殖期能量需求增加有关；但遥感植被指数只能部分捕捉这些动态。空间上，城市绿地使用主要由景观结构解释，溪流邻近度和栖息地破碎化贡献相当；靠近自然廊道的绿地区域海拔更高且出现率更不稳定，异质性景观通过增加觅食和避难机会促进重复使用。
AI.conclusion: 单一的遥感植被指数难以独立预测野猪城市出现；将遥感数据与景观指标整合，能够更有效地预测和管理人-野生动物冲突。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：85%。作为野生动物遥感领域的交叉研究，可从以下方面改进：(1) 引入多源遥感数据（如Sentinel-1 SAR、夜间灯光、热红外），弥补单一植被指数对动物活动响应不足的局限；(2) 利用高时空分辨率遥感影像（如Planet、高分系列）捕捉城市绿地精细变化和边缘效应；(3) 结合机器学习（随机森林、XGBoost）构建集成模型，将植被指数、景观指标与环境变量（温度、降水）融合；(4) 针对其他城市化适应物种（如狐狸、浣熊、鹿）迁移该方法，验证跨物种通用性；(5) 引入无人机载多光谱传感器验证局部尺度的植被水分动态与动物出现模式耦合关系。

title: Portable Side-Scan Sonar System for Acoustic Remote Sensing of Ultra-Shallow Seafloor: Design and Field Validation
summary: Ultra-shallow and confined water environments are challenging to survey with conventional towed side-scan sonar (SSS) due to limited access and positioning uncertainties. This study introduces a portable, battery-powered acoustic survey system that integrates a pole-mounted dual-frequency side-scan sonar (600/1600 kHz) with RTK GNSS (Real-Time Kinematic Global Navigation Satellite System), deployable from a small inflatable boat. The system was validated in two settings: an inland lake and a marina. Field trials demonstrated reliable acquisition of high-resolution sonar imagery and effective detection of both natural and anthropogenic seabed features, including small and low-reflectivity objects. The high-frequency channel (1600 kHz) produced superior image quality and interpretability compared to the lower frequency. While there are limitations associated with fixed sonar mounting and limited altitude control, the system offers high mobility, rapid deployment, and operational safety. This approach represents a practical, cost-effective solution for high-resolution acoustic remote sensing in ultra-shallow water settings where traditional survey methods are ineffective or impractical.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种便携式、电池供电的声学测量系统，将杆载双频侧扫声纳（600/1600 kHz）与RTK GNSS集成，从小型充气艇部署，用于超浅水和受限水域环境的高分辨率声学遥感。在湖和码头两个场景验证了系统有效性，高频通道（1600 kHz）成像质量更优。
AI.motivation: 传统拖曳式侧扫声纳在超浅水和受限水域环境中难以作业，主要受限于空间狭小和定位不确定性，亟需一种高机动性、易部署且成本低廉的替代方案。
AI.method: 设计并集成了杆载双频侧扫声纳（600/1600 kHz）与RTK GNSS定位系统，搭载于小型充气艇；在湖和码头两个超浅水场景进行了实地验证。
AI.result: 成功获取了高分辨率声纳图像，有效检测出天然和人为海床特征，包括小型和低反射率目标；1600 kHz高频通道图像质量和可解释性优于600 kHz低频通道。
AI.conclusion: 该系统具有高机动性、快速部署和操作安全性，为传统方法无效或不实用的超浅水环境提供了一种实用且经济的声学遥感解决方案，但存在固定安装和高度控制受限的局限性。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：90%。该系统的便携式杆载侧扫声纳+RTK GNSS方案可直接应用于遥感领域的超浅水区（如湿地、河口、城市内河）高分辨率水下地形与目标探测。改进方向：(1) 集成IMU姿态传感器以补偿船体晃动引起的图像畸变；(2) 引入自动高度控制算法或自适应变深支架，克服固定安装高度受限问题；(3) 将声纳数据与无人机高光谱/可见光遥感数据融合，实现水上下协同观测。

title: Species Misidentification in Drone-Based Shark Surveillance and Implications for Beach Management
summary: Drone-based shark surveillance has been implemented as a non-lethal mitigation method to minimise the risk of human–shark interactions along beaches of New South Wales (NSW), Australia. However, real-time misidentification remains problematic, often triggering unnecessary countermeasures due to marine animals that pose little to no risk to humans. We investigated shark misidentification in drone surveys by comparing real-time identification with post-flight verification across 900 flights. Post-flight analyses revealed false-positive detection rates of 53%, 79%, and 100% for bull (Carcharhinus leucas), white (Carcharodon carcharias), and tiger (Galeocerdo cuvier) sharks, respectively, which collectively are the ‘target’ sharks of mitigation measures in NSW. Of the 269 flights in which sharks were identified in real time as target sharks, 62% were confirmed post-flight as other sharks (i.e., whaler species, grey nurse, leopard, or wobbegong), sharks that could not be identified (unknown sharks), or non-shark species (i.e., guitarfish). Conversely, 25% of flights with target sharks identified post-flight were recorded in real time as ‘other’ or ‘unknown’ sharks. Overall, real-time classification overestimated the presence of target sharks, with an apparent prevalence approximately twice the true prevalence. Countermeasure activations based on real-time classification of target sharks were accurate in only 36% of instances. Non-shark species (i.e., guitarfish or gamefish) also triggered 39 countermeasures, including 28 water evacuations. Integrating artificial intelligence or other advances (e.g., higher-resolution video on larger screens) may enhance the effectiveness of drone-based surveillance by assisting pilots with real-time shark detection and identification.

AI.tldr: 本文基于澳大利亚新南威尔士州900次无人机飞行数据，评估了无人机鲨鱼监测中实时识别与飞行后验证的差异。结果显示，三种目标鲨鱼（牛鲨、大白鲨、虎鲨）的误报率分别高达53%、79%和100%，实时分类中目标鲨鱼的表观流行率约为真实流行率的两倍，仅36%的触发对策准确，共有28次不必要的海水撤离。研究建议集成人工智能或更高分辨率视频等技术提升监测效果。
AI.motivation: 目前无人机鲨鱼监测中的实时误识别问题严重，常因误将无害海洋生物识别为目标鲨鱼而触发不必要的对策（如海滩撤离），造成资源浪费和公众恐慌。本研究旨在量化实时识别与飞行后验证之间的差异，揭示误报率，为改进监测系统提供依据。
AI.method: 在澳大利亚新南威尔士州沿海开展900次无人机飞行调查，将实时识别结果与飞行后视频验证结果进行对比分析。统计牛鲨、大白鲨、虎鲨三种目标鲨鱼的误报率、真实流行率与表观流行率，以及对策触发的准确率。
AI.result: 牛鲨、大白鲨、虎鲨的误报率分别为53%、79%和100%；62%实时识别为目标鲨鱼的飞行实际为其他鲨鱼或非鲨鱼物种；25%事后验证的目标鲨鱼在实时中被归为其他/未知鲨鱼；实时分类的目标鲨鱼表观流行率约为真实流行率的2倍；仅36%的对策触发基于正确的目标鲨鱼识别；非鲨鱼物种触发了28次海水撤离。
AI.conclusion: 当前无人机实时鲨鱼识别存在严重的高估和误报问题，导致大量无效对策。需通过集成人工智能辅助识别、使用更高分辨率视频和更大屏幕显示等方式，提高无人机监测系统中鲨鱼检测与识别的实时准确性。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：90%。1）可将本文提出的地面真值验证方法（飞行后视频复核）迁移至遥感影像解译中，建立实时解译与事后精确解译的对比评估框架；2）借鉴其误报率统计方法，评估遥感目标检测（如船舶、油污检测）的误报问题；3）文中提出的AI辅助识别方案可直接应用于遥感领域，如将深度学习模型部署于无人机或卫星边缘端进行实时目标检测；4）可扩展研究不同传感器（多光谱、热红外）对海洋目标识别的影响，减少误报。

title: Multidimensional Asymmetry and Basin-Scale Evolution Patterns of Drought–Flood Abrupt Alternation Across China’s Nine Major River Basins
summary: Under global warming, compound extreme events such as Drought–Flood Abrupt Alternation (DFAA) are becoming increasingly common, yet the structural asymmetry and spatial dynamic evolution between Drought to Flood (D–F) and Flood to Drought (F–D) processes remain under-researched. Using high-resolution daily precipitation data spanning 1961 to 2022 from nine major river basins in China, DFAA events were identified via the Standardized Weighted Average Precipitation (SWAP) index coupled with run theory, and their evolution was analyzed using multidimensional spatiotemporal metrics. Our results reveal a spatial frequency and severity mismatch, where southern basins exhibit high frequency occurrences dominated by slight to moderate events, whereas northern and inland basins experience lower overall frequency but a significantly higher proportion of severe events. Spatial polarity asymmetry is evident, with D–F events dominating nationwide and exceeding 74% in northern and inland basins, while southern humid basins exhibit a more balanced D–F/F–D structure. Temporally, D–F processes involve prolonged moisture accumulation, whereas F–D processes manifest as short-lived post-rainfall moisture deficits. Based on risk trajectories, basins were categorized into four impact patterns: highly oscillatory pattern, intensifying pattern, long-cycle accumulative pattern, and baseline pattern. Ultimately, regional DFAA risks are governed by polarity asymmetry and non-stationary evolution rather than absolute frequency alone, providing a critical scientific basis for basin-specific disaster mitigation strategies under climate change.

AI.tldr: 本研究利用1961–2022年中国九大流域的日降水数据，通过SWAP指数和游程理论识别旱—涝急转事件，揭示了其空间频率与严重程度的不匹配性、南北极性不对称（D–F主导，北方盆地D–F占比超74%）、时间上D–F过程为长期水分累积而F–D为短期水分亏缺，并将流域划分为四种风险模式，指出区域旱—涝急转风险由极性不对称和非平稳演化主导而非绝对频率。
AI.motivation: 全球变暖背景下，复合极端事件如旱—涝急转（DFAA）日益频繁，但旱转涝（D–F）与涝转旱（F–D）过程之间的结构不对称性和空间动态演化仍未得到充分研究。
AI.method: 采用1961–2022年九大流域高分辨率日降水数据，利用标准化加权平均降水指数（SWAP）结合游程理论识别DFAA事件，并使用多维时空指标分析其演变特征。
AI.result: 南方流域高频发但以轻微至中度事件为主，北方和内陆流域低频发但严重事件比例显著更高；D–F事件全国占主导，北方及内陆流域D–F占比超74%；D–F为长期水分累积过程，F–D为短期水分亏缺过程；流域可分为高度振荡型、加剧型、长周期累积型和基线型四种风险模式。
AI.conclusion: 区域旱—涝急转风险主要由极性不对称和非平稳演化决定，而非绝对频率，为气候变化下流域个性化防灾策略提供了科学依据。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：90%。遥感可在以下方面增强该研究：(1) 利用卫星降水产品（如GPM IMERG、TRMM）补充或替代站点降水数据，扩展时空覆盖范围，尤其适用于缺乏密集气象站点的内陆流域；(2) 结合遥感土壤湿度（如SMAP、ESA CCI SM）和蒸散发数据（如MODIS ET），直接观测D–F和F–D过程中的水分动态，验证SWAP指数的物理机制；(3) 利用遥感植被指数（如NDVI、EVI）评估DFAA对生态系统的影响，建立灾害—植被响应模型；(4) 结合多源遥感数据构建旱—涝急转风险预警模型，提升非平稳演化特征的动态监测能力。

title: Farm Topological Map Construction from Road Vector Data for Unmanned Farm Navigation
