AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：85%。该论文为遥感产品验证类研究。改进方向：(1) 可引入地形因子（坡度、坡向、粗糙度等）建立经验校正模型，对ATL08高程进行地形自适应校正；(2) 可结合机器学习方法（如随机森林、XGBoost）融合多源地形特征，提升复杂地形下的高程反演精度；(3) 可扩展至其他星载激光雷达数据（如GEDI、ICESat-2其他产品）的交叉验证与融合应用。

title: A Lightweight Small-Object Detector for UAV Imagery via Multi-Scale Feature Enhancement and Saliency-Guided Cross-Layer Fusion
summary: As unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs) become central to traffic inspection, urban security, and emergency response, UAV-based environmental perception requires both high accuracy and real-time efficiency. However, UAV imagery remains challenging due to three primary factors: detail loss, where small targets occupy minimal pixels and weak edges are diluted by downsampling; ineffective cross-scale fusion, where semantic gaps between shallow and deep features lead to scale misalignment and small-object suppression; and environmental interference, where clutter, occlusion, and dense layouts cause localization drift. To address these challenges, we propose an optimized efficient detector built upon the YOLOv8s framework, incorporating multi-scale feature enhancement and saliency-guided cross-layer fusion. Specifically, we integrate RFCAConv and RGCSP modules into the backbone to strengthen local detail and spatial structure modeling. Furthermore, we design a Multi-Scale Adaptive Fusion Module (MSAFM) to align deep and shallow cues through dual-pooling and adaptive channel recalibration. To handle complex backgrounds, a Saliency-Guided Contextual Attention Module (CASM) is introduced to emphasize target regions, alongside a dynamic detection head for adaptive feature modulation. Evaluated on the VisDrone2019 dataset, our method achieves 48.3% mAP@0.5 and 29.0% mAP@[0.5:0.95], outperforming YOLOv8s by 10.2 and 6.3 points, respectively, while keeping the model compact with 7.2M parameters and a 14.4 MB model size.

AI.tldr: 本文在YOLOv8s框架上提出了一种面向无人机航拍图像的多尺度特征增强与显著性引导跨层融合检测器。通过集成RFCAConv和RGCSP模块增强局部细节与空间结构建模，设计多尺度自适应融合模块(MSAFM)对齐深浅层特征，引入显著性引导上下文注意力模块(CASM)抑制背景干扰，并采用动态检测头进行自适应特征调制。在VisDrone2019数据集上，mAP@0.5达48.3%，mAP@[0.5:0.95]达29.0%，分别超出YOLOv8s 10.2和6.3个百分点，模型参数量仅7.2M，模型大小14.4 MB。
AI.motivation: 无人机航拍图像存在三个关键挑战：小目标细节丢失（弱小边缘被下采样稀释）、跨尺度融合失效（深浅层特征语义鸿沟导致尺度错配和小目标抑制）、环境干扰（杂乱背景、遮挡和密集布局导致定位偏移），现有检测器难以同时满足高精度和实时性要求。
AI.method: 1) 在YOLOv8s骨干网络中引入RFCAConv（感受野通道注意力卷积）和RGCSP模块，增强局部细节和空间结构建模能力；2) 设计多尺度自适应融合模块(MSAFM)，通过双池化和自适应通道重校准对齐深浅层特征；3) 提出显著性引导上下文注意力模块(CASM)，突出目标区域抑制复杂背景干扰；4) 采用动态检测头实现自适应特征调制。
AI.result: 在VisDrone2019数据集上，mAP@0.5达48.3%，mAP@[0.5:0.95]达29.0%，相比YOLOv8s分别提升10.2和6.3个百分点。模型参数量7.2M，模型大小仅14.4 MB，保持轻量化。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过多尺度特征增强与显著性引导跨层融合，有效解决了无人机航拍图像中小目标细节丢失、跨尺度融合失效和背景干扰问题，在保证实时性的同时显著提升检测精度，适用于无人机交通巡检、城市安防和应急响应等场景。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：95%。该论文本身就是针对无人机航拍（属遥感重要分支）的检测优化工作，具有高度的遥感交叉属性。遥感领域的改进方案：1) 将RFCAConv和MSAFM扩展到遥感图像中的旋转目标检测（如Oriented R-CNN框架），以处理遥感图像中任意朝向的目标；2) CASM模块可迁移至遥感图像分割任务，增强地物目标与背景的区分能力；3) 多尺度融合策略可直接用于遥感影像变化检测任务，解决不同时相影像的尺度对齐问题；4) 模型轻量化优势（7.2M参数）适用于星载边缘计算平台。

title: A Spectrally Enhanced Multi-Scale CNN for Limited-Sample Lithological Mapping Using Band-Integrated ASTER and Sentinel-2A Imagery
summary: Lithological mapping with multispectral remote sensing remains challenging when diagnostic spectral information is limited and reliable labeled samples are scarce. This problem is particularly relevant when convolutional neural networks (CNNs) are applied to lithological classification, because limited spectral dimensionality and scarce training samples may hinder the learning of discriminative spatial–spectral features. In this study, we developed a limited-sample lithological mapping framework for the Shibaocheng area of Subei County, Gansu Province, China, using band-integrated ASTER and Sentinel-2A multispectral imagery. ASTER shortwave infrared (SWIR) bands were co-registered and resampled to Sentinel-2A imagery, and then integrated with Sentinel-2A visible and near-infrared (VNIR) and red-edge bands to construct a complementary multispectral dataset. A compact spectrally enhanced multi-scale CNN was designed, incorporating a residual spectral feature enhancement module for inter-band representation learning and a parallel multi-scale hybrid convolution module for capturing spatial–spectral features. Eight lithological units were classified under limited-label conditions using 8158 training samples and 3497 spatially independent validation samples. Experimental results show that the band-integrated ASTER–Sentinel-2A dataset improved classification performance compared with single-sensor inputs. Using the proposed model, the band-integrated dataset achieved an overall accuracy (OA) of 94.12%, average accuracy (AA) of 94.04%, and Kappa coefficient of 0.932, compared with OA values of 93.14% and 92.40% obtained using ASTER and Sentinel-2A alone, respectively. The positive effect of band-level integration was also observed for spectral angle mapper (SAM), support vector machine (SVM), and 3D-CNN, whose OA values increased to 54.33%, 86.12%, and 92.29%, respectively. The proposed CNN achieved the highest OA among the evaluated methods, outperforming SAM, SVM, and the conventional 3D-CNN. In addition, t-SNE visualization indicated that incorporating spatial texture features produced more compact and better-separated lithological clusters than using spectral features alone. Ablation experiments further demonstrated that the proposed spectral feature enhancement and multi-scale hybrid convolution modules each contributed to improving lithological classification performance. These results demonstrate that integrating freely available multispectral data with a lightweight spectral–spatial CNN provides a practical and cost-effective solution for lithological mapping in bedrock-exposed arid to semi-arid regions, especially where hyperspectral imagery and dense field samples are unavailable.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于ASTER与Sentinel-2A波段融合的轻量级光谱-空间CNN框架，在有限样本条件下实现岩性分类，总体精度达94.12%，显著优于单传感器及传统方法。
AI.motivation: 多光谱遥感岩性制图面临光谱信息有限和标记样本稀缺的双重挑战，尤其是CNN在低维光谱和少样本条件下难以学习判别性光谱-空间特征，亟需一种经济有效的解决方案。
AI.method: 将ASTER SWIR波段配准重采样至Sentinel-2A影像，与Sentinel-2A的VNIR和红边波段融合构建互补多光谱数据集；设计紧凑型光谱增强多尺度CNN，包含残差光谱特征增强模块（学习波段间表示）和并行多尺度混合卷积模块（捕获光谱-空间特征）；在甘肃肃北县石包城地区用8158训练样本和3497独立验证样本对8个岩性单元进行分类。
AI.result: 波段融合数据集OA达94.12%，AA 94.04%，Kappa 0.932；单ASTER为93.14%，单Sentinel-2A为92.40%；所提CNN优于SAM(54.33%)、SVM(86.12%)和3D-CNN(92.29%)；t-SNE显示融合空间纹理特征后岩性聚类更紧凑可分；消融实验证实各模块均有贡献。
AI.conclusion: 融合免费多光谱数据与轻量级光谱-空间CNN，在高光谱影像和密集野外样本不可得的干旱-半干旱基岩裸露区，提供了一种实用且成本效益高的岩性制图方案。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：85%。改进方向：(1) 可引入其他免费多光谱数据（如Landsat 8/9的TIR波段）进一步扩展光谱维度；(2) 多尺度卷积模块可替换为更高效的可变形卷积或注意力机制（如CBAM）以提升对不规则地质边界的感知；(3) 残差光谱增强模块可结合波段相关性先验（如主成分分析权重）进行初始化加速收敛；(4) 框架可迁移至其他干旱区岩性制图任务，或扩展用于矿物蚀变信息提取。

title: Beyond NDVI: A Multi-Index Remote Sensing Analysis of Wetland Marsh Recovery Following the Mississippi River Gulf Outlet Closure
summary: We present a 42-year (1984–2025) Landsat consistent satellite vegetation trajectory for coastal wetlands in the Shell Beach area in the Breton Sound estuary, Louisiana. We applied the Controlled Interrupted Time Series (CITS) analysis to the satellite record to quantify the causal effect of the 2009 Mississippi River Gulf Outlet (MRGO) closure on the coastal wetland vegetation. The analysis used NDVI, kNDVI, and NDII across 88 vegetation transect plots located within five Coastal Reference and Monitoring Systems (CRMS) stations in the Shell Beach wetlands. Vegetation communities identified included Saline, Brackish, Freshwater, and Intermediate marsh. Sentinel-2 data from 2015 to 2025 were retained as an independent parallel record for NDRE analysis only. Quarterly median composites were decomposed using the Seasonal-Trend decomposition using LOESS (STL) to isolate de-seasonalized vegetation anomalies. The CITS design used segmented Ordinary Least Squares (OLS) regression with Newey–West HAC standard errors (lag = 3) at the study area. Northern Barataria Bay was used as an untreated regional control site to remove concurrent climate and sea level rise confounders. Whilst Hurricane Katrina and subsequent years (2005–2008) were excluded from the models, the single group ITS identified significant negative post-closure slope change across three indices. These were NDVI (β3 = −0.0034 yr−1, p = 0.000), NDII (β3 = −0.0032 yr−1), and kNDVI (β3 = −0.0016 yr−1). These values indicated continued site-level decline relative to the pre-closure trend. Community-stratified ITS analysis showed a distinct divergent pattern with Freshwater marshes demonstrating significant recovery, with NDVI β3 = +0.0190 yr−1, p = 0.000, whilst Saline, Brackish, and Intermediate communities continued to decline. CITS Difference-in-Differences (DiD) confirmed that site-level NDII and kNDVI declines were MRGO-specific. The DiD findings were that NDII = −0.00313 yr−1, p < 0.001; kNDVI = −0.00123 yr−1, p = 0.008. These findings isolated that physiological water stress and the non-linear biomass losses were a result of the MRGO-closure. The Freshwater DiD for NDVI (+0.02071 yr−1, p = 0.000) was the strongest evidence of MRGO-specific recovery. Barataria Freshwater declined, whilst the Shell Beach Freshwater recovered. The results demonstrated that multi-index decadal Landsat monitoring with seasonal decomposition and full inter-sensor harmonization is essential for restoration trajectory assessment in managed coastal wetlands.

AI.tldr: 本文利用42年（1984-2025）Landsat卫星数据，结合控制中断时间序列（CITS）分析，评估了2009年密西西比河海湾出口（MRGO）关闭对路易斯安那州Shell Beach沿海湿地植被的因果影响。研究发现，总体植被持续下降，但淡水沼泽显著恢复，生理水分胁迫和非线性生物量损失与MRGO关闭直接相关。
AI.motivation: 量化2009年MRGO关闭对沿海湿地植被的因果效应，区分人为干预与气候/海平面上升等自然因素的影响，为滨海湿地恢复轨迹评估提供科学依据。
AI.method: 采用42年Landsat时序数据，计算NDVI、kNDVI、NDII、NDRE等植被指数；使用STL分解季度中值复合影像以去季节化；应用CITS分析（单组ITS和CITS-DiD），结合Newey-West HAC标准误差（滞后=3）；以北Barataria湾为未处理对照区消除混杂因素；按盐水、半咸水、淡水、过渡四种沼泽类型进行分层分析。
AI.result: 单组ITS显示NDVI（β3=-0.0034/年）、NDII（β3=-0.0032/年）、kNDVI（β3=-0.0016/年）显著负向斜率变化。分层分析显示淡水沼泽显著恢复（NDVI β3=+0.0190/年），而盐水、半咸水、过渡沼泽持续下降。CITS-DiD确认NDII（-0.00313/年）和kNDVI（-0.00123/年）下降是MRGO专属的；淡水沼泽NDVI DiD为+0.02071/年，显示MRGO关闭后特定恢复。
AI.conclusion: 多年多指数Landsat监测结合季节分解和传感器间谐波处理，对于评估管理下的沿海湿地恢复轨迹至关重要。MRGO关闭导致总体植被下降，但淡水沼泽呈现显著恢复，表明不同植被群落对水文干预的响应存在差异。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：75%。改进方案：（1）可引入SAR数据（如Sentinel-1）监测湿地水文变化，与光学指数互补；（2）可结合高光谱遥感和机器学习（如随机森林、LSTM）提升植被群落分类精度；（3）方法上可扩展到中国滨海湿地（如黄河口、长江口），评估围垦或生态补水工程的长期植被效应；（4）可引入GEE平台实现大规模自动化处理，提高方法可迁移性。

title: Environmental Controls and Transition of the Baige Landslide Deformation Revealed by Time-Series Remote Sensing Observations
summary: High-altitude rock slides frequently occur in the high-mountain canyon regions of the eastern Tibetan Plateau, posing significant disaster risks. The Baige landslide catastrophically failed in October 2018, blocking the Jinsha River and forming a major landslide-dammed lake. However, quantitative understanding of the spatiotemporal evolution and environmental control mechanisms remains insufficient, particularly regarding stage-dependent driving mechanisms. This study investigates the Baige landslide using mall Baseline Subset Interferometric Synthetic Aperture Radar (SBAS-InSAR), Seasonal-Trend decomposition based on Loess (STL) time-series decomposition, Principal Component Analysis–Independent Component Analysis (PCA-ICA) signal analysis, and slope-unit spatial statistics. Results indicate that: (1) deformation exhibited three stages separated by October 2018: slow pre-slide deformation, post-slide residual creep, and long-term sustained acceleration; (2) instability caused systematic restructuring of the deformation field, with valid pixels decreasing from 2766 to 560, deformation changing from slight positive line-of-sight (LOS) displacement to pronounced negative LOS displacement, and global standard deviation increasing from 21.40 mm to 40.55 mm, with stronger disturbances in the steep front zone; and (3) the driving mechanism shifted from short-term multi-factor control to a temperature-dominated long-term environmental control regime after failure, while gravity-driven creep and post-failure structural adjustment remained important background controls. Slope fragmentation and structural reorganization likely contributed to this transition.

AI.tldr: 本研究利用SBAS-InSAR、STL时间序列分解、PCA-ICA信号分析和斜坡单元空间统计等方法，量化分析了青藏高原东缘白格滑坡的时空演化特征及环境控制机制。结果表明滑坡变形呈现三个阶段（缓慢滑动、残余蠕变、长期加速），失稳导致变形场系统性重构，驱动机制从短期多因素控制转变为以温度为主的长期环境控制，重力蠕变和结构重组为重要背景因素。
AI.motivation: 高海拔岩质滑坡在青藏高原东部高山峡谷区频繁发生，造成重大灾害风险。2018年10月白格滑坡堵塞金沙江形成堰塞湖，但对滑坡时空演化和环境控制机制的定量理解仍不充分，特别是缺乏对阶段依赖驱动机制的认识。
AI.method: 采用小基线子集干涉合成孔径雷达（SBAS-InSAR）、基于Loess的季节-趋势分解（STL）时间序列分解、主成分分析-独立成分分析（PCA-ICA）信号分析以及斜坡单元空间统计等多种方法进行综合研究。
AI.result: (1) 变形呈现三个阶段：2018年10月前的缓慢滑动、失稳后残余蠕变、长期持续加速；(2) 失稳导致变形场系统性重构，有效像素从2766降至560，变形从轻微正LOS位移变为显著负LOS位移，全局标准差从21.40 mm增至40.55 mm，陡坡前缘扰动更强；(3) 驱动机制从短期多因素控制转变为失稳后以温度为主的长期环境控制，重力蠕变和结构重组为重要背景因素。
AI.conclusion: 白格滑坡的时空演化具有明显的阶段性特征，失稳后驱动机制发生根本性转变，斜坡破碎化和结构重组可能是这一转变的关键原因。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：85%。该论文本身就是遥感（InSAR）应用于滑坡监测的典范。改进方案：(1) 可引入多源遥感数据（如光学影像的偏移量追踪、无人机LiDAR）以弥补InSAR在高变形区的失相干问题；(2) 结合深度学习模型（如LSTM、Transformer）对STL分解后的趋势分量进行更精准的预测；(3) 将PCA-ICA分析与外部环境因子（气象、水文）进行多变量耦合，构建更完善的滑坡演化物理模型；(4) 拓展到区域尺度，利用Sentinel-1宽幅数据对青藏高原东缘其他潜在高危滑坡进行类似分析。

title: From Detection to Functional Analysis: Evaluating Vehicle Detection Models in High-Resolution Earth Observation Imagery
summary: The rapid development of deep learning methods has significantly improved the effectiveness of object detection in Earth Observation (EO) imagery. However, standard metrics such as Mean Average Precision (mAP) do not fully reflect their utility in operational analyses. This paper proposes a multi-stage methodology for evaluating vehicle detection models, combining classical evaluation with functional analysis encompassing object counting, density estimation, and occupancy index. The research was conducted on high-resolution imagery (WorldView, Pleiades) and the xView dataset, evaluating five YOLO variants alongside transformer-based and two-stage detectors under three training strategies, including fine-tuning. The results show that models achieving high mAP values (up to 0.952) can simultaneously produce significant errors in object count estimation. Models trained exclusively on xView exhibit a substantial performance drop (mAP@0.50 ≈ 0.45) under domain shift conditions. The best results were obtained using a fusion-based approach combining YOLOv9 and YOLOv12, which reduced the mean relative error to 0.14 and the counting error to 13 objects, maintaining a low density error (0.0023). Functional validation across 20 parking areas confirmed the stability of the proposed approach. The findings confirm that functional analysis constitutes a critical complement to classical evaluation in remote sensing applications.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合经典评估与功能分析（目标计数、密度估计、占用指数）的多阶段车辆检测模型评估方法。在WorldView、Pleiades和xView数据集上评估了YOLO系列、Transformer和两阶段检测器，发现高mAP模型在计数任务中仍存在显著误差，而融合YOLOv9与YOLOv12的方法在功能指标上表现最佳，证实功能分析是遥感应用中经典评估的关键补充。
AI.motivation: 标准指标如mAP无法充分反映目标检测模型在地球观测影像实际任务（如目标计数、密度估计）中的效用，需要更全面的评估框架。
AI.method: 提出多阶段评估方法：1）经典评估（mAP）；2）功能分析（目标计数误差、密度估计误差、占用指数）；在WorldView、Pleiades高分辨率影像和xView数据集上，评估五种YOLO变体、基于Transformer的检测器和两阶段检测器，采用三种训练策略（含微调），并提出YOLOv9+YOLOv12融合方法。
AI.result: 高mAP（最高0.952）模型在计数中仍有显著误差；xView训练模型在域偏移下mAP@0.50降至约0.45；YOLOv9与YOLOv12融合方法最优：平均相对误差0.14，计数误差13个目标，密度误差0.0023；20个停车区域的验证证实了稳定性。
AI.conclusion: 功能分析是遥感检测任务中经典评估的关键补充，仅依赖mAP不足以评估模型实际应用能力。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：95%。本文本身就是遥感车辆检测评估论文，可直接应用于遥感场景。改进方向：1）将功能分析框架推广到其他遥感目标（如船只、建筑物、农田）的评估；2）在多模态遥感数据（SAR+光学）中引入功能评估；3）结合地理空间上下文信息改进密度估计精度；4）探索更高效的模型融合策略以平衡计算开销与功能指标。

title: An In Situ Calibration Method for Antenna Parameters of S-Band Dual-Polarization Weather Radar Based on High-Density Solar Sector Scans
summary: The calibration accuracy of key weather radar antenna parameters, including beam pointing, beamwidth, and antenna gain, directly affects quantitative precipitation estimation (QPE) and multi-radar network products. Conventional calibration approaches such as external field beacons and far-field tests are often constrained by site conditions and high implementation costs, making them difficult to apply routinely in operational radar networks. To address this limitation, this study proposes a robust solar calibration method for key antenna parameters of weather radars based on a dedicated Volume Coverage Pattern for Sun calibration, hereafter referred to as VCPSun. The proposed method uses a high-density solar scanning strategy with midpoint time alignment and feed-forward control of solar apparent motion. Combined with solar sample identification, propagation path correction, two-dimensional Gaussian surface fitting, and deconvolution of solar-source broadening and scan-smearing effects, the method enables reliability retrieval of beam pointing, beamwidth, and antenna gain. A high-frequency intensive observing experiment was conducted using a China New Generation Weather Radar, model SA-D (CINRAD/SA-D), deployed at the Changsha Meteorological Radar Calibration Center, with independent far-field test results used for validation. The results show that the retention rate of quality-controlled solar samples reached 85.7%, supporting stable reconstruction of the main-lobe power pattern. The retrieved mean beam pointing biases for both polarizations were within ±0.05°. After correction, the relative differences in beamwidth with respect to far-field measurements were respectively 3.26% and 1.52% for the H-polarization azimuth and elevation directions and 2.09% and 1.84% for the V-polarization azimuth and elevation directions, with the overall mean relative difference being less than 3.5%. The antenna gain differences relative to the independent far-field reference values were within 0.2 dB, at −0.062 dB for H-polarization and −0.144 dB for V-polarization. Comparative analysis with historical one-dimensional SunCheck records and an ablation test of the beamwidth correction chain further demonstrate that high-density two-dimensional sampling and physical deconvolution corrections improve the robustness and quantitative accuracy of the solar-based retrieval. These results demonstrate the feasibility of reliable in situ calibration of key antenna parameters for operational weather radars. The proposed method provides a potential technical pathway for in situ quantitative assessment of antenna performance in S-band CINRAD/SA-D radars, although further validation using additional radars and longer observation periods is required prior to network-wide application.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于专用太阳扫描模式（VCPSun）的天气雷达天线参数校准方法，通过高密度太阳扫描、中点时间对齐、前馈控制太阳视运动、太阳样本识别、传播路径修正、二维高斯面拟合以及去卷积校正等技术，实现了波束指向、波束宽度和天线增益的可靠反演。在长沙CINRAD/SA-D雷达上的实验结果表明，波束指向偏差在±0.05°以内，波束宽度相对差异小于3.5%，天线增益差异在0.2 dB以内，验证了该方法用于业务雷达原位校准的可行性。
AI.motivation: 传统天气雷达天线参数校准方法（如外场信标和远场测试）受场址条件限制且实施成本高，难以在业务雷达网络中常规应用，亟需一种低成本、易实施的原位校准方法。
AI.method: 提出VCPSun专用太阳扫描模式，采用高密度太阳扫描策略、中点时间对齐与前馈太阳视运动控制；结合太阳样本识别、传播路径修正、二维高斯面拟合及太阳源展宽与扫描涂抹效应的去卷积校正，实现波束指向、波束宽度和天线增益的可靠性反演。
AI.result: 质控太阳样本保留率85.7%；双偏振波束指向偏差均在±0.05°以内；H极化方位和仰角波束宽度相对差异分别为3.26%和1.52%，V极化分别为2.09%和1.84%，总体均值小于3.5%；天线增益差异H极化为−0.062 dB，V极化为−0.144 dB，均在0.2 dB以内。
AI.conclusion: 该方法实现了业务天气雷达天线关键参数可靠的原位校准，为S波段CINRAD/SA-D雷达天线性能的原位定量评估提供了潜在技术路径，但需在更多雷达和更长观测周期上进一步验证。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：95%。该太阳校准方法可直接应用于星载或机载合成孔径雷达（SAR）天线方向图原位监测，特别是对于大型抛物面天线，可移植VCPSun的高密度扫描与二维高斯拟合去卷积策略。此外，遥感卫星地面接收站的天线指向校准也可借鉴该思路，利用已知射电源（如太阳或月亮）进行常规化原位校准，降低对专用信标塔的依赖。在气象遥感领域，该方法可扩展至X波段或C波段双偏振雷达网络的统一校准，提升组网定量降水估计的一致性。

title: Diffusion-Driven Relative Radiometric Normalization with Spatial–Spectral Attention Residual Network for Multi-Temporal Remote Sensing Imagery
summary: Relative radiometric normalization (RRN) is fundamental to multi-temporal remote sensing analysis; however, conventional techniques often struggle with nonlinear distortions, outlier contamination, and heterogeneous land-cover conditions. To address these challenges, we propose a diffusion-based probabilistic framework that models radiometric inconsistency as a combination of deterministic residuals and stochastic perturbations. In this framework, the forward process injects structured noise and stochastic perturbations, while the reverse process restores radiometric consistency through a dual-objective variational formulation. At the core of this framework is a spatial–spectral attention residual network (SSARN), which integrates residual learning with dual attention mechanisms to capture cross-band dependencies and multi-scale spatial context. A preprocessing stage guided by the structural similarity index (SSIM) further enhances robustness by automatically selecting stable pseudo-invariant regions for model training. Comprehensive experiments on multi-temporal Sentinel-2 datasets demonstrate that the proposed method consistently outperforms existing approaches, achieving higher accuracy and enhanced spectral fidelity. Moreover, the framework ensures greater consistency of the normalized difference vegetation index (NDVI) and preserves fine-grained textural details, underscoring its potential as a scalable and resilient solution for large-scale RRN in remote sensing applications.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于扩散概率模型的相对辐射归一化（RRN）框架，通过双目标变分公式和前向/反向过程建模辐射不一致性，核心是空间-光谱注意力残差网络（SSARN），在 Sentinel-2 多时相数据集上优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有相对辐射归一化（RRN）方法在处理非线性畸变、异常值污染和异质地表覆盖条件时存在困难，缺乏鲁棒且可扩展的解决方案。
AI.method: 1) 扩散概率框架：前向过程注入结构化噪声与随机扰动，反向过程通过双目标变分公式恢复辐射一致性；2) 空间-光谱注意力残差网络（SSARN）：融合残差学习与双注意力机制，捕获跨波段依赖与多尺度空间上下文；3) 基于结构相似性指数（SSIM）的预处理阶段自动选择稳定伪不变区域进行训练。
AI.result: 在多时相 Sentinel-2 数据集上，所提方法在精度和光谱保真度上一致优于现有方法，NDVI 一致性和细粒度纹理细节保持能力更强。
AI.conclusion: 该扩散概率框架是一种可扩展且鲁棒的 RRN 解决方案，适用于大规模遥感应用。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：90%。该论文本身就是遥感领域的相对辐射归一化方法。改进方向：1) 可尝试将 SSARN 中的双注意力机制替换为更高效的状态空间模型（如 Mamba），以降低计算开销；2) 扩散过程的噪声调度可针对不同传感器的辐射特性进行自适应设计；3) 预处理阶段的 SSIM 引导伪不变区域选择可与无监督对比学习结合，减少人工标注依赖；4) 该框架可扩展至其他辐射处理任务，如大气校正或传感器间归一化。

title: Anchor-Level Spectral–Spatial Graph Clustering for Hyperspectral Images
summary: Hyperspectral image (HSI) clustering aims to partition pixels into distinct clusters by leveraging spectral and spatial features, thereby providing crucial support for the interpretation and information extraction of hyperspectral data. However, due to high spectral variability, complex spatial distribution, and noise interference, HSI clustering still faces considerable challenges. Graph-based clustering represents a prominent learning framework and achieves competitive performance on HSI analysis. However, most existing methods ignore spatial information and suffer from high computational cost, rendering them incapable of effectively dealing with large-scale HSIs. To address the aforementioned challenges, this paper proposes an anchor-level spectral–spatial graph clustering (ASSGC) model for HSIs. The proposed ASSGC employs a band-wise median strategy within each superpixel to generate representative anchors to suppress noise and outlier effects. A novel distance metric is designed to integrate spectral features and spatial positions to effectively identify neighbors and construct a spectral–spatial joint affinity matrix at the anchor-level, thereby reducing computational burden and memory consumption. Subsequently, spectral clustering is applied to obtain anchor labels, which are propagated to the corresponding superpixels to achieve full-image clustering. Experiments on four HSI datasets yield ACC of 64.13% on Indian Pines, 71.33% on Pavia University, 87.86% on Salinas, and 99.23% on Salinas A, demonstrating that the proposed ASSGC outperforms several existing state-of-the-art methods while maintaining low time complexity.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于锚点的谱-空间图聚类（ASSGC）模型用于高光谱图像聚类。该方法在超像素内采用波段中值策略生成代表性锚点以抑制噪声，设计融合光谱特征与空间位置的距离度量构建锚点级联合亲和矩阵，通过谱聚类获取锚点标签并传播至全图。在四个数据集上取得了优于现有方法的聚类性能，同时保持了较低的时间复杂度。
AI.motivation: 高光谱图像聚类面临光谱变异大、空间分布复杂及噪声干扰等挑战，现有基于图的聚类方法忽略空间信息且计算成本高，难以有效处理大规模HSI数据。
AI.method: 1）超像素内波段中值策略生成代表性锚点抑制噪声和异常值影响；2）设计融合光谱特征与空间位置的新型距离度量，在锚点级构建谱-空间联合亲和矩阵；3）对锚点进行谱聚类得到标签，并传播至对应超像素实现全图聚类。
AI.result: 在Indian Pines、Pavia University、Salinas和Salinas A上分别取得64.13%、71.33%、87.86%和99.23%的聚类精度，优于多种现有方法且时间复杂度低。
AI.conclusion: ASSGC通过锚点级图构建有效降低了计算负担和内存消耗，同时引入空间信息提升了聚类性能，为大规模高光谱图像聚类提供了一种高效可行的方案。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：95%。改进方案：1）锚点生成策略可结合自适应超像素分割方法（如SLIC改进版）以更好适应地物边界；2）距离度量可引入多尺度空间信息（如多窗口半径）以增强对异质地物的区分能力；3）可扩展为半监督框架，利用少量标定样本引导锚点选择；4）联合亲和矩阵的构建可引入深度学习特征（如自编码器提取的深层光谱特征）替代原始光谱特征，进一步提升聚类鲁棒性。

title: A Deep Learning-Based Method for Enhancing the Signal-to-Noise Ratio of Star Sensor Images
summary: In window tracking mode, stray light and detector readout noise can submerge star spot signals in star sensor images. The resulting degradation reduces centroid extraction accuracy and may even cause extraction failure, thereby preventing precise attitude determination. This study uses the self-supervised spatiotemporal denoising model ASTERIS as the baseline. ASTERIS integrates 3D spatiotemporal inputs with a global attention mechanism for joint noise modeling, thereby providing stronger denoising and restoration capability than conventional methods such as multi-frame stacking. However, ASTERIS lacks adaptive compensation for subpixel jitter in on-orbit star images and has difficulty preserving the high-frequency morphology of star spots, affecting denoising performance and centroiding accuracy. To address these limitations, this study introduces two improvements: First, frame-by-frame spatial deformable convolution is incorporated into the decoder upsampling stage to adaptively compensate for subpixel offsets, actively suppress background noise, and lower the parameter count. Second, a complex-valued frequency domain loss with a high-frequency weighted mask is designed to jointly constrain the amplitude and phase spectra, thereby preserving high-frequency star spot details. Experimental results show that, for star images with extremely low signal-to-noise ratios, the proposed method improves the peak signal-to-noise ratio by approximately 17.8 dB and reduces the centroid localization error to approximately 0.1 pixels. This performance is substantially better than that of the original ASTERIS model, which improves the peak signal-to-noise ratio by approximately 9.5 dB and yields an error of approximately 0.4 pixels, and the multi-frame stacking method, which improves the peak signal-to-noise ratio by approximately 6.0 dB and yields an error of approximately 0.5 pixels. Under the simulated strong noise conditions considered in this study, the proposed method achieves effective centroid extraction, demonstrating its potential for on-orbit star sensor data processing. Future work will further address its engineering deployment.

AI.tldr: 本文针对星敏感器在窗口跟踪模式下因杂散光和读出噪声导致星点信号被淹没的问题，基于自监督时空去噪模型ASTERIS进行改进。通过引入逐帧空间可变形卷积和复数域频率损失（含高频加权掩码），实现亚像素抖动自适应补偿和高频星点细节保持。实验表明，在极低信噪比下，所提方法PSNR提升约17.8 dB，质心定位误差约0.1像素，显著优于ASTERIS（9.5 dB, 0.4像素）和多帧叠加（6.0 dB, 0.5像素）。
AI.motivation: 星敏感器在窗口跟踪模式下，杂散光与探测器读出噪声会淹没星点信号，导致质心提取精度下降甚至失败，进而影响姿态确定。现有ASTERIS模型虽具备强去噪能力，但缺乏对在轨星图亚像素抖动的自适应补偿，且难以保持星点高频形态，限制了去噪性能和质心定位精度。
AI.method: （1）在解码器上采样阶段引入逐帧空间可变形卷积（frame-by-frame spatial deformable convolution），自适应补偿亚像素偏移并抑制背景噪声，同时降低参数量；（2）设计复数域频率损失（complex-valued frequency domain loss）并配以高频加权掩码，联合约束幅度谱与相位谱，以保留星点高频细节。
AI.result: 极低信噪比星图下，所提方法PSNR提升约17.8 dB，质心定位误差约0.1像素；原ASTERIS模型PSNR提升约9.5 dB，误差约0.4像素；多帧叠加方法PSNR提升约6.0 dB，误差约0.5像素。所提方法在模拟强噪声条件下实现了有效的质心提取。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法在极低信噪比条件下显著优于ASTERIS和多帧叠加方法，具备在轨星敏感器数据处理的潜力，未来工作将进一步解决工程部署问题。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：95%。本文本身就是星敏感器在轨数据处理（遥感姿态确定核心组件）的论文，可直接视作遥感交叉研究成果。改进方案：（1）可进一步将可变形卷积替换为轻量化版本（如DCNv3）以降低星上计算资源消耗；（2）复数域频率损失可推广至遥感图像超分辨率重建（如卫星影像）和去云去雾任务；（3）该自监督时空去噪框架可迁移至遥感视频序列（如星载视频卫星）的时域去噪与目标跟踪。

title: Prior-Informed Local Landslide Susceptibility Modelling Using National-Scale Landslide Information: A Case Study of the Parlung Tsangpo Alpine Gorge Basin
authors: Z H E N G M Jiang
summary: Landslides pose widespread threats to mountainous communities and infrastructure worldwide, yet susceptibility mapping in alpine gorge basins is often constrained by sparse and incomplete local inventories. Whether national-scale landslide information can be transformed into reliable local knowledge remains unclear, particularly where strong topographic and environmental heterogeneity limits the direct transfer of broad-scale models. Here, we use the Parlung Tsangpo Basin on the southeastern Tibetan Plateau as a test case and compare four strategies for introducing national-scale information: local baseline modelling, direct national-model transfer, weighted source–target joint training, and prior-informed local modelling. The experiments use the same conditioning factors, data-processing workflow, spatially independent test set, and evaluation metrics, allowing the transfer strategies to be assessed under controlled conditions. The prior-informed strategy treats the susceptibility probability produced by the national model as a geoscientifically interpretable external prior, which is then relearned and recalibrated by local samples, and achieves the best overall performance. On the independent test set, it reaches an area under the receiver operating characteristic curve (AUC) of 0.901 and reduces the expected calibration error (ECE) to 0.055, outperforming the local baseline, direct transfer, and joint training strategies. Its susceptibility map shows an extensive low-susceptibility background with spatially concentrated high-susceptibility patches, thereby reducing broad-scale overprediction while preserving local landslide-prone zones. These results indicate that national-scale landslide information is more effective when converted into a locally recalibrated probability prior than when transferred directly, providing a practical pathway for susceptibility assessment in data-scarce mountainous basins.

AI.tldr: 本研究以青藏高原东南部帕隆藏布流域为案例，检验了四种将国家尺度滑坡信息迁移到局部区域（高山峡谷流域）进行易发性制图的策略。结果表明，将国家模型输出的易发性概率作为地质可解释的外部先验，再通过局部样本重新学习与校准的“先验信息引导策略”表现最佳（AUC=0.901，ECE=0.055），优于局部基线建模、直接迁移和加权源-目标联合训练，有效解决了数据稀疏流域的滑坡易发性制图问题。
AI.motivation: 高山峡谷流域的滑坡易发性制图常受限于稀疏且不完整的局部编录数据，而国家尺度的滑坡信息是否能在强地形与环境异质性条件下转化为可靠的局部知识尚不明确。本文旨在探索如何有效利用国家尺度信息来改善数据匮乏区域的滑坡易发性评估。
AI.method: 以帕隆藏布流域为测试案例，比较四种引入国家尺度信息的策略：(1)局部基线建模，(2)国家模型直接迁移，(3)加权源-目标联合训练，(4)先验信息引导局部建模。实验采用相同的 conditioning factors、数据处理流程、空间独立测试集和评估指标。先验信息引导策略将国家模型输出的易发性概率作为外部先验，由局部样本进行重新学习与校准。
AI.result: 先验信息引导策略在独立测试集上AUC达0.901，期望校准误差（ECE）降至0.055，均优于其他三种策略。其生成的易发性图呈现大面积低易发性背景与空间集中的高易发性斑块，减少了大范围过度预测同时保留了局部滑坡易发区。
AI.conclusion: 国家尺度滑坡信息以局部再校准的概率先验形式使用比直接迁移更有效，为数据稀缺的山地流域易发性评估提供了一条实用路径。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：95%。该策略可直接应用于遥感数据驱动的滑坡易发性制图：1）利用InSAR、光学遥感（如Sentinel-2、高分系列）解译的国家尺度滑坡编录构建初始模型；2）将先验信息引导策略与遥感-derived conditioning factors（地形、植被指数、地质构造等）结合，实现局部校准；3）可进一步引入遥感时序分析（如SBAS-InSAR）获取地表形变信息作为动态先验，提升模型对当前活跃滑坡的响应能力；4）该框架同样适用于遥感数据匮乏的其他领域（如地震滑坡、泥石流易发性）的跨区域知识迁移。

title: A Vertically Structured Machine Learning Approach for Cloud Liquid and Ice Water Content Profiling
summary: Accurate retrieval of cloud liquid water content (LWC) and ice water content (IWC) vertical profiles remains limited by strong vertical variability and nonlinear dependencies among observed variables. Ground-based cloud radar reflectivity and microwave radiometer-derived thermodynamic profiles provide complementary constraints, but their joint use requires consistent time–height matching and bias-controlled predictors. This study develops a vertically structured machine-learning framework that explicitly represents profile-level dependencies by constructing vertical-structure-enhanced features to encode local gradients and contextual information, integrating multiple tree-based learners with heterogeneous configurations through a profile-aware stacking strategy, and introducing a profile-level refinement step to suppress layer-to-layer inconsistencies. The framework is evaluated using year-round Cloudnet observations from the Lindenberg site, where IWC RMSE decreases from 0.0152 g m−3 to 0.0092 g m−3 with R2 increasing from 0.412 to 0.784, and LWC RMSE decreases from 0.0786 g m−3 to 0.0591 g m−3 with R2 increasing from 0.303 to 0.606. Additional boundary-region evaluation shows that the improvement is particularly evident near radar-derived cloud boundaries, where cloud structure and hydrometeor content may vary rapidly with height. These results indicate that treating cloud retrieval as a vertically structured learning problem reduces inconsistencies inherent in pointwise models and establishes a data-driven baseline for incorporating vertical constraints into atmospheric profile retrieval.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种垂直结构化的机器学习框架，通过构建垂直结构增强特征、异构树模型集成和廓线级精化步骤，显著提升了云液态水含量（LWC）和冰水含量（IWC）垂直廓线的反演精度，在Cloudnet观测数据上IWC的RMSE从0.0152降至0.0092 g m−3，R²从0.412提升至0.784。
AI.motivation: 云液态水含量和冰水含量垂直廓线的反演受限于强垂直变率和非线性依赖关系，现有逐点模型无法有效利用垂直结构信息，导致廓线反演存在层间不一致性和精度瓶颈。
AI.method: 提出垂直结构化机器学习框架：(1) 构建垂直结构增强特征，编码局部梯度和上下文信息；(2) 集成多种异构树基学习器，采用廓线感知的堆叠策略；(3) 引入廓线级精化步骤抑制层间不一致性。输入为地基云雷达反射率和微波辐射计热力学廓线。
AI.result: 基于Lindenberg站点全年Cloudnet观测数据评估：IWC的RMSE从0.0152降至0.0092 g m−3，R²从0.412提升至0.784；LWC的RMSE从0.0786降至0.0591 g m−3，R²从0.303提升至0.606。边界区域改进尤为显著。
AI.conclusion: 将云反演视为垂直结构化学习问题可有效减少逐点模型固有的不一致性，为在大气廓线反演中融入垂直约束建立了数据驱动的基线方法。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：95%。该框架可直接迁移至遥感领域的大气廓线反演问题，具体方案：(1) 将垂直结构增强特征应用于卫星遥感气溶胶/水汽廓线反演，解决层间不一致问题；(2) 廓线感知堆叠策略可用于多源遥感数据（如GPM星载雷达与被动微波）的联合反演；(3) 廓线级精化步骤可抑制遥感产品中常见的垂直锯齿伪影；(4) 该框架可扩展至云冰路径/液态水路径（IWP/LWP）的柱总量与垂直分布协同反演。

title: MIGA-Net: A Graph Interaction and Gated Context Network for High-Resolution Remote Sensing Change Detection
summary: Remote sensing change detection (CD) aims to localize land-surface changes from bi-temporal imagery and plays an important role in applications such as urban monitoring, disaster assessment, and environmental analysis. In high-resolution scenarios, CD performance is often degraded by cross-temporal appearance inconsistency, large variations in target scale, and boundary ambiguity introduced during multi-level decoding. To address these challenges, we propose MIGA-Net, an end-to-end framework that jointly models spatio-temporal interaction, adaptive multi-scale context aggregation, and hierarchical boundary refinement. Specifically, the Spatio-Temporal Graph Interaction Module (ST-GIM) combines interactive attention and graph reasoning to suppress pseudo-changes caused by illumination or seasonal shifts; the Adaptive Gated Context Pyramid Module (AGCP) performs content-driven scale selection and regulates context injection through a gated residual mechanism to reduce noise amplification; and the Hierarchical Boundary-Aware Refinement Module (HBAR) integrates semantic channel filtering and explicit boundary attention for progressive contour recovery. Experiments on LEVIR-CD, WHU-CD, and SYSU-CD demonstrate that MIGA-Net achieves F1 scores of 91.84%, 92.52%, and 82.92%, and IoU scores of 84.91%, 86.08%, and 70.83%, respectively. The proposed method yields consistent improvements in both quantitative metrics and structural boundary quality, indicating its effectiveness for robust pseudo-change suppression and structurally faithful prediction in high-resolution remote sensing CD.

AI.tldr: MIGA-Net是一个端到端的遥感变化检测框架，通过时空图交互模块(ST-GIM)、自适应门控上下文金字塔模块(AGCP)和层次化边界感知细化模块(HBAR)分别解决伪变化抑制、多尺度上下文聚合和边界模糊问题，在LEVIR-CD、WHU-CD和SYSU-CD三个数据集上取得了最优结果。
AI.motivation: 高分辨率遥感变化检测面临三个挑战：跨时相外观不一致性（光照/季节变化导致伪变化）、目标尺度差异大、多层级解码中的边界模糊问题。现有方法难以同时解决这三个问题。
AI.method: 提出MIGA-Net，包含三个核心模块：1) 时空图交互模块(ST-GIM)：结合交互注意力与图推理，抑制光照/季节引起的伪变化；2) 自适应门控上下文金字塔模块(AGCP)：内容驱动的尺度选择，通过门控残差机制调节上下文注入，减少噪声放大；3) 层次化边界感知细化模块(HBAR)：融合语义通道滤波与显式边界注意力，实现渐进式轮廓恢复。
AI.result: 在LEVIR-CD上F1=91.84%、IoU=84.91%；WHU-CD上F1=92.52%、IoU=86.08%；SYSU-CD上F1=82.92%、IoU=70.83%。在定量指标和边界质量上均取得一致提升。
AI.conclusion: MIGA-Net通过联合建模时空交互、自适应多尺度上下文聚合和层次化边界细化，有效抑制了伪变化并实现了结构保真的预测，验证了其在高分辨率遥感变化检测中的有效性。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：95%。改进方向：1) ST-GIM中的图推理可引入超图卷积或多尺度图结构，增强对复杂地物关系的建模能力；2) AGCP模块可结合可变形卷积或注意力权重的显式尺度监督，进一步提升尺度适应性；3) HBAR可引入边缘损失或轮廓拓扑约束，增强边界连续性；4) 可扩展为时序遥感变化检测（多时相输入），将ST-GIM泛化为时空图序列建模；5) 结合对比学习或自监督预训练，减少对标注数据的依赖。

title: Assessing the Reliability of Sentinel-2 for Turbidity Estimation in a Shallow Coastal Lagoon
summary: Understanding turbidity in coastal systems is essential to ensure the sustainable management of these ecosystems, which are increasingly under pressure from natural factors and human activities. Thus, this study aims to develop a local Sentinel-2-based turbidity model for the Aveiro lagoon (Portugal) by combining Sentinel-2 records with in situ measurements. A field campaign synchronized with a Sentinel-2 overpass was conducted across the lagoon channels on 28 May 2025, to capture spatial variability by measuring near-surface turbidity and Secchi depth, for correspondence with the spectral records of satellite. Remote Sensing Reflectance (Rrs) and turbidity were derived using various algorithms integrated within the ACOLITE software (v20250114.0). Additionally, new turbidity models were developed and empirically adjusted based on the Rrs data, with their performance quantified through the coefficient of determination (R2) and Root Mean Square Error (RMSE). The results showed that the existing algorithms are not directly suitable for the Aveiro lagoon, as they underestimate the highest turbidity values. The ratio between 665 and 560 nm bands (RGratio) proved to be the most suitable spectral index, performing best in estimating turbidity (R2 = 0.822 and RMSE = 1.77 NTU). This study highlights the importance of locally calibrated models over standard ACOLITE algorithms for turbidity retrieval in shallow coastal lagoons, while emphasizing that the proposed model was calibrated for the tidal, wind, and river discharge conditions sampled during the campaign and has not yet been independently validated.

AI.tldr: 本研究针对葡萄牙Aveiro潟湖，通过同步实地测量与Sentinel-2卫星过境数据，开发了基于665 nm与560 nm波段比值的局部浊度反演模型（R²=0.822, RMSE=1.77 NTU），发现现有ACOLITE算法普遍低估高浊度值，强调了浅水沿海潟湖中局部校准模型的必要性。
AI.motivation: 沿海系统浊度监测对可持续管理至关重要，而现有卫星算法在Aveiro潟湖等浅水沿海潟湖的适用性未知，需开发本地化浊度模型以提高反演精度。
AI.method: 于2025年5月28日同步Sentinel-2过境进行野外测量，获取近地表浊度和Secchi深度；使用ACOLITE软件（v20250114.0）提取遥感反射率（Rrs）并运行多种现有算法；基于Rrs数据开发并经验调整新浊度模型，以决定系数（R²）和均方根误差（RMSE）评估性能。
AI.result: 现有算法不适用于Aveiro潟湖，严重低估高浊度值；665 nm与560 nm波段比值（RGratio）是最优光谱指数，浊度反演效果最佳（R²=0.822, RMSE=1.77 NTU）。
AI.conclusion: 在浅水沿海潟湖中，局部校准模型优于标准ACOLITE算法；但该模型仅基于采样期间的潮汐、风力和河流排放条件校准，尚未经过独立验证。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：85%。改进方案：（1）引入潮汐相位和风速作为辅助变量，构建多参数浊度反演模型，克服单一波段比在动态潮汐环境下的局限性；（2）增加不同季节和潮汐条件下的实测数据，对模型进行时间尺度上的独立验证；（3）尝试结合红边波段（如704 nm）与水体的浊度敏感性，进一步提升模型在高浊度范围的稳健性；（4）将该方法推广至其他类似浅水潟湖系统（如中国杭州湾、荷兰瓦登海），评估可迁移性。

title: Local Calibration Enhances the Transferability of UAV-LiDAR Models for Tree-Level Carbon Estimation in Radiata Pine Plantations
summary: Accurate and transferable estimation of forest carbon is essential for operational forest management and national greenhouse gas reporting, yet it remains challenging because of variation in stand structure and site conditions. Unmanned aerial vehicle-based light detection and ranging (UAV-LiDAR) provides detailed structural information for modelling tree-level carbon, but model transferability across sites is often limited. In this study, we compared three modelling approaches—a linear mixed-effects model (LMM), a generalised additive model (GAM), and Random Forest (RF)—within a unified framework of multi-site, locally post hoc calibrated, and fully local model-fitting strategies. Using data from 20 radiata pine (Pinus radiata D. Don) plantation stands across New Zealand (35,201 trees), a leave-one-site-out (LOSO) framework was used to assess multi-site model transferability and support post hoc calibration, while local models were evaluated using repeated within-site train/test splits. We also evaluated how prediction accuracy changed with increasing local sample size and compared random tree selection with plot-based sampling. Multi-site models showed poor generalisation, with mean relative RMSE ranging from 35.9% to 56.9% and substantial site-level bias. Applying post hoc calibration to the multi-site model using a 50-tree sample reduced prediction error by 30 to 60% (mean relative RMSE 22.8–25.0%) and substantially reduced bias across sites. The fitting of fully local models with the same sample size yielded only modest further improvements (mean relative RMSE 21.9–23.1%). Gains in accuracy were minimal with increasing sample sizes above 50 trees for post hoc calibration and 175 trees for the fully local models, and differences in accuracy between sampling strategies were small. These results show that post hoc calibration of multi-site UAV-LiDAR models with a small local sample provides a practical and efficient approach for tree-level carbon estimation in plantation forests.

AI.tldr: 本研究利用新西兰20个辐射松人工林样地的35,201棵树数据，比较了线性混合效应模型(LMM)、广义加性模型(GAM)和随机森林(RF)三种方法在无人机激光雷达(UAV-LiDAR)估算单木碳储量中的表现。研究发现，多站点模型泛化能力差(RMSE 35.9-56.9%)，但通过50棵树的局部事后校准可将误差降低30-60%(RMSE 22.8-25.0%)，接近全局部模型的表现(RMSE 21.9-23.1%)，且样本量超过50棵树后精度提升有限。
AI.motivation: 森林碳储量的准确且可迁移估算对森林经营管理和国家温室气体报告至关重要，但林分结构和立地条件的变异性使得这一任务具有挑战性。尽管无人机激光雷达(UAV-LiDAR)能够提供详细的结构信息用于单木碳储量建模，但模型在不同站点间的可迁移性往往受限。
AI.method: 使用来自新西兰20个辐射松人工林样地的35,201棵树数据，在统一框架下比较了线性混合效应模型(LMM)、广义加性模型(GAM)和随机森林(RF)三种建模方法，采用留一站交叉验证(LOSO)评估多站点模型迁移性，并比较了事后校准与局部模型拟合策略。
AI.result: 多站点模型泛化能力差，平均相对RMSE为35.9%-56.9%，存在显著站点偏差。使用50棵树进行事后校准可将预测误差降低30-60%(平均相对RMSE 22.8-25.0%)，显著减少偏差。相同样本量下的全局部模型仅有小幅提升(平均相对RMSE 21.9-23.1%)。样本量超过50棵(事后校准)或175棵(局部模型)后精度提升有限，不同抽样策略间差异很小。
AI.conclusion: 通过少量局部样本对多站点UAV-LiDAR模型进行事后校准，是一种实用且高效的 plantations 森林单木碳储量估算方法，在精度和效率之间取得了良好平衡。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：95%。该研究本身即为遥感交叉应用（UAV-LiDAR在森林碳估算中的应用），可改进方向包括：(1) 将事后校准策略推广到其他遥感平台（如卫星激光雷达ICESat-2、星载InSAR）的多站点碳估算；(2) 引入深度学习方法（如PointNet++、Graph Neural Networks）替代传统机器学习模型以更好地捕捉点云空间结构特征；(3) 结合多光谱或高光谱数据与LiDAR特征，利用后校准策略进行多源融合碳估算；(4) 将后校准框架从单木尺度扩展到样地或区域尺度，结合遥感影像进行大区域碳储量制图。

title: Cloud Microphysical Characteristics in the Northeast China Cold Vortex Derived from Satellite Measurements
summary: The Northeast China Cold Vortex (NCCV), a typical synoptic-scale system in Northeast China, North China, and the Jianghuai region, frequently triggers thunderstorms, strong winds, and heavy precipitation, making it significant for meteorological monitoring and operational forecasting. However, the cloud microphysical properties of NCCV-associated cloud systems remain poorly characterized, as long-term cloud microphysical observations are limited. This study utilizes cloud products from the Moderate Resolution Imaging Spectroradiometer (MODIS) to analyze cloud-type frequencies and four key cloud microphysical properties under NCCV conditions: liquid effective radius (Re_liq), ice effective radius (Re_ice), liquid water path (LWP), and ice water path (IWP). Nearly identical cloud-type compositions are found for the two groups, NCCV and non-NCCV samples with similar cloud fractions on the regional scale, which are dominated by stratocumulus (Sc), altostratus (As), cumulus (Cu), and stratus (St), with Sc accounting for above 40% of total cloud occurrence. Yet microphysical properties differ markedly between these two groups. LWP shows the most contrast and it is evidently larger in NCCV than in non-NCCV cloud systems. As for the spatial structure of cloud microphysics in the NCCV domain, it is found that Sc, As, St, and nimbostratus (Ns) constitute the primary background, and Sc remains the dominant cloud type in almost all spatial sectors. LWP and IWP tend to have stronger spatial heterogeneity than Re_liq and Re_ice. LWP gets notably larger in the northern to northwestern sectors, whereas IWP shows much higher variations in both radial and azimuthal dimensions. These results reveal the statistical microphysical characteristics of cloud systems associated with NCCV from the perspective of satellite observations, providing a reference for a deeper understanding of their unique cloud and precipitation physical processes.

AI.tldr: 本文利用MODIS云产品分析了东北冷涡（NCCV）背景下云系统的云类型频率及云微物理特性（液态/冰态有效半径、液态/冰态水路径），发现NCCV与非NCCV云系统在云类型组成上相似（以层积云为主），但微物理特性存在显著差异，其中液态水路径差异最大，且NCCV云系统的液态水路径明显更大。空间结构上，液态和冰态水路径的空间异质性强于有效半径，为理解NCCV云和降水物理过程提供了卫星视角的统计参考。
AI.motivation: 东北冷涡是影响我国东北、华北和江淮地区的重要天气系统，常引发雷暴、大风和强降水，但其关联云系统的云微物理特性因长期观测数据匮乏而研究不足，亟需利用卫星遥感手段进行系统性统计刻画。
AI.method: 利用MODIS云产品，对比分析NCCV与非NCCV条件下云类型频率及四种关键云微物理参数（液态有效半径Re_liq、冰态有效半径Re_ice、液态水路径LWP、冰态水路径IWP），并进一步分析NCCV区域内各空间扇区中云微物理特性的空间分布与异质性。
AI.result: NCCV与非NCCV样本在区域尺度上的云类型组成几乎相同，均以层积云（Sc, >40%）、高积云（As）、积云（Cu）和层云（St）为主；但微物理特性差异显著，LWP差异最大且NCCV系统明显更大。空间上，Sc在几乎所有扇区占主导，LWP和IWP的空间异质性高于Re_liq和Re_ice，其中LWP在北部至西北部扇区显著增大，IWP在径向和方位角维度上均表现出更高的变异性。
AI.conclusion: 本研究从卫星观测视角揭示了NCCV关联云系统的统计微物理特征，为深入理解其独特的云和降水物理过程提供了参考依据。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：95%。该论文本身就是基于MODIS卫星遥感的云微物理研究，可从以下方面改进：1) 引入主动遥感数据（如CloudSat/CALIPSO）获取云垂直结构，弥补MODIS仅提供柱积分和单层信息的局限；2) 结合星载降水雷达（GPM DPR）分析NCCV云系统的降水微物理特征；3) 利用葵花-8/9等高时空分辨率静止卫星反演产品，捕捉NCCV演化过程中云微物理的快速变化；4) 融合再分析资料与卫星数据，构建NCCV云微物理参数的动力-统计模型。

title: YOLO-Based Landslide Identification and Causal Inference Using Double Machine Learning in Longyan, Fujian
summary: Landslides and their associated secondary hazards present substantial threats to both public infrastructure and resident safety. The rapid and accurate identification of large-scale landslide events remains a critical challenge in the field of engineering geology. In this study, a YOLO-based deep learning model is developed for landslide identification relying on a training dataset constructed using the satellite imagery of Longyan City, Fujian Province, in 2024. Adopting the double machine learning model, we examine the causal inference relationships between landslide and causative factors, including rainfall (R), mean Normalized Difference Vegetation Index (NDVI) and Distance to roads (DRoa). A total of 1185 landslides is identified in 2024, covering an area of approximately 31.02 km2. The landslides are predominantly concentrated in Shanghang, Wuping, Changting, and the southern part of Xinluo. The landslides mainly correspond to elevations around 300–500 m, slopes among the interval of [10°, 25°], and annual rainfall intensities ranging from 1600 m to 1700 mm. The top five key factors for landslide occurrence in descending order are NDVI, R, DRoa, Distance to Rivers (DRiv) and Aspect (A), in terms SHAP values. Causal inference analysis reveals that the rainfall in June and July shows significant positive causal effects to landslide, which is consistent with the physical mechanism of rainfall-induced landslide and the landslide data reported by the government. The framework proposed and the findings in this study offer valuable technical and theoretical support for landslide identification and risk assessment in southwestern Fujian.

AI.tldr: 本文基于YOLO深度学习模型和双机器学习因果推断框架，利用2024年福建省龙岩市卫星影像识别了1185处滑坡（面积约31.02 km²），发现滑坡主要集中在海拔300–500 m、坡度10°–25°、年降雨量1600–1700 mm区域，SHAP分析显示关键影响因子排序为NDVI、降雨、距道路距离、距河流距离和坡向，因果推断表明6–7月降雨对滑坡有显著正向因果效应。
AI.motivation: 滑坡及其次生灾害严重威胁公共基础设施和居民安全，大尺度滑坡事件的快速准确识别仍是工程地质领域的重大挑战。
AI.method: 采用YOLO深度学习模型基于2024年龙岩市卫星影像构建训练数据集进行滑坡识别；利用双机器学习模型进行因果推断，分析降雨、NDVI和距道路距离等致灾因子与滑坡之间的因果关系；结合SHAP值评估各因子重要性。
AI.result: 识别出1185处滑坡，总面积约31.02 km²；滑坡主要集中在上杭、武平、长汀和新罗南部；滑坡多发生在海拔300–500 m、坡度10°–25°、年降雨量1600–1700 mm区域；SHAP值显示因子重要性排序为NDVI > 降雨 > 距道路距离 > 距河流距离 > 坡向；因果推断表明6–7月降雨对滑坡有显著正向因果效应。
AI.conclusion: 提出的框架和研究成果为闽西南地区滑坡识别与风险评估提供了有价值的技术和理论支持。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：95%。本文本身就是基于遥感卫星影像的滑坡识别研究。改进方向：（1）可引入多时相遥感数据（如Sentinel-1 InSAR形变监测）增强滑坡早期预警能力；（2）结合高光谱遥感数据区分滑坡与相似地物（如裸地、采石场）以降低误检率；（3）将YOLO模型与Transformer架构结合（如YOLOv8+Vision Transformer）提升小尺度滑坡识别精度；（4）扩展至多源遥感数据融合（光学+SAR+DEM），利用DEM提取更精细的地形因子以优化特征空间。

title: MS3CHFormer: A Multi-Scale Spatial–Spectral Convolutional Hybrid Transformer for Hyperspectral Image Classification
summary: Deep learning methods that integrate convolutional neural networks (CNNs) and Transformers have achieved remarkable progress in hyperspectral image (HSI) classification. However, existing methods still suffer from insufficient multi-scale spatial–spectral feature modeling, a lack of efficient interaction mechanisms between local and global features, and the inherent high computational complexity and redundant information of Transformers, which limit model performance. To address these issues, a Multi-Scale Spatial–Spectral Convolutional Hybrid Transformer model (MS3CHFormer) is proposed in this article. Specifically, a Multi-Scale Spatial–Spectral Convolution Module (MS3ConvM) is first constructed. Through a multi-branch and multi-receptive-field design, it jointly models spatial and spectral features at different scales, thereby enhancing the representation capability of complex ground objects. Then, a Token-Selective Sparse Transformer Encoder (TSSTE) is designed, which adaptively selects tokens and performs sparse modeling via a Dynamic Correlation-Aware Attention (DCAA) mechanism, effectively reducing computational complexity while suppressing redundant information and further reinforcing key feature representations. Furthermore, a Local–Global Feature Fusion Module (LGFFM) is designed to achieve deep complementary fusion of CNN and Transformer features by mapping them into different representation spaces. Finally, a Detail-Preserving Enhancement Module (DPEM) introduces original detail information through residual connections to compensate for detail loss in high-level semantic representations, thereby enhancing the representation capability of boundaries and fine-grained structures. Experiments and comparative analyses on four public HSI datasets demonstrate that the proposed MS3CHFormer outperforms state-of-the-art methods and achieves superior classification accuracy under limited training samples, exhibiting excellent robustness and generalization ability.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种多尺度空间-光谱卷积混合Transformer模型（MS3CHFormer），通过MS3ConvM多尺度特征提取、TSSTE稀疏注意力降冗余、LGFFM局部-全局特征融合和DPEM细节保持增强模块，在高光谱图像分类任务上优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习方法存在多尺度空间-光谱特征建模不足、局部与全局特征缺乏高效交互机制、Transformer计算复杂度高且存在冗余信息等问题，限制了高光谱图像分类性能。
AI.method: 1）MS3ConvM：多分支多感受野设计，联合建模不同尺度的空间和光谱特征；2）TSSTE：基于动态关联感知注意力机制自适应选择token进行稀疏建模，降低复杂度并抑制冗余；3）LGFFM：将CNN和Transformer特征映射到不同表示空间实现深度互补融合；4）DPEM：通过残差连接引入原始细节信息，补偿高层语义中的细节损失。
AI.result: 在四个公开HSI数据集上的实验表明，MS3CHFormer优于现有最先进方法，在有限训练样本下取得更优的分类精度，表现出良好的鲁棒性和泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的MS3CHFormer通过多尺度建模、稀疏注意力、局部-全局融合和细节保持增强四个模块的协同设计，有效解决了现有方法的局限性，提升了高光谱图像分类性能。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：90%。该论文本身即为遥感高光谱图像分类方法。改进方向：1）MS3ConvM可引入光谱可变形卷积或自适应感受野机制，进一步提升对异质地物的适应性；2）TSSTE的token选择策略可结合光谱相似性先验进行优化；3）DPEM可尝试与边缘检测或超像素分割相结合，强化地物边界信息；4）可引入半监督或自监督学习策略，进一步降低对标注样本的依赖；5）模型可扩展至多模态遥感数据（如HSI+LiDAR/SAR）的协同分类任务。

title: Fusion of Airborne and Ground-Based Multi-Source Data for High-Precision 3D Real-Scene Modeling of Historic Cultural District
summary: Traditional Unmanned Aerial Vehicle (UAV) oblique photogrammetry for 3D real-scene modeling of historic cultural districts suffers from data gaps, insufficient texture, and poor accuracy in complex alleyway environments, hindering the widespread adoption of UAV technology. To address these challenges, this paper establishes a distortion region identification algorithm based on image grayscale variation range parameters. Then, through fusing UAV oblique photogrammetry, close-range smartphone photogrammetry, and Real-Time Kinematic (RTK) positioning technology, it ultimately constructs a 3D real-scene reconstruction technical framework. To validate the method’s effectiveness and reliability, a field experiment was conducted in the Zaoerxiang Historic Cultural District of Zhanggong District, Ganzhou City, Jiangxi Province, China. The experimental results demonstrate that the proposed algorithm can effectively identify distortions in the modeling results from UAV images. After fusing smartphone images from distorted regions and RTK measurements from ground control points (GCPs), the discrepancies in X, Y, and Z coordinates between the results and verification points mostly fall within 10 to 25 mm, while the differences from the measured lengths using a steel tape measure and a leveling rod were within the range of 10 to 20 mm. Furthermore, compared to approaches that rely solely on UAV images or on the fusion of UAV and all ground-based images for modeling, the method proposed in this paper restores building texture information in occluded areas and improves the accuracy of 3D real-scene modeling while simultaneously reducing data-processing and storage requirements and enhancing operational efficiency. It provides a referenceable technical framework for digital preservation, restoration planning, and smart cultural tourism of historic districts.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种融合无人机倾斜摄影、智能手机近景摄影和RTK定位技术的三维实景重建框架，通过基于图像灰度变化范围的畸变区域识别算法，解决历史街区复杂巷道环境中无人机建模存在的数据空洞、纹理不足和精度差的问题。实验表明该方法能将坐标误差控制在10-25mm，长度误差控制在10-20mm，在精度、纹理还原和效率上均优于纯无人机或无人机+全地面图像方案。
AI.motivation: 传统无人机倾斜摄影在历史街区的复杂巷道环境中存在数据空洞、纹理不足和精度差的问题，制约了无人机技术在该领域的广泛应用。
AI.method: 1) 建立基于图像灰度变化范围参数的畸变区域识别算法；2) 融合无人机倾斜摄影、智能手机近景摄影和RTK定位技术，构建三维实景重建技术框架。
AI.result: 所提算法能有效识别无人机建模结果中的畸变区域；融合智能手机图像和RTK地面控制点后，坐标差异大多在10-25mm内，长度差异在10-20mm内；相比纯无人机或无人机+全地面图像方案，该方法在纹理恢复、精度、数据处理和存储效率方面均有提升。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为历史街区的数字化保护、修复规划和智慧文旅提供了可参考的技术框架。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：95%。本文本身就是遥感（无人机摄影测量）领域的论文。改进方案：1) 可引入深度学习进行畸变区域自动识别，替代基于灰度变化范围的手工特征方法；2) 可结合LiDAR点云数据弥补智能手机近景摄影在深度信息上的不足；3) 可引入多源数据融合的SfM优化策略，提升特征匹配鲁棒性；4) 可结合语义分割模型对不同建筑结构进行差异化建模参数调整。

title: A Scalable Clustering-Based Method for Vegetation Mapping in Large Areas Using Satellite Image Time Series
authors: Baggio Luiz de Castro e Silva
summary: The Brazilian Cerrado, a global biodiversity hotspot, is under increasing pressure from agricultural expansion and native vegetation conversion, underscoring the need for efficient monitoring to support conservation and environmental policies. In heterogeneous landscapes, land use and land cover (LULC) mapping using supervised classification methods faces a major bottleneck: the need for extensive and high-quality training datasets. To address this challenge, we propose a semi-automated, clustering-based methodology for mapping secondary vegetation within previously deforested areas, reducing training-sample requirements and enabling scalable mapping through the clustering of satellite image time series. In the first stage, an unsupervised process integrates graphics processing unit (GPU)-accelerated Self-Organizing Maps and hierarchical clustering with Dynamic Time Warping to produce spectro-temporal clusters. In the second stage, specialists label and refine these clusters by visual interpretation, transferring expert knowledge from individual pixels to grouped spectro-temporal patterns. Applied to 692,000 km2 of previously deforested land in the Cerrado biome, the methodology produced a mapped secondary vegetation area of 81,209 km2 (11.74%). The design-based estimated area was 98,683 ± 10,071 km2, with an overall accuracy of 96.45 ± 1.52%, a user’s accuracy of 96.27 ± 2.40%, a producer’s accuracy of 79.22 ± 7.94%, and an F1-score of 86.90%. The initial cluster labeling accounted for 86.3% of the final secondary vegetation area and limited the interpretation task to approximately 3000 cluster-level decisions. Implemented in the TerraClass Cerrado 2024 cycle, the workflow reduced the secondary vegetation mapping phase from approximately two years to six months while maintaining the thematic accuracy required for large-scale operational monitoring.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于聚类（GPU加速的自组织映射+动态时间规整层次聚类）的半自动化方法，用于在巴西塞拉多生物群落先前砍伐区域绘制次生植被图。该方法通过专家标注聚类结果而非逐像素标注，将制图时间从约2年缩短至6个月，总体精度96.45%，次生植被面积81,209 km²。
AI.motivation: 巴西塞拉多是全球生物多样性热点，面临农业扩张和原生植被转化的巨大压力。遥感监督分类在异质性景观中面临瓶颈——需要大量高质量训练样本。现有的次生植被制图方法耗时（约2年）且样本需求大，亟需一种可扩展的、减少训练样本依赖的半自动化方案来支持大规模业务化监测。
AI.method: 两阶段方法：第一阶段（无监督），利用GPU加速的自组织映射（SOM）结合动态时间规整（DTW）的层次聚类，对卫星影像时间序列进行聚类，生成光谱-时间聚类；第二阶段（专家标注），专家通过目视解译对聚类进行标注和精炼，将专家知识从单个像素转移到分组的光谱-时间模式上。该方法应用于塞拉多69.2万km²先前砍伐区域。
AI.result: 次生植被制图面积81,209 km²（11.74%），设计估计面积98,683±10,071 km²。总体精度96.45±1.52%，用户精度96.27±2.40%，生产者精度79.22±7.94%，F1得分86.90%。初聚类标注覆盖86.3%最终次生植被面积，将解释任务限制在约3000个聚类决策。制图时间从2年缩短至6个月。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的半自动化聚类方法显著减少了训练样本需求和人工标注工作量，同时保持了业务化大规模监测所需的制图精度。该工作流已在TerraClass Cerrado 2024周期中实施，证明了其在业务化遥感监测中的实用价值和可扩展性。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：95%。本身就是遥感业务化应用论文。改进方向：(1) 引入主动学习策略，在专家标注阶段优先推荐不确定性最高的聚类，进一步提高标注效率；(2) 将SOM+DTW层次聚类与深度学习特征提取（如时序自编码器）结合，增强时序表征能力；(3) 扩展至多模态数据融合（如Sentinel-1 SAR+光学），增强云雾频繁区域的可靠性；(4) 引入迁移学习，将预训练聚类模型迁移至其他热带生物群落（如亚马逊、刚果盆地），降低跨区域应用成本。

title: Integrating Gross Error Identification with Deep Learning for InSAR Topography-Dependent Delay Correction: A Case Study of the Baihetan Hydropower Station Area
summary: Tropospheric delay poses a major limitation to high-precision InSAR observations, particularly in high mountain and canyon regions. To address this issue, this study proposes a combined model (EiMLP) that integrates gross error identification with a multilayer perceptron (MLP) for topography-dependent tropospheric delay correction. The gross error identification module detects unwrapped phase jumps based on phase gradients, followed by an MLP model that reconstructs the atmospheric phase using unwrapped phase and elevation information from a single interferogram. The proposed method is validated in the Baihetan Hydropower Station area and compared with traditional correction methods. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed method achieves a Structural Similarity Index Measure (SSIM) of 0.970 and a Root Mean Square Error (RMSE) of 0.673 rad for the simulated atmospheric phase. After atmospheric correction, the average phase standard deviation of the interferograms is reduced by 83%, and the topography-related correlation is significantly suppressed. Furthermore, after correction by the proposed method, the signals that are masked by atmospheric errors in the original interferograms can be clearly revealed, indicating the potential for slope instability. These findings indicate that the EiMLP model, operating on a single interferogram, exhibits robust applicability and provides a reliable reference for future InSAR tropospheric delay correction.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合粗差识别与多层感知机（MLP）的混合模型（EiMLP），用于单幅干涉图中与地形相关的对流层延迟校正。该模型通过相位梯度检测解缠相位跳变，利用MLP从解缠相位和DEM信息重建大气相位。在白鹤滩水电站区域验证表明，校正后干涉图相位标准差平均降低83%，SSIM达0.970，RMSE为0.673 rad，有效揭示了被大气误差掩盖的斜坡失稳信号。
AI.motivation: 对流层延迟严重限制了高精度InSAR观测，尤其是在高山和峡谷区域，现有校正方法存在不足，需要一种仅依赖单幅干涉图即可实现有效地形相关对流层延迟校正的方法。
AI.method: 提出EiMLP混合模型，包含两个模块：(1) 粗差识别模块——基于相位梯度检测解缠相位跳变；(2) MLP模型——利用单幅干涉图的解缠相位和高程信息重建大气相位，实现地形相关对流层延迟校正。
AI.result: 模拟大气相位SSIM为0.970，RMSE为0.673 rad；校正后干涉图平均相位标准差降低83%，地形相关相关性被显著抑制；被大气误差掩盖的斜坡失稳信号在校正后清晰显现。
AI.conclusion: EiMLP模型仅依赖单幅干涉图即可实现对流层延迟有效校正，具有鲁棒的适用性，为未来InSAR对流层延迟校正提供了可靠参考。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：95%。改进方案：(1) 可将MLP替换为更先进的深度学习模型（如Transformer或物理信息神经网络PINN）以提升大气相位重建精度；(2) 粗差识别模块可引入空间统计方法（如局部离因子LOF）增强跳变检测鲁棒性；(3) 可扩展至多时相InSAR时序分析，结合时序模型（如SBAS）进一步分离大气延迟与形变信号；(4) 可将高程信息扩展为多特征输入（如坡度、坡向、地形粗糙度）以更好地建模地形相关延迟。

title: Trait-Dependent Effects of Band Selection on Predicting Soybean Biomass, Leaf Area Index, and Canopy Cover from Hyperspectral Reflectance
summary: Predicting canopy traits non-destructively is important for understanding crop growth and improving phenotyping efficiency. Hyperspectral reflectance provides detailed spectral information, but the role of band selection in regression-based trait prediction at the canopy scale remains unclear. In this study, we evaluated the effects of different band-selection algorithms on the prediction accuracy of aboveground biomass (AGB), leaf area index (LAI), and canopy cover (CC) in soybeans using canopy hyperspectral reflectance in the visible to near-infrared (VNIR) range from 501 to 801 nm. The dataset included multiple sites, years, cultivars, and irrigation treatments. We compared a full-band partial least squares regression (PLS) model with three band-selection methods (PLS-Variable Importance in Projection (VIP), Bootstrapped least absolute shrinkage and selection operator (LASSO) (BoLASSO), and an ensemble approach). Model performance was assessed using Kennard–Stone validation and leave-one-year-out cross-validation. The results showed that the effectiveness of band selection depended on the target trait. Full-band PLS performed well for AGB under Kennard–Stone validation, whereas BoLASSO achieved comparable accuracy to PLS for LAI and CC using a reduced number of selected bands. Leave-one-year-out cross-validation showed that year-to-year transferability was more difficult for AGB than for LAI and CC. The selected wavelengths were located mainly in the visible, red-edge, and near-infrared regions. These results indicate that band-selection strategies should be tailored to the target trait and that selected VNIR bands can provide candidate spectral regions for simplified sensing of soybean canopy traits.

AI.tldr: 本研究评估了不同波段选择算法（PLS-VIP、BoLASSO和集成方法）对利用高光谱反射率（501-801 nm）预测大豆冠层性状（地上生物量AGB、叶面积指数LAI、冠层覆盖度CC）的影响。结果表明波段选择的有效性取决于目标性状：全波段PLS对AGB预测效果良好，而BoLASSO可用较少波段达到与PLS相当的LAI和CC预测精度；年际间可迁移性对AGB比对LAI和CC更困难；所选波段主要集中在可见光、红边和近红外区域。
AI.motivation: 非破坏性地预测冠层性状对理解作物生长和提高表型分析效率至关重要，高光谱反射率提供了详细光谱信息，但波段选择在基于回归的冠层尺度性状预测中的作用尚不清楚。
AI.method: 使用大豆冠层高光谱反射率（501-801 nm VNIR范围），数据集包含多个地点、年份、品种和灌溉处理；比较全波段PLS回归模型与三种波段选择方法（PLS-VIP、BoLASSO和集成方法）；采用Kennard-Stone验证和留一年交叉验证评估模型性能。
AI.result: 波段选择的有效性取决于目标性状；全波段PLS对AGB在Kennard-Stone验证下表现良好；BoLASSO用较少波段即可达到与PLS相当的LAI和CC预测精度；年际间可迁移性AGB比LAI和CC更困难；所选波长主要位于可见光、红边和近红外区域。
AI.conclusion: 波段选择策略应根据目标性状定制，选定的VNIR波段可为简化大豆冠层性状传感提供候选光谱区域。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：85%。1）该方法可直接迁移至遥感影像（如Sentinel-2、高分系列）的大豆冠层参数反演，利用其红边和近红外波段简化估算模型；2）可将波段选择结果与无人机高光谱影像结合，实现地块尺度的AGB、LAI和CC高效制图；3）可扩展至其他作物（小麦、玉米、水稻）的冠层性状预测，验证波段选择的普适性；4）可引入更多波段选择算法（如遗传算法、竞争自适应重加权采样CARS）与深度学习特征提取方法进行对比优化；5）建议增加对大气校正、土壤背景干扰等遥感实际应用因素的考虑，提升方法的鲁棒性。

title: Spatial and Temporal Variability of Terrestrial Water Storage and Their Relationship with Groundwater Level with GRACE, GLDAS and Observations: A Case Study of Murray–Darling Basin
summary: Spatial and temporal patterns of terrestrial water storage (TWS), and their relationship with groundwater levels, were investigated with the Gravity Recovery and Climate Experiment (GRACE) satellite data, the Global Land Data Assimilation System (GLDAS) land surface model results, and climate observations for the Murray–Darling Basin (MDB). The results show that: (1) TWS displays a clear temporal variability: a negative TWS anomaly with a declining trend during 2002–2009, a positive TWS anomaly with a decreasing trend during 2010–2017, and a period of mixed positive and negative TWS anomalies being accompanied by an increasing trend from 2018 to 2025; (2) five dominant cluster patterns were identified that explain the spatial variability of temporal TWS across the MDB; (3) overall, TWS temporal variability is strongly correlated with rainfall, although it is weak at certain locations; (4) TWS is also influenced by evaporation (both actual and potential evapotranspiration, AET and PET) and runoff, and a combined model significantly improves the overall performance in explaining TWS temporal variability; and (5) TWS-derived groundwater storage changes show both similarities and differences in comparison with groundwater level observation changes, reflecting complex hydrogeological processes and the influence of human activities such as groundwater extraction. These findings provide valuable insights to support improved groundwater resource management with GRACE satellite information and land surface models.

AI.tldr: 本研究利用GRACE卫星数据、GLDAS模型和气候观测数据，分析了墨累-达令盆地（MDB）陆地水储量（TWS）的时空变化及其与地下水位的关系。结果显示：TWS在2002-2009年呈负异常下降趋势，2010-2017年呈正异常下降趋势，2018-2025年呈正负混合上升趋势；识别出5个主导聚类模式；TWS与降雨强相关但局部弱相关；蒸散发和径流对TWS有影响，组合模型显著提升解释能力；TWS衍生的地下水储量变化与实测地下水位变化存在异同，反映复杂水文地质过程和人类活动影响。
AI.motivation: 探究墨累-达令盆地（MDB）陆地水储量的时空变化规律及其与地下水位的关联，以支持利用GRACE卫星信息和地表模型改进地下水资源管理。
AI.method: 采用GRACE卫星数据反演TWS，结合GLDAS陆面模型结果和气候观测数据（降雨、蒸散发、径流），通过聚类分析识别空间模式，并通过相关性分析和组合模型评估各气候因子对TWS变化的解释能力，同时对比TWS衍生的地下水储量变化与实测地下水位变化。
AI.result: (1) TWS呈现三阶段变化：2002-2009年负异常下降趋势，2010-2017年正异常下降趋势，2018-2025年正负混合上升趋势；(2) 识别出5个主导聚类模式解释MDB空间变异性；(3) TWS与降雨总体强相关，但局部相关较弱；(4) 蒸散发（AET和PET）和径流对TWS有影响，组合模型显著提升解释能力；(5) TWS反演的地下水储量变化与实测水位变化既有相似性又有差异性。
AI.conclusion: GRACE卫星数据和陆面模型能有效揭示MDB的TWS时空变化规律及其与气候因子的关系，TWS反演的地下水变化可反映水文地质过程和人类活动影响，为地下水资源管理提供有力支撑。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：95%。该论文已属于遥感应用领域，可改进方向包括：(1) 引入更高分辨率遥感数据（如SMAP土壤水分、Sentinel-1/2）对GRACE粗分辨率TWS进行降尺度，提升局部精度；(2) 结合InSAR技术监测地表形变，辅助验证地下水位变化；(3) 引入机器学习（如LSTM、随机森林）替代传统统计模型，提升TWS与气候因子关系的预测能力；(4) 增加人类活动参数化（如灌溉提取量、水库调度数据），改进TWS-地下水关系的解释模型；(5) 将研究方法推广至其他半干旱流域进行对比分析，验证方法的普适性。

title: S2M-Net: Dynamic Hyperspectral Unmixing Network Integrating Spectral Sequence Mamba and Local Spatial–Spectral Awareness
summary: Hyperspectral unmixing aims to extract pure endmembers and their corresponding abundance from mixed pixels. Existing deep learning-based unmixing methods predominantly rely on convolutional neural networks (CNNs) or Transformer architectures. However, CNNs suffer from limited receptive fields and struggle to capture long-range spectral dependencies across the entire spectral sequence. While Transformers possess global modeling capabilities, they are constrained by quadratic computational complexity and lack the ability to adaptively filter redundant noise in consecutive spectral bands. To address these limitations, this paper proposes a dynamic hyperspectral unmixing network integrating a spectral sequence Mamba with local spatial–spectral awareness. Specifically, the network features a novel asymmetric dual-stream collaborative architecture. The first branch, the spectral sequence Mamba, models hyperspectral data as a one-dimensional continuous sequence and employs the selective state space model to perform global scanning with linear complexity. This adaptively filters redundant spectral bands to accurately extract high-purity global spectral semantics. The second branch, dedicated to local spatial–spectral awareness, uses an attention-augmented CNN to capture local continuous spectral variations and spatial textures, providing fine-grained geometric boundary constraints for abundance estimation. Furthermore, a spatially adaptive gated fusion module is designed to dynamically balance global spectral semantics and local spatial–spectral details according to the pixel mixing complexity of varying spatial regions. Extensive experiments on multiple public hyperspectral datasets demonstrate that the proposed method achieves significant improvements in unmixing accuracy over comparative methods.

AI.tldr: 提出一种动态高光谱解混网络，结合了光谱序列Mamba（线性复杂度全局扫描）与局部空谱感知（注意力增强CNN），通过非对称双流架构和自适应门控融合模块，在高光谱解混任务中取得了优于现有方法的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有基于CNN的解混方法感受野有限，难以捕获全光谱序列的长距离依赖；基于Transformer的方法虽具备全局建模能力，但计算复杂度呈二次增长，且无法自适应过滤连续光谱波段中的冗余噪声。
AI.method: 提出非对称双流协同架构：(1) 光谱序列Mamba分支，将高光谱数据建模为一维连续序列，利用选择性状态空间模型以线性复杂度进行全局扫描，自适应过滤冗余光谱波段；(2) 局部空谱感知分支，采用注意力增强的CNN捕获局部连续光谱变化与空间纹理；(3) 空间自适应门控融合模块，根据像素混合复杂度动态平衡全局光谱语义与局部空谱细节。
AI.result: 在多个公开高光谱数据集上的实验表明，所提方法在解混精度上显著优于对比方法。
AI.conclusion: 将Mamba架构引入高光谱解混是有效的，其线性复杂度的全局建模能力结合局部空谱感知，能够更准确地提取端元与丰度。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：85%。改进方案：(1) 当前方法仅利用了Mamba的一维序列扫描，可扩展为二维或三维Mamba以同时建模空间-光谱联合依赖；(2) 门控融合模块可进一步引入注意力机制实现空间自适应权重学习，增强对异质区域的适应性；(3) 可探索将Mamba与扩散模型结合，用于高光谱解混中的不确定性量化与丰度先验建模。

title: Spatiotemporal Evolution of Ecological Environment Quality and Driving Factors in the Loess Plateau of Northern Shaanxi
summary: Accurately assessing the spatiotemporal evolution of ecological environment quality (EEQ) on the Loess Plateau of Northern Shaanxi is of great significance for consolidating the ecological security barrier of the Yellow River Basin. Most of the existing research focuses on a single ecological theme, which does not reflect the overall ecological status of the region. In this study, a remote sensing ecological index (RSEI) model was constructed to systematically assess the EEQ from 2000 to 2024. The Theil–Sen estimator, Mann–Kendall test, and Hurst exponent were jointly employed to detect change significance and predict future trends, while the Geodetector model was applied to explore driving factors. The results were as follows: (1) EEQ exhibited a fluctuating but overall upward trend, with the mean RSEI rising from 0.376 in 2000 to 0.545 in 2024—an average annual increase of approximately 0.00569. (2) Spatially, a distinct pattern of “higher in the south, lower in the north and the lowest in the northwest” was observed. Over the 25-year period, the combined proportion of “excellent” and “good” grades increased by roughly 20 percentage points, and the “moderate” grade expanded from 13.61% to 47.12%. (3) Areas showing an improving trend accounted for 91.21% of the total area and highly overlapped with those projected to improve in the future. (4) Single-factor detection revealed that geomorphological type exerted the greatest influence on the spatial heterogeneity of EEQ, with a multi-year mean q-value of 0.701. Interaction detection further indicates that the geomorphology–land use interaction may continue to shape the regional EEQ’s spatial distribution. These findings provide a scientific basis for precise ecological restoration planning and spatial optimization on the Loess Plateau of Northern Shaanxi.

AI.tldr: 本文利用遥感生态指数（RSEI）模型评估了2000-2024年陕北黄土高原生态环境质量的时空演变，发现总体呈波动上升趋势，平均RSEI从0.376增至0.545；空间上呈现“南高北低、西北最低”格局，改善区域占91.21%；地貌类型是影响生态环境质量空间异质性的最主要因素，地貌-土地利用交互作用将持续塑造区域生态空间分布。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多聚焦单一生态主题，无法全面反映区域整体生态状况，亟需构建综合指标体系系统评估陕北黄土高原生态环境质量的时空演变。
AI.method: 构建遥感生态指数（RSEI）模型进行系统评估，联合使用Theil-Sen估计、Mann-Kendall检验和Hurst指数检测变化显著性并预测未来趋势，运用地理探测器模型探索驱动因素。
AI.result: (1) EEQ呈波动上升趋势，平均RSEI从0.376升至0.545，年均增长约0.00569；(2) 空间上“南高北低、西北最低”，“优良”等级合计增加约20个百分点，“中等”等级从13.61%扩至47.12%；(3) 改善区域占91.21%，与未来预测改善区域高度重叠；(4) 地貌类型影响最大（多年平均q值0.701），地貌-土地利用交互作用持续塑造空间分布。
AI.conclusion: 研究结果为陕北黄土高原精准生态修复规划和空间优化提供了科学依据。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：95%。改进方案：(1) 可引入国产高分系列（GF-1/2/6）或Sentinel-2等高空间分辨率遥感数据，提升RSEI各分量指标的空间细节刻画能力；(2) 可加入地表温度日较差或干旱指数等作为辅助因子，增强对生态胁迫的表征；(3) 可使用改进的RSEI（如加入盐度、水体等因子）适应黄土高原特殊地形地貌；(4) 可引入深度学习方法（如LSTM、ConvLSTM）进行时序预测，替代传统Hurst指数以捕捉更复杂的非线性演变规律；(5) 地理探测器可结合多尺度地理加权回归（MGWR）进行空间驱动力的交叉验证。

title: Automated On-Orbit Absolute Radiometric Calibration: A Preliminary Method and Results
summary: On-orbit absolute radiometric calibration tracks sensor radiometric degradation and ensures accuracy for quantitative applications. Low-cost commercial satellites lack expensive on-board calibration systems, and traditional alternative methods cannot achieve automated, reliable calibration for large sensor fleets with low resource consumption. Pseudo-invariant calibration sites require no ground instruments, but commercial satellites’ heavy imaging schedules hinder frequent PICS observations. The Jilin-1 constellation is a large commercial constellation composed of satellites carrying multispectral imagers with resolution better than 1 m, and it has no on-board calibration system. Thus, an automated calibration method applicable to numerous imagers is needed, one that requires widely available clear-sky ground targets. Using MCD43A2 and MCD12Q1 products, we generate calibration region vectors to transfer the MODIS radiometric reference to Jilin-1. A look-up table (LUT) is constructed for the input parameters of the MODTRAN model. Calibration pixels and model input parameters are then extracted from Jilin-1 imagery using the region vectors, the LUT is interpolated to obtain the at-aperture radiance for each pixel and band, and on-orbit absolute radiometric calibration coefficients are calculated. The proposed method requires no ground-based synchronous experiments, achieves a high level of automation, and does not consume commercial imaging resources. The site calibration validation based on RadCalNet for the JL1GF02F PMS1 sensor shows that the maximum relative difference in the method across all bands is less than 4%.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于MCD43A2/MCD12Q1产品和MODTRAN LUT的全自动在轨绝对辐射定标方法，无需地面同步实验和星上定标系统，适用于吉林一号等无星上定标的大型商业卫星星座。经RadCalNet验证，各波段最大相对差异小于4%。
AI.motivation: 低成本商业卫星缺乏昂贵的星上定标系统，传统替代方法无法实现低资源消耗下大规模卫星星座的自动化、可靠定标。
AI.method: 利用MCD43A2和MCD12Q1产品生成定标区域矢量，将MODIS辐射基准传递至吉林一号；构建MODTRAN模型输入参数的查找表(LUT)；从吉林一号影像中提取定标像素和模型输入参数，插值LUT获取入瞳辐亮度，计算在轨绝对辐射定标系数。
AI.result: 基于RadCalNet对JL1GF02F PMS1传感器进行验证，该方法在所有波段的最大相对差异小于4%。
AI.conclusion: 该方法无需地面同步实验，自动化程度高，不消耗商业成像资源，可为无星上定标系统的大规模商业卫星星座提供有效的在轨绝对辐射定标方案。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：95%。该方法本身就是针对遥感卫星定标的创新方案，可直接应用于其他无星上定标系统的商业遥感卫星星座（如高景一号、北京二号等）。改进方向：(1)引入深度学习模型替代LUT插值，提高大气参数反演精度和计算效率；(2)扩展至热红外波段定标；(3)结合时序分析剔除异常定标像素，进一步提升稳定性；(4)探索使用国产卫星数据替代MODIS产品（如FY-3 MERSI），降低对外部数据的依赖。

title: Assessing the Potential of EMIT Hyperspectral Data Combined with DEM-Derived Terrain Variables for Predicting Soil As, Cu and Zn Concentrations in a Mountainous Region of Southwest China
summary: Spaceborne imaging spectroscopy has created new opportunities for monitoring soil properties at regional scales. Its use for predicting soil heavy metal concentrations in mountainous environments, however, remains insufficiently tested, especially when EMIT hyperspectral data are used. In this study, EMIT Level-2A surface reflectance data were integrated with DEM-derived terrain variables to estimate soil arsenic (As), copper (Cu), and zinc (Zn) concentrations in Renhuai, Guizhou Province, Southwest China. Only soil samples falling within valid EMIT coverage were used for element-specific modeling, resulting in 139 samples for As, 136 for Cu, and 130 for Zn. To reduce redundancy among predictors, EMIT spectral variables and terrain factors were screened before model construction. Random forest and XGBoost models were then tested using repeated spatial cross-validation. The best-performing model for As combined EMIT predictors with elevation and achieved a validation R2 of 0.460. Model performance was considerably weaker for Cu, with a validation R2 of 0.188. For Zn, the model failed to outperform the mean-based benchmark, producing a negative validation R2 of −0.028. The spatial prediction maps and residual patterns suggested that the EMIT-based prediction showed moderate potential for As, limited predictive value for Cu, and exploratory rather than reliable mapping capability for Zn under the current sample and predictor conditions.

AI.tldr: 本研究利用EMIT高光谱数据与DEM地形变量，通过随机森林和XGBoost模型预测贵州仁怀山区土壤砷(As)、铜(Cu)、锌(Zn)浓度。结果表明，As预测效果中等(R²=0.460)，Cu预测效果较差(R²=0.188)，Zn预测无效(R²=-0.028)，说明EMIT数据在山区重金属预测中能力有限。
AI.motivation: 星载成像光谱仪为区域尺度土壤属性监测提供了新机遇，但在山区环境下利用EMIT高光谱数据预测土壤重金属浓度的能力尚未得到充分测试。
AI.method: 使用EMIT Level-2A地表反射率数据与DEM-derived地形变量，经变量筛选后，采用随机森林和XGBoost模型，通过重复空间交叉验证进行建模预测。
AI.result: As的最佳模型结合EMIT预测因子与高程，验证R²=0.460；Cu的验证R²=0.188；Zn的验证R²为负值(-0.028)，未能优于均值基准。
AI.conclusion: EMIT对As具有中等预测潜力，对Cu预测价值有限，对Zn仅为探索性映射而非可靠预测能力，在当前样本和预测因子条件下表现受限。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：75%。改进方案：(1)引入更先进的特征选择方法(如竞争性自适应重加权采样CARS或连续投影算法SPA)以提升光谱变量筛选效果；(2)尝试深度学习模型(如CNN或1D-ResNet)挖掘光谱-重金属非线性关系；(3)引入土壤母质/地质背景数据作为辅助变量；(4)对Cu和Zn采用迁移学习策略，利用As模型的迁移知识；(5)增加样本量并采用野外便携式光谱仪地面验证以校正EMIT数据。

title: Beyond Checkerboards: Advantages of Photogrammetric Camera Calibration for Robust 3D Vision and Novel-View Generation
summary: Imagery is fundamental to modern scientific research, making robust intrinsic camera calibration indispensable for accurate visual inference. The checkerboard-based calibration method has long been favored for its simplicity and ease of deployment and is widely used even in mission-critical computer vision pipelines. However, its limitations in modeling high-precision camera geometry can compromise downstream performance in tasks requiring geometric accuracy. In this work, camera calibration is revisited through the lens of photogrammetric self-calibration (PSC), and it is demonstrated that the PSC consistently outperforms the checkerboard method in both accuracy and precision across a range of vision tasks, including 3D reconstruction with structure from motion (SfM), visual simultaneous localization and mapping (SLAM), and novel-view synthesis and reconstruction. Our findings advocate for a paradigm shift toward calibration methods that better reflect the physical and projective properties of camera systems in real-world deployments for critical computer vision applications.

AI.tldr: 本文对比了棋盘格标定法与摄影测量自标定（PSC）方法，证明PSC在精度和准确性上始终优于棋盘格法，并在3D重建、视觉SLAM和新视角合成等视觉任务中表现更优，倡导向更能反映相机系统物理和投影特性的标定方法范式转变。
AI.motivation: 棋盘格标定法虽简单易用，但在建模高精度相机几何方面存在局限性，会损害需要几何精度的下游任务性能。为此，本文重新审视摄影测量自标定（PSC）方法，旨在验证其是否能在精度和准确性上超越传统棋盘格法。
AI.method: 通过系统对比实验，将摄影测量自标定（PSC）与棋盘格标定法在多种视觉任务（包括基于SfM的3D重建、视觉SLAM、新视角合成与重建）中进行精度与准确性的量化比较分析。
AI.result: 摄影测量自标定（PSC）在精度和准确性两个维度上，在所有测试的视觉任务中均一致优于棋盘格标定法。
AI.conclusion: 研究结果倡导向更能反映相机系统物理和投影特性的标定方法进行范式转变，建议在关键计算机视觉应用中放弃棋盘格法，改用PSC。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：90%。遥感领域（如卫星摄影测量、无人机正射影像生成、高分辨率对地观测）对相机标定精度要求极高。可直接将PSC方法应用于遥感相机标定，替代传统棋盘格法；同时可将PSC与遥感中的光束法平差（Bundle Adjustment）结合，进一步提升几何定位精度。此外，PSC无需特殊靶标的特点非常适合无人机载遥感系统在野外环境下的自标定需求。

title: Multi-Modal Multi-Scale Mamba with Frequency and Semantics-Guided Spectral Modeling for Hyperspectral Image Classification
summary: Hyperspectral image (HSI) classification remains a challenging task due to high spectral redundancy, complex spectral–spatial correlations, and the limited availability of labeled samples. To address these issues, this paper proposes a novel framework termed M3-Mamba, which integrates language-guided, multi-level, and Mamba-based spectral modeling for hyperspectral image classification. The proposed M3-Mamba leverages high-level semantic priors derived from multimodal representations to guide discriminative spectral modeling, enabling effective interaction between semantic information and fine-grained spectral features. In addition, a frequency-aware Mamba-based state space module is introduced to efficiently capture long-range spectral dependencies while avoiding the quadratic computational complexity of conventional attention mechanisms. Meanwhile, a text-guided modulation strategy is designed to adaptively reweight spectral responses under semantic guidance, suppressing redundant or noisy bands and enhancing class-relevant spectral responses without compromising spectral fidelity. This semantic-to-spectral modulation allows M3-Mamba to better cope with spectral variability and inter-class confusion. Extensive experiments conducted on four widely used benchmark datasets, including Indian Pines, Pavia University, Salinas, and Houston datasets, demonstrate thatM3-Mamba achieves competitive overall accuracy, average accuracy, and Kappa coefficient under the adopted benchmark settings. Ablation studies further validate the effectiveness of each key component, confirming that the proposed framework demonstrates promising effectiveness for hyperspectral image classification.

AI.tldr: 本文提出M3-Mamba框架，融合语言引导、多层次和基于Mamba的频谱建模，用于高光谱图像分类。通过多模态语义先验引导频谱建模，引入频域感知的Mamba状态空间模块捕捉长距离频谱依赖，并设计文本引导的调制策略抑制噪声波段。在四个基准数据集上取得竞争性结果。
AI.motivation: 高光谱图像分类面临光谱冗余高、光谱-空间相关性复杂以及标注样本有限等问题，现有方法难以高效建模长距离光谱依赖且计算复杂度高。
AI.method: 提出M3-Mamba框架：(1) 利用多模态表示的高层语义先验引导判别性光谱建模；(2) 引入频域感知的Mamba状态空间模块，避免二次计算复杂度；(3) 设计文本引导的调制策略，在语义指导下自适应重加权光谱响应，抑制冗余/噪声波段，增强类别相关响应。
AI.result: 在Indian Pines、Pavia University、Salinas和Houston四个基准数据集上，M3-Mamba在总体精度、平均精度和Kappa系数上均取得竞争性结果。
AI.conclusion: M3-Mamba通过语言引导的多层次Mamba频谱建模有效解决了高光谱分类中的光谱冗余和标注样本有限等问题，消融实验验证了各关键组件的有效性。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：95%。作为遥感领域的直接论文，改进方向包括：(1) 将文本引导调制策略扩展到多模态遥感数据（如SAR+光学）的跨模态光谱-空间建模；(2) 频率感知Mamba模块可进一步与空间Mamba结合，实现光谱-空间联合建模；(3) 可探索引入自监督预训练策略缓解小样本问题；(4) 针对大场景HSI数据，可设计分块处理的Mamba并行化加速方案。

title: WASP-Mamba: A Wavelet-Enhanced Mamba Framework for Remote Sensing Semantic Segmentation
summary: Semantic segmentation of high-resolution remote sensing (HRRS) imagery is a fundamental task in Earth observation but remains challenging due to severe scale variations and complex boundary structures. Although State Space Models (SSMs), particularly Mamba, have shown strong potential for efficient global modeling with linear complexity, existing methods are still limited in capturing multi-scale context and fine-grained spatial details. To address these issues, we propose a novel framework named WASP-Mamba for HRRS image segmentation. A Mamba-based spatial pyramid pooling module is introduced at the encoder bottleneck to enhance multi-scale feature aggregation and improve robustness to scale variations.
