In addition, a wavelet-inspired Mamba decoder is designed to decouple and reconstruct low-frequency semantic information and high-frequency details, mitigating boundary degradation caused by conventional upsampling. Extensive experiments on the LoveDA, ISPRS Vaihingen and ISPRS Potsdam datasets demonstrate that the proposed method achieves 53.90%, 84.32% and 87.06% mIoU, respectively. Compared with recent state-of-the-art methods, WASP-Mamba achieves superior segmentation performance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出WASP-Mamba框架，通过基于Mamba的空间金字塔池化模块增强多尺度特征聚合，以及小波启发的Mamba解码器分离低频语义与高频细节，有效提升高分辨率遥感图像语义分割中尺度变化和边界退化问题，在LoveDA、ISPRS Vaihingen和Potsdam数据集上分别达到53.90%、84.32%和87.06%的mIoU。
AI.motivation: 高分辨率遥感图像语义分割面临严重的尺度变化和复杂边界结构挑战，现有基于状态空间模型（SSM/Mamba）的方法在捕获多尺度上下文和细粒度空间细节方面仍存在局限。
AI.method: 1）编码器瓶颈处引入基于Mamba的空间金字塔池化模块（Mamba-based Spatial Pyramid Pooling），增强多尺度特征聚合和对尺度变化的鲁棒性；2）设计小波启发的Mamba解码器（Wavelet-inspired Mamba Decoder），通过解耦和重建低频语义信息与高频细节，缓解传统上采样导致的边界退化。
AI.result: 在LoveDA数据集上mIoU达53.90%，ISPRS Vaihingen上达84.32%，ISPRS Potsdam上达87.06%，均优于近期SOTA方法。
AI.conclusion: WASP-Mamba通过将Mamba与空间金字塔池化及小波启发解码器结合，有效解决了多尺度上下文和边界细节保留问题，在多个基准数据集上取得了领先的语义分割性能。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：95%。改进方案：1）可进一步引入小波变换与Mamba的深度融合机制，如使用可学习小波滤波器替代固定滤波器以自适应提取多频段特征；2）编码器的空间金字塔池化可扩展为跨层特征金字塔结构，增强不同层级间的多尺度信息流动；3）可探索在解码端加入边界损失函数（如：边界感知Dice Loss）以进一步监督高频细节重建；4）考虑引入轻量化策略（如：剪枝或知识蒸馏）以降低Mamba模块的计算开销，适应星载资源受限场景。

title: Using Contemporary Global Land Cover Products to Improve Forest Mapping at the National Scale: Case Study of Poland
summary: Using accurate land cover data is essential to monitor land use and cover changes and assess the effectiveness of various environmental policies. This study evaluates the accuracy of contemporary global land cover products with 10 m spatial resolution, including Google’s Dynamic World (GDW), European Space Agency’s World Cover (ESA WC) and Esri Land Cover (ELC) in mapping forested areas in Poland, aiming to test an assumption if the combination of these products may improve forest mapping accuracy compared to any individual product. Three global datasets and their combinations were assessed with the 2022 EU Land Use/Cover Area Frame Survey (LUCAS). A land cover map of Poland (S2GLC PL) for 2021 served as an auxiliary reference data set. Forest cover classification accuracy was evaluated using precision, recall, and F1-score metrics, and spatial agreement of binary forest maps in the thematic global products was measured with the Intersection over Union (IoU) at two various scale levels (country and province). Our results showed that forest mapping accuracy of three global products varies for Poland, with F1-score equal to 72.2% for ELC, 76.9% for ESA WC, and 68.8% for GDW. IoU against S2GLC PL was equal to 82.6%, 82.3% and 75.2%, for ELC, ESA WC and GDW, respectively, and slightly exceeded 70.5% for three global products. A specific combination of binary forest maps from global products, where the output forest area consisted of forests mapped at the same time by all three products and forests mapped at the same time only by GDW and ESA WC yielded better accuracy indicators than any single product and other tested combinations (F1-score equal to 80.4%, and IoU against S2GLC PL equal to 87.1%).

AI.tldr: 本研究评估了三种10米分辨率全球土地覆盖产品（GDW、ESA WC、ELC）在波兰森林制图中的精度，发现通过特定组合（三产品共同识别区域 + GDW与ESA WC共同识别区域）可显著提升制图精度（F1-score达80.4%，IoU达87.1%），优于任何单一产品。
AI.motivation: 准确的土地覆盖数据对监测土地利用变化和评估环境政策效果至关重要，但现有全球产品在区域尺度上的森林制图精度尚不明确，且单一产品可能存在局限性，因此需要评估多种产品及其组合方案以提升制图精度。
AI.method: 以波兰为研究区，选取GDW、ESA WC和ELC三种10米分辨率全球土地覆盖产品，以2022年欧盟LUCAS调查数据为主要参考，辅以波兰本土S2GLC PL地图为辅助参考。采用精确率、召回率和F1-score评估森林分类精度，利用IoU在国家和省份两个尺度衡量二值森林图的空间一致性，并测试多种产品组合策略。
AI.result: 单一产品中ESA WC精度最高（F1-score=76.9%），ELC次之（72.2%），GDW最低（68.8%）。IoU指标上ELC略高（82.6%），ESA WC为82.3%，GDW为75.2%。三产品组合中，特定组合（三产品共同区域+GDW和ESA WC共同区域）表现最优，F1-score达80.4%，IoU达87.1%，超过任何单一产品及其他组合。
AI.conclusion: 全球土地覆盖产品在区域尺度存在精度差异，通过合理的多产品组合策略可以显著提升森林制图精度，这为区域尺度的土地覆盖监测提供了更可靠的方案。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：85%。改进方案：（1）将该多产品组合策略应用于遥感森林制图，融合不同传感器/算法的产品以提升精度；（2）在遥感分类中引入类似IoU的空间一致性评估指标进行模型集成；（3）将该组合策略推广到其他土地覆盖类型（如水体、农田、城市）的遥感制图中；（4）结合深度学习模型，将多产品组合作为多源输入特征进行端到端训练。

title: SMMNet: A Plug-and-Play Lightweight Detection Framework for UAV Aerial Imagery
summary: Object detection in UAV aerial imagery is challenged by dense small targets, large-scale variation, complex backgrounds, and strict onboard computation limits. To address these issues, this paper proposes SMMNet (Structured-diffusion Mamba Mixture Network), a lightweight plug-and-play detection framework evaluated with YOLO family detectors. SMMNet contains three modules. The Structured Diffusion Feature Extractor (SDFE) uses anisotropic diffusion to preserve boundary-sensitive features during downsampling. The Mamba-driven Receptive-field Context Aggregator (MRCA) performs multi-directional selective state-space scanning to capture long-range context with linear complexity. The Mask-guided Bayesian Box Refinement (MBBR) applies a MAP-inspired confidence-adaptive box update using MobileSAM mask evidence and ELBO-based false-positive filtering. Using YOLOv13-S as the main detector, SMMNet achieves 32.8% mAP@0.5:0.95 and 52.6% mAP@0.5 on VisDrone2019 at 87 FPS on an NVIDIA A800 GPU, improving the YOLOv13-S baseline by 3.6 and 4.5 points, respectively. The added modules reduce throughput compared with the detector-only baseline (168 FPS), but the resulting 87 FPS remains real-time and provides a favorable accuracy–latency trade-off. Three independent-seed runs further show a mean paired gain of 3.60 ± 0.10 mAP on VisDrone2019, 2.53 ± 0.12 mAP on DroneVehicle, and 2.77 ± 0.06 mAP on SeaDronesSee for the YOLOv13-S setting. Additional experiments on DroneVehicle and SeaDronesSee, together with cross-backbone evaluations on YOLOv5/v6/v7/v8/v10/v11/v13 across different UAV benchmarks, show aligned performance trends under matched settings. Edge deployment on an NVIDIA Jetson Orin NX reaches 30 FPS under TensorRT FP16 inference at 15 W TDP, indicating the suitability of SMMNet for resource-constrained UAV perception.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SMMNet（结构化扩散Mamba混合网络），一种轻量级即插即用目标检测框架，通过结构化扩散特征提取器（SDFE）、Mamba驱动感受野上下文聚合器（MRCA）和掩码引导贝叶斯框精炼（MBBR）三个模块，在VisDrone2019等无人机航拍数据集上显著提升YOLO系列检测器的性能，并在NVIDIA Jetson Orin NX上实现30 FPS的边缘部署。
AI.motivation: 无人机航拍图像中的目标检测面临密集小目标、尺度变化大、背景复杂以及严格的机载计算限制等挑战，现有方法难以同时兼顾精度、实时性和轻量化需求。
AI.method: 提出SMMNet，包含三个核心模块：(1) 结构化扩散特征提取器（SDFE），利用各向异性扩散在下采样过程中保留边界敏感特征；(2) Mamba驱动感受野上下文聚合器（MRCA），通过多方向选择性状态空间扫描以线性复杂度捕获长程上下文；(3) 掩码引导贝叶斯框精炼（MBBR），基于MAP启发的置信度自适应框更新，利用MobileSAM掩码证据和ELBO假阳性过滤。
AI.result: 以YOLOv13-S为主检测器，SMMNet在VisDrone2019上达到32.8% mAP@0.5:0.95和52.6% mAP@0.5，87 FPS（A800），相比基线提升3.6和4.5个点；三次独立运行平均增益3.60±0.10（VisDrone2019）、2.53±0.12（DroneVehicle）、2.77±0.06（SeaDronesSee）；在Jetson Orin NX上15W TDP下达30 FPS。
AI.conclusion: SMMNet作为轻量级即插即用框架，在多个无人机航拍基准上一致提升YOLO系列检测器性能，且能在资源受限的嵌入设备上实时运行，为无人机感知任务提供了有利的精度-延迟权衡方案。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：98%。该论文本身就是面向无人机航拍（遥感的一个子领域）的检测方法，可直接应用于遥感目标检测。改进方案：(1) SDFE可替换或增强遥感图像中地物边缘保持的下采样策略；(2) MRCA可迁移至遥感大场景中的长程依赖建模（如建筑物、道路提取）；(3) MBBR结合弱监督遥感语义分割做框精炼；(4) 可将SMMNet模块适配到遥感专用检测器（如Oriented R-CNN）中处理旋转目标；(5) 在更大尺度遥感数据集（如DOTA、DIOR）上验证泛化性。

title: Enhanced DINO for Cross-Domain Transmission Tower Detection Using Remote Sensing Images
summary: Transmission towers are fundamental components of electric power networks. However, their structure, scale and background textures vary substantially across remote sensing images acquired from different geographic regions. These discrepancies often reduce the detection accuracy of a model trained in one region when it is applied to another region. This paper proposes an enhanced DINO-based framework for cross-domain transmission tower detection that incorporates three lightweight optimisation modules. First, a Query-level Objectness Gating (QOG) module adaptively reweights decoder queries by estimating per-query objectness scores, thereby suppressing background-dominated queries. Second, MPDIoU regression is used to improve the localisation accuracy of elongated transmission tower targets. Third, a Quality-aware Scoring Module (QSM) calibrates classification confidence using predicted localisation-quality logits, thereby reducing high-confidence false detections caused by poor box alignment. Experiments are conducted on two remote sensing image datasets from different geographic regions. Under the 10% target-domain annotation setting, the proposed method achieves a precision of 0.8947, a recall of 0.8199, an F1-score of 0.8556 and an mAP@0.5 of 0.8684, outperforming the original DINO baseline and mainstream detectors including YOLOv8, YOLOv9 and YOLOv11. The results demonstrate that the proposed framework provides an effective solution for robust cross-domain detection of slender transmission tower targets in remote sensing images.

AI.tldr: 本文针对跨域遥感图像中输电塔目标检测精度下降的问题，提出了一种基于增强DINO的框架，通过查询级目标门控(QOG)、MPDIoU回归和质量感知评分模块(QSM)三个轻量化模块，在10%目标域标注设置下实现了0.8947精度、0.8199召回率、0.8556 F1分数和0.8684 mAP@0.5，优于原始DINO和YOLO系列检测器。
AI.motivation: 不同地理区域的遥感图像中，输电塔的结构、尺度和背景纹理差异显著，导致在一个区域训练的模型迁移到另一区域时检测精度大幅下降，亟需一种跨域鲁棒的检测方法。
AI.method: 提出增强DINO框架，包含三个轻量化模块：1) QOG模块通过估计每个查询的目标性得分自适应重新加权解码器查询，抑制背景主导查询；2) MPDIoU回归提升细长输电塔目标的定位精度；3) QSM模块利用预测的定位质量logits校准分类置信度，减少高置信度误检。
AI.result: 在两个不同地理区域的遥感图像数据集上，10%目标域标注设置下精度0.8947、召回率0.8199、F1-score 0.8556、mAP@0.5 0.8684，优于DINO基线及YOLOv8/v9/v11等主流检测器。
AI.conclusion: 所提框架为遥感图像中细长输电塔目标的鲁棒跨域检测提供了有效解决方案。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：95%。本文本身就是遥感领域的输电塔检测论文。可改进方向：1) QOG模块可推广至其他细长人工目标(如电力线、道路、桥梁)的跨域检测；2) MPDIoU回归可替代遥感目标检测中常规IoU计算，尤其适用于长宽比大的目标；3) QSM的置信度校准思路可扩展到其他遥感检测框架(如DETR变体)以减少误检；4) 可进一步引入域自适应技术(如对抗训练或风格迁移)增强跨域泛化能力。

title: TreeFlow: Conditional Flow Matching for 3D Tree Point Cloud Generation from Inventory Attributes
summary: Accurate three-dimensional representations of tree structure are essential for fire modeling, radiative transfer simulation, synthetic data generation, and digital twins of forests, yet detailed 3D structure is rarely available at required scales. Current approaches approximate crowns with smooth geometric primitives, discarding the clumping, gaps, and irregular branching present in real trees. We present TreeFlow, a conditional flow matching model that generates realistic 3D tree point clouds from species, acquisition platform, and height. The model uses a transformer trained on real laser scanning data from the FOR-species20K benchmark to learn a velocity field transporting samples from a Gaussian distribution to the source data distribution. We evaluate generation quality by comparing conditioning and distributional fidelity metrics to scans of real trees. Generated trees match or approach the intra-class baseline on five of six metrics, with a Chamfer distance of 0.581 m versus 0.559 m for real trees of the same genus and height class. Performance is strongest below 25 m and degrades with increasing height. TreeFlow generates individual-tree point clouds conditioned on scalar inventory attributes using a model trained entirely on real laser scanning data.

AI.tldr: TreeFlow是一个基于条件流匹配的模型，能够根据树种、采集平台和树高生成逼真的3D树点云。该模型使用Transformer在真实激光扫描数据上训练，学习从高斯分布到数据分布的流速场，生成的树在六项指标中有五项达到或接近真实树的水平，Chamfer距离为0.581米（真实树为0.559米），在25米以下表现最佳。
AI.motivation: 现有的树木3D结构表示通常使用光滑几何体近似树冠，忽略了真实树木中的聚集、间隙和不规则分枝。详细的三维树结构对于火灾建模、辐射传输模拟、合成数据生成和森林数字孪生至关重要，但目前缺乏可扩展的高保真度3D树木生成方法。
AI.method: TreeFlow采用条件流匹配（conditional flow matching）模型，核心是一个基于Transformer的神经网络，在FOR-species20K基准的真实激光扫描数据上训练，学习一个速度场（velocity field），将高斯分布的样本逐步传输到目标数据分布。模型以物种、采集平台和树高三类标量属性为条件，生成完整的单树点云。
AI.result: 生成的树木在六项评估指标中有五项达到或接近同类真实树的基线水平。Chamfer距离为0.581米（真实树为0.559米），在25米以下高度表现最强，随着高度增加性能下降。
AI.conclusion: TreeFlow是首个完全基于真实激光扫描数据训练的条件生成模型，能够根据标量清单属性生成单树点云，为森林生态学和遥感应用中的高保真度3D树木建模提供了可行方案。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：90%。具体方案：（1）遥感数据增强：TreeFlow生成的3D树点云可作为合成训练数据，用于提升ALS/MLS点云语义分割、树种分类和单体分割模型的泛化能力；（2）辐射传输模拟：生成的精细树结构可替代传统椭球/圆锥树冠模型，用于LiDAR和光学辐射传输模拟（如DART、LESS），提高冠层反射率模拟精度；（3）多源融合：结合高光谱或SAR数据作为额外条件输入，扩展条件空间以生成更具物理一致性的树木点云；（4）高度限制改进：针对25米以上大树表现下降的问题，可引入分层生成策略或更丰富的树高分布训练样本。

title: Fine-Grained Spaceborne SAR Ship Classification into Nine Categories via AIS Association
summary: Spaceborne Synthetic Aperture Radar (SAR) provides all-weather, day and night and wide-area imaging capability, and plays a critical role in maritime surveillance. While substantial progress has been achieved in SAR ship detection, SAR ship classification remains relatively underexplored, mainly due to the scarcity of reliable category labels. Automatic Identification System (AIS) provides vessel identity, type, and dynamic trajectory information, and thus offers vessel type information that is difficult to obtain directly from SAR imagery. This paper proposes a fine-grained nine-category SAR ship classification method based on AIS association, which reorganizes the original AIS vessel types into nine fine-grained categories of SAR ship, transfers AIS vessel type information to SAR detection through a global optimal matching strategy, and supports SAR-only vessel category recognition. By retaining only high-confidence SAR and AIS matched pairs and cropping the corresponding SAR ship chips, an SAR ship classification dataset containing 4472 ship chips across the nine categories is constructed. In Monte Carlo experiments based on real AIS records, the proposed association strategy achieves more reliable high-confidence label generation than the compared association methods under close ship ambiguity, spatial perturbation, distractor AIS candidates, and AIS static size errors. In the benchmark experiment on the constructed classification dataset, ConvNeXt-Tiny achieves the best performance among the compared mainstream classifiers. These results demonstrate that AIS association can provide reliable category supervision for SAR ship classification, and the trained classifier can perform ship classification using SAR imagery alone.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于AIS关联的星载SAR船舶细粒度九分类方法，通过全局最优匹配策略将AIS船舶类型信息迁移至SAR检测结果，构建包含4472个船舶切片的分类数据集，实验验证了该关联策略在多种扰动下生成高置信度标签的可靠性，以及训练后的分类器可仅依赖SAR图像进行船舶分类。
AI.motivation: SAR船舶检测已取得显著进展，但SAR船舶分类研究相对滞后，主要原因是缺乏可靠的类别标签。AIS系统可提供船舶身份、类型和动态轨迹信息，因此本文利用AIS关联来弥补SAR船舶分类中标签稀缺的问题。
AI.method: 1) 将原始AIS船舶类型重新组织为九个细粒度SAR船舶类别；2) 通过全局最优匹配策略将AIS船舶类型信息迁移至SAR检测结果；3) 仅保留高置信度的SAR-AIS匹配对，裁剪对应SAR船舶切片，构建包含4472个船舶切片的九分类数据集；4) 使用ConvNeXt-Tiny等主流分类器进行基准实验。
AI.result: 在基于真实AIS记录的蒙特卡洛实验中，提出的关联策略在近距离船舶模糊、空间扰动、干扰AIS候选和AIS静态尺寸误差等条件下，相比对比方法实现了更可靠的高置信度标签生成。在构建的分类数据集基准实验中，ConvNeXt-Tiny在主流分类器中取得最佳性能。
AI.conclusion: AIS关联能够为SAR船舶分类提供可靠的类别监督，训练后的分类器可仅依靠SAR图像完成船舶分类任务。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：95%。改进方案：1) 当前仅使用AIS静态类型信息，可进一步融合AIS动态轨迹特征（如航速、航向）辅助SAR船舶分类，提升对静止/低速小目标的区分能力；2) 全局最优匹配策略可引入时序信息，利用多时相SAR与AIS的联合匹配提高标签可靠性；3) 可探索自监督或半监督方法，利用大量未匹配的SAR船舶样本进一步优化分类器性能；4) 针对SAR图像中因入射角、极化模式等因素导致的船舶特征变化，可引入域自适应方法增强分类器的泛化能力。

title: Assessing Potential Spatial Conflicts Between Projected Quercus Habitat Suitability and Future Land-Use Patterns in China: A Multi-Scenario MaxEnt–PLUS Simulation
summary: Global warming is driving large-scale shifts in the climatically suitable habitats of many species. However, climate-only species distribution assessments may overestimate the spatial availability of future suitable habitats when dynamic land-use change is not considered. To assess potential spatial overlaps between climate-driven habitat suitability shifts and human land-use patterns, this study focuses on Quercus L. as a widely distributed keystone forest taxon in China. The genus-level assessment was designed to identify broad-scale habitat–land-use conflict patterns under multiple climate pathways and territorial spatial planning scenarios, rather than to predict species-specific distribution responses. We developed a soft-coupled framework integrating the Maximum Entropy (MaxEnt) model and the Patch-generating Land-Use Simulation (PLUS) model, and applied the Habitat–Land-Use Conflict Index (HLCI) as a categorical spatial overlay framework to classify potential overlaps between projected suitable habitats and future land-use categories across 16 exploratory scenario combinations integrating Shared Socioeconomic Pathway (SSP)-based climate projections and land-use/land-cover (LULC) scenarios for the 2040s at the grid scale. The results indicate that: (1) climate warming may reshape Quercus habitat suitability, characterized by northward/westward expansion and southward contraction in some low-latitude regions; (2) future land-use patterns may reduce the spatial availability of projected suitable habitats by increasing their overlap with built-up land and cultivated land. Under high-emission scenarios, potential newly suitable habitats overlapped with built-up land by up to 5.90 × 104 km2 and with cultivated land by up to 36.42 × 104 km2; and (3) the Ecological Protection scenario showed lower overlap with non-ecological land-use categories and a larger area of potentially realizable habitat expansion. This study provides a scenario-based spatial assessment of where future Quercus habitat suitability may overlap with human land-use patterns, offering broad-scale support for adaptive forest conservation and territorial spatial planning.

AI.tldr: 本研究构建了MaxEnt与PLUS模型的软耦合框架，结合多情景分析，评估了气候变化与土地利用变化共同作用下中国栎属适宜栖息地的空间变迁，发现气候变暖将导致栖息地向北/西扩张、南部收缩，而未来土地利用（特别是建设用地和耕地）会显著压缩实际可用栖息地，生态保护情景可有效缓解该冲突。
AI.motivation: 仅基于气候的物种分布评估可能高估未来适宜栖息地的空间可用性，因为忽略了动态的土地利用变化。本研究旨在量化气候驱动的栖息地变化与人类土地利用模式之间的空间重叠，以提供更现实的评估。
AI.method: 采用MaxEnt模型模拟气候驱动的栖息地适宜性，PLUS模型模拟未来土地利用变化，并通过栖息地-土地利用冲突指数（HLCI）进行空间叠置分析。共设置16种情景组合（整合SSP气候路径与LULC情景），在网格尺度上评估2040年代情况。
AI.result: (1) 气候变暖导致栎属适宜栖息地北扩/西扩，低纬度南部区域收缩；(2) 未来土地利用模式（尤其是建设用地和耕地）显著降低适宜栖息地的空间可用性，高排放情景下新增适宜栖息地与建设用地重叠达5.90×10⁴ km²，与耕地重叠达36.42×10⁴ km²；(3) 生态保护情景中与非生态用地类型的重叠较低，可实现更大面积的栖息地扩展。
AI.conclusion: 提供了基于多情景的未来栎属栖息地适宜性与人类土地利用模式之间潜在空间冲突的评估，为适应性森林保护和国土空间规划提供宏观尺度支持。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：95%。该研究本身就是遥感与生态学交叉的典型范例。改进建议：(1) 可引入更高分辨率遥感数据（如Sentinel-2或Landsat 8/9）替代静态LULC产品，动态捕捉土地利用的时空变化细节；(2) 加入MODIS或GEDI遥感植被指数（如NDVI、LAI）作为MaxEnt模型的环境变量，提升栖息地适宜性拟合精度；(3) 利用遥感时序数据验证PLUS模型模拟的土地利用变化结果，提高模拟可信度；(4) 引入遥感反演的微气候数据（如地表温度LST）以弥补粗分辨率气候数据的不足；(5) 考虑利用遥感夜间灯光数据作为人类活动强度的代理变量，优化HLCI冲突指数。

title: 3D Gaussian Splatting for Large-Scale Remote Sensing: A PRISMA-Informed Scoping Review of Scalability, Geometric Reliability, and Benchmarking Across UAV/Aerial and Satellite Imagery
summary: 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) offers efficient explicit rendering, but large-scale remote-sensing use remains fragmented across UAV/aerial photogrammetry, satellite reconstruction, large-scene scaling, surface modeling, and geospatial evaluation. We present a Preferred Reporting Items for Systematic Reviews and Meta-Analyses (PRISMA)-informed scoping review based on 55 core studies identified through Web of Science, Scopus, IEEE Xplore, and supplementary searches completed on 3 June 2026. A faceted taxonomy organizes the literature by platform, sensor model, scalability strategy, and geometric supervision. The synthesis shows that partitioning, hierarchy, compression, and feed-forward inference improve scalability but do not guarantee metric geometry. Reliable deployment additionally requires sensor-consistent projection, geometric or georeferencing constraints, explicit supervision labels, and product-level evaluation. In control-point-free settings, internal consistency should be distinguished from independently validated accuracy. We therefore propose a platform-aware benchmark framework that jointly records visual fidelity, computational cost, metric geometry, product utility, failure behavior, and reproducibility metadata for UAV/aerial, satellite, and hybrid settings.

AI.tldr: 本文对3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS)在遥感领域的应用进行了系统性综述，基于55篇核心文献，构建了分面分类体系，分析了可扩展性策略与几何监督需求，并提出了面向多平台的评估基准框架。
AI.motivation: 3DGS在遥感领域（无人机/航空摄影测量、卫星重建、大规模场景建模等）的应用碎片化，缺乏系统性的综述来整合不同平台、传感器模型、可扩展性策略和几何监督方法。
AI.method: 采用PRISMA-informed范围综述方法，从Web of Science、Scopus、IEEE Xplore等数据库筛选55篇核心文献，构建分面分类体系（平台、传感器模型、可扩展性策略、几何监督），并综合分析了可扩展性方案（分区、层次、压缩、前馈推理）与几何可靠性的关系。
AI.result: 分区、层次、压缩和前馈推理等策略可提升可扩展性，但不能保证度量几何精度；可靠部署需要传感器一致投影、几何/地理配准约束、显式监督标签和产品级评估；在无控制点场景下，内部一致性与独立验证的精度需明确区分。
AI.conclusion: 提出了一个平台感知的基准评估框架，联合记录视觉保真度、计算成本、度量几何精度、产品实用性、失败行为和可复现性元数据，适用于无人机/航空、卫星及混合场景。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：95%。本文本身就是3DGS在遥感领域的系统性综述，其提出的分面分类体系和平台感知基准框架可直接指导遥感3DGS研究：（1）不同遥感平台（无人机、卫星、混合）的3DGS适配方案；（2）无控制点场景下的几何一致性验证方法；（3）可扩展性策略（分区、压缩、前馈推理）在遥感大场景中的选择指南；（4）统一的评估指标体系，涵盖视觉质量、几何精度和计算效率等多维指标。

title: SC-Net: Structural Constrained Contrastive Learning for Landslide Extraction Toward Power Transmission Corridor Safety Monitoring
summary: Landslides are among the most common and destructive geological hazards and pose a significant threat to the long-term stability of infrastructure systems. In particular, long-distance power transmission corridors often traverse mountainous and forested regions, where landslides can endanger tower foundations and transmission line safety. Such landslides predominantly occur in sloped forested areas, where dense vegetation causes severe occlusion that blurs landslide boundaries and creates strong visual similarity with surrounding land covers. Consequently, accurate and efficient landslide identification from remote sensing imagery remains a significant challenge. To address these challenges, we propose a structural constrained contrastive learning network (SC-Net) for reliable landslide extraction from remote sensing images. First, a multi-structural feature extraction module is designed to capture landslide-specific geometric characteristics. These features are further enhanced by fusing multi-scale semantic representations extracted from a pretrained backbone network through an attention-based adaptive feature fusion module. Additionally, a mask-constrained object-level contrastive learning strategy is introduced to enforce global structural consistency at the landslide object-level, thereby improving the discriminability between landslide and non-landslide regions. Extensive experiments conducted on the publicly available CAS landslide dataset demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method. The proposed SC-Net achieves IoU scores of 89.89% and 79.76% on the CAS-UAV and CAS-SAT datasets, respectively, outperforming the best-performing baseline by 2.09% and 0.46%. The proposed method provides an effective solution for large-scale landslide monitoring and demonstrates potential for applications in power transmission corridor inspection and infrastructure safety assessment.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结构约束对比学习网络（SC-Net），用于从遥感影像中可靠提取滑坡信息。该网络包含多结构特征提取模块、注意力自适应特征融合模块和掩码约束的物体级对比学习策略，在CAS滑坡数据集上取得了优于基线方法的性能（CAS-UAV IoU: 89.89%, CAS-SAT IoU: 79.76%），为输电线路走廊巡检和基础设施安全评估提供了有效方案。
AI.motivation: 滑坡是常见且破坏性极强的地质灾害，威胁长距离输电线路等基础设施的长期稳定性。现有遥感滑坡识别方法受限于茂密植被遮挡造成的边界模糊和与周围地物的视觉相似性，难以实现准确高效的滑坡提取。
AI.method: 提出结构约束对比学习网络（SC-Net），包含三部分：(1) 多结构特征提取模块，捕捉滑坡特有的几何特征；(2) 基于注意力机制的自适应特征融合模块，融合预训练骨干网络提取的多尺度语义特征；(3) 掩码约束的物体级对比学习策略，在滑坡物体级别强制执行全局结构一致性，增强滑坡与非滑坡区域的可区分性。
AI.result: 在公开CAS滑坡数据集上，SC-Net在CAS-UAV和CAS-SAT数据集上分别达到89.89%和79.76%的IoU分数，分别超过最佳基线方法2.09%和0.46%。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的SC-Net为大范围滑坡监测提供了有效解决方案，并在输电线路走廊巡检和基础设施安全评估方面展示出应用潜力。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：95%。本文本身就是遥感滑坡提取论文，改进方案：(1) 可将结构约束对比学习扩展到多时相遥感数据，实现滑坡动态监测；(2) 注意力自适应融合模块可引入多模态数据（如SAR+光学）融合，提升云雾遮挡下的识别能力；(3) 物体级对比学习策略可迁移至其他地质灾害（如泥石流、崩塌）的遥感识别任务；(4) 可结合激光雷达点云数据增强三维结构特征提取，进一步提升在复杂地形下的分割精度。

title: Multi-Level Classification of Urban Green Space Using Multi-Source Remote Sensing and Geospatial Data
summary: Urban Green Spaces (UGSs) monitoring usually focuses on the extraction of vegetation in the physical layer, while neglecting their functional attributes. This renders the monitoring results unable to objectively reflect the rationality of UGS planning. To address these issues, this study proposes a multi-level classification method integrating multi-source remote sensing and geospatial big data to bridge the semantic gap between the physical layer and the functional layer. In this method, a strategy of prior knowledge injection and semantic reconstruction was developed through the fine-tuning of a BERT model with cross-mapping rules. This strategy aims to classify the urban area into 24 functional categories, generating the social-functional basemap in a functional layer, based on Point of Interest (POI), OpenStreetMap (OSM), and Global Urban Boundary (GUB). Meanwhile, a novel deep learning architecture, namely the Multi-Shape and Spectral Aware Network (MSSANet), was designed for precise vegetation classification of UGSs in the physical layer. Finally, a “function-first, vegetation-second” coupling paradigm containing three functional attribute layers, referring to the Code for Classification of UGS in China (CJJ/T 85-2017), was established. This paradigm integrates the social-functional basemap with physical vegetation patches to build a multi-level UGS classification framework, i.e., the 5 major UGS categories, 11 intermediate UGS categories, and 24 fine-grained UGS sub-categories. Experiments conducted in Jinan and Qingdao, China, demonstrate the efficacy of the proposed method for refined multi-level UGS mapping.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种融合多源遥感和地理大数据的多层次城市绿地分类方法，通过BERT模型微调实现POI/OSM数据的社会功能语义重建，并设计MSSANet网络进行物理层植被精细分类，最终建立“功能优先、植被其次”的耦合范式，在济南和青岛实现了5大类、11中类、24小类的多层次城市绿地制图。
AI.motivation: 现有城市绿地监测仅关注物理层植被提取，忽略了功能属性，导致监测结果无法客观反映绿地规划合理性。本文旨在弥合物理层与功能层之间的语义鸿沟。
AI.method: 1) 基于BERT微调与交叉映射规则，融合POI、OSM、GUB数据生成24类社会功能底图；2) 设计多形状与光谱感知网络(MSSANet)进行物理层植被精细分类；3) 建立“功能优先、植被其次”耦合范式，依据中国绿地分类标准(CJJ/T 85-2017)实现三级多层次分类。
AI.result: 在济南和青岛的实验验证了该方法在多层次精细化城市绿地制图方面的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 融合多源遥感与地理大数据并引入先验知识注入与语义重建策略，能够有效弥合物-功能语义鸿沟，为城市绿地规划合理性评估提供更客观的制图支撑。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：85%。改进方案：1) MSSANet可进一步引入多时序遥感数据(如Sentinel-2时间序列)增强植被物候特征的感知能力；2) BERT语义重建可扩展至社交媒体文本数据(如微博签到)以丰富功能类别；3) 耦合范式可引入城市热岛效应因子，将绿地降温功能纳入功能属性层；4) 该方法可推广至城市生态廊道识别与绿色基础设施规划评估。

title: Impacts of Extreme Climate on NDVI in China—Response Patterns and Threshold Effects
summary: Studying the impact of extreme climate events on vegetation dynamics is crucial for maintaining ecosystem stability. Based on ERA5-Land temperature and precipitation data, as well as MOD13C2 data, this study employs Pearson correlation analysis, wavelet analysis, and the XGBoost-SHAP model to analyze the response of the Normalized Difference Vegetation Index (NDVI) in China to extreme climate variations. The findings reveal the following. (1) NDVI increased steadily at a rate of 0.021/10 yr from 2001 to 2024. Extreme temperature and precipitation indices show an increasing trend in most regions. (2) NDVI was positively correlated with most extreme temperature and precipitation indices, and showed a significant negative correlation exclusively with Frost Days FDO (Frost Days) and CDD (Consecutive Dry Days). (3) R25 (Number of Heavy Precipitation Days) and SDII (Simple daily intensity index) are the primary drivers of nationwide NDVI changes, with contribution rates of 31.6% and 12.5%. Extreme climate indices can significantly affect vegetation growth when surpassing certain thresholds. For instance, the thresholds for R25 and SDII are 1.85 days and 4.35 mm/day. This study provides a scientific basis for understanding and managing vegetation responses to increasing climate extremes.

AI.tldr: 基于2001-2024年ERA5-Land气候数据和MODIS NDVI数据，利用Pearson相关、小波分析和XGBoost-SHAP模型，分析了中国NDVI对极端气候变化的响应。NDVI以0.021/10yr速率增长，R25和SDII是主要驱动因子（贡献率31.6%和12.5%），超过阈值（R25>1.85天，SDII>4.35 mm/day）时极端气候显著影响植被生长。
AI.motivation: 研究极端气候事件对植被动态的影响对于维持生态系统稳定性至关重要，当前缺乏对中国区域NDVI与极端气候指数之间非线性关系及阈值效应的深入理解。
AI.method: 采用Pearson相关分析、小波分析以及XGBoost-SHAP模型，基于ERA5-Land温度和降水数据及MOD13C2数据，分析中国NDVI对极端气候变化的响应。
AI.result: (1) NDVI以0.021/10yr速率稳步增长，极端气温和降水指数在大部分区域呈上升趋势；(2) NDVI与多数极端指数正相关，仅与FDO（霜冻日数）和CDD（连续干日）显著负相关；(3) R25（强降水日数）和SDII（简单日强度指数）是全国NDVI变化的主要驱动因子，贡献率分别为31.6%和12.5%，且存在阈值效应（R25>1.85天，SDII>4.35 mm/day）。
AI.conclusion: 本研究为理解和应对植被对日益增加的气候极端事件的响应提供了科学依据。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：95%。改进方案：(1) 可引入多源遥感数据（如GOCI、Sentinel-2）提高NDVI时空分辨率，捕捉更精细的植被响应特征；(2) 结合遥感反演的地表温度（LST）和土壤水分产品替代再分析数据，减少数据同化误差；(3) 扩展至GPP、SIF等遥感植被生产力指标，深化对碳循环过程的认知；(4) 利用遥感分类产品分植被类型（森林、草地、农田）进行差异化分析，提升模型针对性。

title: RepLite-YOLO: A Parameter-Efficient Residual-Enhanced Detector for Ship Recognition in Remote Sensing Imagery
summary: Remote sensing ship detection plays a pivotal role in maritime surveillance, safety assurance, and traffic management. However, current detection methods often face significant challenges due to complex sea-surface background noise, large target-scale variations, and edge-hardware limitations. In this paper, we propose RepLite-YOLO, a lightweight detection framework based on YOLOv11n. Specifically, to alleviate irreversible spatial information loss during downsampling, we adopt the ADown module, originally introduced in YOLOv9, to generate spatially complementary features through its two-branch downsampling mechanism. This design helps preserve salient hull-edge responses while suppressing part of the random sea-surface interference, thereby improving feature robustness for small ship targets. To achieve substantial structural streamlining while maintaining competitive representational capacity under strict hardware constraints, we design the C3k2_OREPA_RS module, utilizing online re-parameterization (OREPA) to efficiently reconstruct deep layers without additional re-parameterization-induced inference operations. Furthermore, we construct the ELANFusion_Block by integrating Depthwise Separable Convolutions (DSC) into the ELAN paradigm to alleviate the multi-scale aggregation bottleneck, and tailor the Detect_DWLite head for highly compressed decoupled prediction. Experimental results show that RepLite-YOLO achieves a favorable balance between detection accuracy and computational efficiency. Compared with YOLOv11n, it reduces the number of parameters by 57.4% and GFLOPs by 49.2%, while maintaining competitive detection accuracy with slight mAP@50 improvements of 1.2 and 1.3 percentage points on the Vessel dataset and Ship Detection dataset, respectively.

AI.tldr: 本文提出RepLite-YOLO轻量级遥感船舶检测框架，基于YOLOv11n，通过ADown模块、C3k2_OREPA_RS模块、ELANFusion_Block和Detect_DWLite检测头等改进，在Vessel和Ship Detection数据集上，参数量减少57.4%、GFLOPs减少49.2%，mAP@50分别提升1.2和1.3个百分点。
AI.motivation: 遥感船舶检测面临复杂海面背景噪声、目标尺度变化大、边缘硬件资源受限等挑战，现有检测方法难以同时兼顾检测精度与计算效率。
AI.method: 1) 采用ADown模块（来自YOLOv9的双分支下采样机制）保留船体边缘响应并抑制海面干扰；2) 设计C3k2_OREPA_RS模块，利用在线重参数化（OREPA）在严格硬件约束下实现结构精简；3) 构建ELANFusion_Block，将深度可分离卷积（DSC）融入ELAN范式缓解多尺度聚合瓶颈；4) 设计Detect_DWLite轻量化解耦检测头。
AI.result: 在Vessel数据集和Ship Detection数据集上，相比YOLOv11n，参数量减少57.4%，GFLOPs减少49.2%，mAP@50分别提升1.2和1.3个百分点。
AI.conclusion: RepLite-YOLO在遥感船舶检测任务上实现了检测精度与计算效率的良好平衡，验证了轻量化设计在边缘部署场景下的有效性。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：100%。改进方案：1) ADown模块的双分支下采样机制可推广到其他遥感目标检测任务（如车辆、飞机检测），保留关键边缘特征的同时抑制背景噪声；2) C3k2_OREPA_RS的在线重参数化策略适用于遥感场景中的多尺度特征融合，可进一步与注意力机制（如SE、CBAM）结合增强遥感目标判别性；3) ELANFusion_Block中DSC的引入思路可用于遥感语义分割或变化检测任务的轻量化骨干设计；4) Detect_DWLite检测头可适配遥感旋转目标检测（如R-CNN系列）的解耦预测头，减少参数量。

title: HCA-YOLO: A Hierarchical Cross-Scale Attention Learning Framework for UAV Detection
summary: The accurate detection of unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs) in various sizes played an important role in the practical applications. Yet the preceding works suffered from the missing inference, the false alarms, and the poor accuracy due to the the adverse scene conditions, as well as the mutable scales. To solve the problems, a hierarchical attention promoted cross-scale learning framework was proposed in this paper. First, the hierarchical attention mechanism was introduced in the backbone to generate the multi-scale features of targets, so they can be discerned and located at different scales. The resulting features were further delivered to the neck, in which two branches of features were built, respectively. The former was obtained by the target-specific feature operator, while the latter was generated by the upsampling operation. The dual branches were further connected in the quasi-residual structure. So the content of targets can be protected well, and the detail information can be reconstructed. Finally, the dynamic focusing loss measurement was presented to regress the bounding box of the target, so the learning effectiveness of presented the architecture can be promoted. To verify the proposed method, multiple rounds of experiments were performed. The results demonstrated that small and weak drones can be detected accurately, especially in adverse lighting and weather conditions. The evaluation metric of mean average precision rate (mAP) can be improved by 18.5% (YOLO6) on the collected dataset.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种层级注意力驱动的跨尺度学习框架，用于解决复杂场景下多尺寸无人机检测中的漏检、虚警和精度低问题。该框架通过层级注意力机制生成多尺度特征，结合准残差连接的双分支特征融合结构，并引入动态聚焦损失函数，在恶劣光照和天气条件下显著提升了小目标无人机的检测精度，mAP相比YOLOv6提升18.5%。
AI.motivation: 现有无人机检测方法在复杂场景（恶劣光照、天气）下面对不同尺寸目标时，存在漏检、虚警和精度不足的问题，尤其是多尺度变化导致的小目标检测困难。
AI.method: 1) 在主干网络引入层级注意力机制生成多尺度特征；2) 颈部网络构建双分支特征（目标特定特征算子分支+上采样分支），通过准残差结构连接以保护目标内容并重建细节信息；3) 提出动态聚焦损失函数用于边界框回归，提升学习效果。
AI.result: 在自建数据集上，相比YOLOv6，mAP提升18.5%，在恶劣光照和天气条件下对小尺寸无人机检测精度显著提高。
AI.conclusion: 所提层级注意力跨尺度学习框架能有效解决复杂场景下多尺寸无人机检测问题，尤其对小目标检测效果优异。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：90%。该框架可直接应用于遥感领域的小目标检测（如卫星图像中的车辆、船只、建筑物等），改进方向：1) 将层级注意力机制适配到遥感多尺度特征提取中，解决遥感图像中目标尺度差异大的问题；2) 双分支准残差结构可用于遥感图像的超分辨率重建与细节增强；3) 动态聚焦损失可迁移至遥感目标检测的边界框回归任务，提升对密集小目标的定位精度。

title: Remote Sensing-Based Identification of Spatial Spillovers and Transmission Pathways in the Heat–Energy–Carbon Nexus: Evidence from the Yangtze River Delta
summary: The urban heat island (UHI) effect represents a critical urban climate phenomenon arising from the combined pressures of rapid urbanization and climate warming. Although its association with carbon emissions has received increasing scholarly attention, the underlying behavior-mediated pathways and cross-regional spillover patterns remain insufficiently understood. Using multi-source geospatial data for the Yangtze River Delta urban agglomeration from 2014 to 2023, this study develops a multi-scale analytical framework integrating 1 km urban agglomeration exploratory analysis and 5 km spatial econometric modeling. Anthropogenic Energy Activity Intensity (AEAI) is constructed as a proxy for energy-related human activities, and a spatial Durbin model, combined with a spatial mediation approach, is employed to examine the spatial associations and statistically mediated pathways within the “heat-energy-carbon” nexus. The results indicate that: (1) carbon emissions exhibit significant positive spatial spillover effects, consistent with thermal diffusion processes and socioeconomic network interactions; (2) AEAI represents a substantial partial statistical mediation pathway in the association between UHI and carbon emissions, accounting for 44.63% of the total association. This suggests that the UHI–carbon emission linkage is partly embedded in spatial patterns of energy-intensive human activities rather than reflecting a purely direct thermal effect. These findings suggest that regional climate governance may need to move beyond single-city interventions and purely physical cooling strategies toward integrated approaches that combine cross-regional coordination with behavioral regulation. Promoting passive cooling-oriented urban planning and demand-side energy transitions may help reduce carbon lock-in risks and support the development of climate-resilient urban agglomerations.

AI.tldr: 本研究利用长三角城市群2014-2023年多源地理空间数据，构建多尺度分析框架，通过空间杜宾模型和空间中介效应，揭示城市热岛效应与碳排放之间的“热-能-碳”关联机制，发现人为能源活动强度是两者关联的重要中介路径（占比44.63%），且存在显著的空间溢出效应。
AI.motivation: 尽管城市热岛效应与碳排放的关联已受到关注，但其中的行为中介路径和跨区域溢出模式尚未被充分理解，亟需从多尺度和空间计量角度深入探究其内在机制。
AI.method: 采用1km城市群探索性分析和5km空间计量建模的多尺度分析框架；构建人为能源活动强度（AEAI）作为代理变量；运用空间杜宾模型结合空间中介效应方法，检验“热-能-碳”关联中的空间依赖和统计中介路径。
AI.result: （1）碳排放呈现显著的正向空间溢出效应，与热扩散过程和社会经济网络互动一致；（2）AEAI在城市热岛与碳排放关联中承担显著的部分统计中介作用，占总关联的44.63%，表明该关联部分嵌入在能源密集型人类活动的空间格局中，而非纯粹的直接热效应。
AI.conclusion: 区域气候治理需要超越单一城市干预和纯物理冷却策略，转向跨区域协调与行为调控相结合的综合方法；推广被动冷却导向的城市规划和需求侧能源转型有助于降低碳锁定风险，支持气候韧性城市群发展。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：95%。该框架可直接迁移至遥感领域：一是利用热红外遥感（如Landsat、MODIS）反演地表温度替代气象站数据，提升UHI空间分辨率；二是引入遥感估算的碳排放产品（如OCO-2、GOSAT）或夜间灯光数据（NPP-VIIRS）作为碳排指标；三是将AEAI构建与遥感土地利用分类、能耗热异常监测结合；四是空间杜宾模型可扩展至遥感影像的空间自相关分析和溢出效应量化，适用于全球城市群比较研究。

title: Integrating Commercial and Public Imagery to Accelerate Deforestation Alerts
summary: Generating satellite-based deforestation alerts with actionable latency requires frequent imaging, creating an imperative to use different sensors together. We introduce a simple and open-source framework called the Disturbance Index Alert System (DIAS), which is based upon transformation of imagery from different sources into an interoperable stream of Disturbance Index (DI) values. Whereas most alert systems target divergence of forested pixels from historical states, DIAS targets movement of a pixel’s Z-score position relative to the image-wide population of forest pixels along a forest-sensitive axis. This strategy provides the following practical benefits: (1) it reduces the need to process the historical archive; (2) it reduces dependence upon stable sensor calibration; (3) it allows Z-score-based DI values to be combined across sensors; and (4) it accommodates changes to the group of sensors providing measurements. We demonstrated in Madagascar that sensor integration through DIAS can provide more timely alerts than both conventional individual-sensor systems and additive combination of such systems. Across our study sites, using a commercial source of daily imaging (PlanetScope) in conjunction with imagery from public sources (Landsat, Sentinels-1 and -2) allowed high-confidence detection (false alert rate of approximately 20%) of two-thirds of deforestation occurring at 10 m reference pixels within one month; 40% were detected in that timeframe with public data alone. As commercial options for Earth observation proliferate, flexible and computationally lightweight approaches such as DIAS are needed to accommodate diverse and sometimes only loosely calibrated instruments in support of timely forest monitoring.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个名为DIAS的开源框架，通过将不同卫星传感器的影像转换为可互操作的干扰指数（DI）Z分数流，实现快速生成森林砍伐警报。在马达加斯加的验证表明，结合商业（PlanetScope）和公共（Landsat、Sentinel-1/2）卫星数据，DIAS能以约20%的误报率在一个月内检测到三分之二的森林砍伐事件，比传统单一传感器系统更及时。
AI.motivation: 生成具有可操作延迟的基于卫星的森林砍伐警报需要频繁成像，这迫使必须使用不同的传感器协同工作。现有警报系统大多针对森林像素与历史状态的偏离，但依赖历史存档和稳定传感器校准，难以整合多源数据。
AI.method: 提出Disturbance Index Alert System (DIAS)框架，基于将不同来源的影像转换为互操作的Disturbance Index (DI) Z分数。核心策略是计算像素相对于图像中森林像素群体在森林敏感轴上的Z分数位置，而非传统的历史偏离方法。该方法减少了历史存档处理需求、降低了对稳定传感器校准的依赖、允许Z分数DI值跨传感器组合，并能适应传感器组的变化。
AI.result: 在马达加斯加的实验表明：DIAS的传感器集成比传统单一传感器系统和简单加性组合系统提供更及时的警报；结合PlanetScope（商业）与Landsat、Sentinel-1/2（公共）数据，可在一个月内以约20%误报率检测到三分之二的森林砍伐；仅用公共数据可在同一时间框架内检测到40%。
AI.conclusion: 随着商业地球观测选项的激增，需要像DIAS这样灵活且计算轻量的方法来适应多样化且校准不严格的仪器，以支持及时的森林监测。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：95%。改进方案：（1）将DIAS的Z分数策略引入遥感森林变化检测领域，解决多源传感器数据融合中的校准不一致问题；（2）DIAS的像素-群体统计对比思路可扩展到其他遥感变化检测场景，如城市扩张、水体变化、作物监测等；（3）可进一步探索将DIAS与深度学习变化检测方法结合，利用Z分数作为轻量级特征输入；（4）研究将DIAS应用于高光谱或SAR数据（已部分验证Sentinel-1）的适配性；（5）优化Z分数阈值自适应策略，降低当前约20%的误报率。

title: Detection of Bark Beetle Attacks Using Time-Aggregated Satellite Data with Machine Learning
summary: In this study, we explored how early bark beetle attacks can be detected using weekly aggregated Sentinel-2 data in combination with static data, such as geo- and forestry data. We used an XGBoost classifier, known for its strength and reliability in classification, and compared three sets of data: static data only, satellite data only, and using both together. Having trained the models on cumulative weekly data, we were able to track changes in model performance and feature importance over time, identifying key weeks for the detection of bark beetle attacks. A systematic overview of feature importance identified the Red-edge 3 and blue Sentinel-2 bands as the most important when combined with static data; it also showed changes in feature importance compared to using satellite-only data, e.g., adding static features reduced the importance of red and red-edge 2 bands. Among the static features, land cover and landforms were the most important. Evaluating the temporal features for the combined model highlighted certain weeks as containing key information for detection: week 19, which was the main swarming week; week 25, which is 6 weeks after swarming and just before the second generation is completed; and weeks 31 and 33, more than 3 months after the tree was attacked and well after the new generation has swarmed. The study shows that combining static features with cumulative Sentinel-2, accumulated across weeks, are all important for improving the detection of bark beetle attacks, and that such ideas form an important part of early warning systems.

AI.tldr: 本研究利用每周累积的Sentinel-2卫星数据与静态地理/林业数据，结合XGBoost分类器检测早期树皮甲虫侵害。结果表明，红边3和蓝色波段是最重要的卫星特征，静态特征中土地覆盖和地貌最重要。关键检测周包括第19周（ swarm期）、第25周（第二代完成前）以及第31、33周（攻击后3个月以上），综合使用静态与卫星数据可显著提升检测性能，为早期预警系统提供重要支持。
AI.motivation: 早期树皮甲虫侵害的快速准确检测对森林保护至关重要，但现有方法往往依赖单一数据源或难以捕捉侵害的时序演化特征。本研究旨在探索静态地理/林业数据与每周累积Sentinel-2时序数据的组合能否提升检测性能，并确定关键的时间窗口。
AI.method: 采用XGBoost分类器，对比三组数据（仅静态、仅卫星、两者结合）；使用每周累积Sentinel-2数据训练模型，追踪模型性能和特征重要性随时间的演变；系统分析特征重要性排序，并识别关键检测周的时间窗口。
AI.result: 结合模型中，红边3和蓝色Sentinel-2波段最重要；添加静态特征降低了红色和红边2波段的重要性；静态特征中土地覆盖和地貌最为关键；第19、25、31、33周为检测的关键时间窗口。
AI.conclusion: 将静态特征与每周累积的Sentinel-2数据相结合对提高树皮甲虫侵害检测性能至关重要，该方法可作为早期预警系统的重要组成部分。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：95%。该研究直接以遥感数据为核心，可作为遥感的直接应用案例。改进方向：（1）引入多时相SAR数据（如Sentinel-1）以克服云覆盖对光学数据的影响；（2）采用深度学习模型（如时序Transformer或LSTM）更好地捕捉光谱时序变化模式；（3）增加空间上下文信息（如邻域像素的侵害扩散特征）以提升检测空间一致性；（4）引入高光谱或更高分辨率数据以增强红边和短波红外波段的敏感性。

title: Semantic Consistency and Uncertainty-Driven Small-Object Detection for Class Imbalance
summary: In aerial image small-object detection, complex imaging perspectives, arbitrary object orientations, and long-tailed category distributions jointly exacerbate sample imbalance, which significantly degrades detection stability and leads to frequent misclassification of minority categories. To address these challenges, this paper proposes a novel training framework termed SCUD. Specifically, in the label noise suppression strategy (LNSS), a contrastive learning mechanism based on semantic consistency is introduced to constrain the aggregation of similar samples in the feature space, thereby reducing the adverse impact of noisy samples on model optimization. In addition, a scale-aware resampling strategy (SARS) is designed to alleviate noise amplification and overfitting caused by excessive repetition of small objects during training. Furthermore, an adaptive instance selection mechanism (AISM) is developed by jointly modeling prediction uncertainty and global statistical priors, enabling the model to dynamically emphasize learning from informative samples. Extensive experiments are conducted on two publicly available unmanned aerial vehicle (UAV) aerial image datasets to validate the effectiveness of the proposed approach. The proposed method achieves an mAP50 of 70.7% on the DOTA-v1.0 dataset and 88.1% on the DIOR dataset. Notably, the detection accuracy of several rare categories is significantly improved, further demonstrating the effectiveness of the proposed method in addressing sample imbalance in aerial image small-object detection.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SCUD训练框架，通过标签噪声抑制策略（LNSS）、尺度感知重采样策略（SARS）和自适应实例选择机制（AISM）解决航拍图像小目标检测中的样本不平衡问题，在DOTA-v1.0和DIOR数据集上分别达到70.7%和88.1%的mAP50，显著提升了少数类别的检测精度。
AI.motivation: 航拍图像小目标检测中，复杂成像视角、任意目标朝向和长尾类别分布共同加剧了样本不平衡，导致检测稳定性下降和少数类别频繁误分类。
AI.method: 提出SCUD训练框架，包含三个核心模块：1) LNSS：基于语义一致性的对比学习机制，约束相似样本在特征空间中的聚合，降低噪声样本影响；2) SARS：尺度感知重采样策略，缓解小目标重复导致的噪声放大和过拟合；3) AISM：联合预测不确定性和全局统计先验的自适应实例选择机制，动态强调信息样本的学习。
AI.result: 在DOTA-v1.0数据集上mAP50达70.7%，在DIOR数据集上达88.1%，多个稀有类别的检测精度显著提升。
AI.conclusion: SCUD框架有效解决了航拍图像小目标检测中的样本不平衡问题，尤其对少数类别的检测性能提升明显，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：95%。该论文本身就是遥感领域（航拍/无人机图像目标检测）的论文，改进方向包括：1) 可将AISM中的不确定性建模与遥感多尺度特征融合（如FPN）结合，进一步提升小目标定位精度；2) LNSS的语义一致性对比学习可扩展到遥感场景分类或语义分割任务，缓解遥感数据中类别不平衡问题；3) SARS重采样策略可与旋转目标检测（如Rotated RPN）结合，处理遥感图像中任意朝向目标的尺度失衡；4) 考虑引入遥感图像的时空信息（如多时相数据）增强对比学习的语义一致性约束。

title: Sequence-Aware Deep Learning for Field-Scale Surface Soil Moisture Estimation from Sentinel-1, HLS, and Ancillary Data
summary: Accurate field-scale surface soil moisture (SSM) measures are important for agricultural water management. Conventional satellite SSM products remain too coarse for within-field applications. Here, we developed sequence-aware deep learning models for growing-season SSM estimation by fusing data from Sentinel-1 C-band SAR, harmonized Landsat-8/Sentinel-2 (HLS), and local ancillary datasets. We assembled a multi-source dataset on Sentinel-1 overpass time for 2016–2024 (May–September), yielding 1469 samples and 65 features per sample, including SAR and optical features, meteorological data, soil texture and bulk density, topography, crop labels, irrigation-likelihood flag, and irregular-time-step encoding. We compared long short-term memory (LSTM) and temporal convolutional neural network (TCN) architectures together with attention-augmented variants, including feature attention (FA), temporal attention (TA), and the combined feature–temporal attention (FTA). Models were trained and tested on seven years of data and were validated based on a temporal generalization using combined data of a wet year (2016) and a dry year (2023). The best model, FTA-TCN, achieved R2 = 0.851, RMSE = 0.024 m3.m−3, and MAE = 0.020 m3.m−3 on the withheld validation years, outperforming the base LSTM (R2 = 0.422; RMSE = 0.053 m3.m−3; MAE = 0.043 m3.m−3) and the base TCN (R2 = 0.746; RMSE = 0.034 m3.m−3; MAE = 0.022 m3.m−3). Shapley additive explanations (SHAP) analysis indicated that antecedent precipitation and short-term rainfall accumulations were dominant forcings, while soil texture, elevation, incidence angle, and vegetation indices modulated SSM variability. Satellite-derived features accounted for ~28.5% of aggregated SHAP importance. Overall, the results show that dual-attention temporal convolution can capture field-scale SSM dynamics across wet and dry seasons when satellite signals are coupled with local soil-meteorological-management context.

AI.tldr: 本文提出融合Sentinel-1 SAR、HLS光学影像及本地辅助数据的序列感知深度学习模型（FTA-TCN），实现田块尺度地表土壤水分（SSM）的高精度估计，在验证年份上R²达0.851，RMSE为0.024 m³/m³，优于基线LSTM和TCN模型。
AI.motivation: 传统卫星SSM产品空间分辨率过粗，无法满足田块尺度的农业水管理需求，亟需开发高精度、可泛化的田间尺度SSM估计方法。
AI.method: 构建多源数据集（2016-2024年5-9月，1469样本/65特征），包含SAR/光学特征、气象、土壤质地、地形、作物标签、灌溉标志及不规则时间步编码；对比LSTM、TCN及其注意力增强变体（FA、TA、FTA）；最优模型为FTA-TCN（特征-时间双注意力+时序卷积）；SHAP分析特征重要性。
AI.result: FTA-TCN在验证年（2016湿年+2023干年）达到R²=0.851，RMSE=0.024 m³/m³，MAE=0.020 m³/m³；SAR-光学等卫星特征贡献约28.5%的聚合SHAP重要性；前期降水与短期降雨累积为最主要驱动因子。
AI.conclusion: 双注意力时序卷积网络能有效捕捉干湿季节田块尺度SSM动态，融合卫星信号与本地土壤-气象-管理背景信息是提升精度的关键。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：95%。作为遥感论文，改进方向包括：(1)引入更高时间分辨率的SAR数据（如Sentinel-1A/B联合）或多极化特征进一步提升时序密度；(2)尝试物理引导的深度学习（如将土壤水分物理模型嵌入损失函数）以增强泛化能力；(3)将方法扩展至不同气候区或灌溉制度区域验证泛化性；(4)利用自监督预训练策略缓解标注样本稀缺问题；(5)探索轻量化模型部署于星上或边缘计算设备实现近实时监测。

title: Characterizing Short-Duration Summer Rainstorms in Nanjing, China, Using Multi-Source Remote Sensing and Explainable AI
summary: With global warming and rapid urbanization, short-duration summer rainstorms are becoming more intense and localized, posing growing challenges to urban flood resilience. However, their spatiotemporal characteristics, vertical structures, and environmental drivers remain poorly understood. Here, we combine multi-source remote sensing datasets and China’s new-generation satellite-borne dual-frequency precipitation radar observations to investigate summer rainstorms in Nanjing, China, during 2017–2024. Results reveal pronounced spatiotemporal heterogeneity, with higher rainfall intensities concentrated over urban and adjacent areas. During the study period, rainstorm intensity and duration increased by 7.44% and 38.63%, respectively, while the affected area decreased by 8.18%, indicating a transition toward more localized yet more intense rainfall events. Environmental analyses suggest that large-scale thermodynamic conditions and regional topographic forcing provide a favorable background for convection development, while local urban thermal effects may further modulate rainfall enhancement. Three-dimensional radar detection of an illustrative rainstorm event indicates an inverted-cone vertical structure, suggesting a mixed convective-stratiform precipitation structure involving both warm-rain and ice-phase processes. An Explainable Bayesian-Optimized XGBoost (EBOX) model further identifies near-surface air temperature and specific humidity as the primary environmental factors associated with rainstorm occurrence and development. Overall, this study highlights the value of integrating satellite remote sensing with explainable artificial intelligence to improve understanding of urban extreme rainfall and provide new insights into how climate change, topography, and urbanization jointly shape precipitation extremes in rapidly urbanizing monsoon regions.

AI.tldr: 本文结合多源遥感数据集和中国新一代星载双频降水雷达观测数据，研究了2017-2024年南京夏季暴雨的时空特征、垂直结构及环境驱动因素。结果显示暴雨强度增加7.44%、持续时间增加38.63%，但影响面积减少8.18%，呈现局地化增强趋势。利用可解释贝叶斯优化XGBoost（EBOX）模型识别出近地面气温和比湿度是暴雨发生发展的主要环境因子。
AI.motivation: 全球变暖和快速城市化背景下，短时夏季暴雨变得更加剧烈和局地化，对城市洪涝韧性构成挑战，但其时空特征、垂直结构和环境驱动因素尚不清楚。
AI.method: 结合多源遥感数据集和中国新一代星载双频降水雷达（GPM DPR）观测数据；利用可解释贝叶斯优化XGBoost（EBOX）模型识别关键环境因子；通过三维雷达探测分析暴雨事件的垂直结构。
AI.result: 暴雨强度和持续时间分别增加7.44%和38.63%，影响面积减少8.18%；暴雨呈现倒锥形垂直结构，为混合对流-层状降水结构；近地面气温和比湿度是主要环境关联因子。
AI.conclusion: 本研究展示了将卫星遥感与可解释人工智能相结合以提升对城市极端降水理解的潜力，为气候变化、地形和城市化如何共同塑造快速城市化季风区的降水极端事件提供了新见解。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：95%。本文本身就是遥感应用论文，可从以下方面改进：(1) 可加入高分辨率陆面模式数据（如WRF-Urban）以分离城市热岛效应与气溶胶对降水的影响；(2) 引入星载测雨雷达（如TRMM PR vs GPM DPR）的长时序对比分析，提升结论的普适性；(3) 结合SAR或高光谱数据进行城市下垫面分类，进一步解析不透水面比例对暴雨空间异质性的贡献；(4) 可扩展至多城市对比分析（如上海、武汉、广州），研究不同城市形态对暴雨调制作用的差异。

title: Multi-Modal Data Fusion for Dynamic Target Depth Retrieval in Aquatic Environments
summary: To address the challenges of severe optical attenuation and dynamic feature extraction for moving target depth retrieval in complex underwater remote sensing environments, this paper proposes a dynamic target depth estimation method based on multi-source data fusion. Taking optical RGB imagery and neuromorphic vision (NeuroIV) data as joint inputs, the proposed method constructs a three-channel feature extraction and fusion network. By leveraging a hypergraph structure, it establishes association weights between dynamic (temporal) and static (spatial) nodes to capture spatiotemporal correlations. To efficiently process the high-dimensional multi-modal data, the traditional dot-product attention is replaced with element-wise multiplication, significantly reducing computational complexity. Furthermore, a lightweight deformable attention pyramid (DAP) and diffusion model is introduced to refine depth image edges, effectively suppressing discontinuities and abruptness in the estimation results. Compared to single-modality optical imagery, the fused multi-modal data yields a superior signal-to-noise ratio and foreground contrast, achieving an improvement of over 20% in the MAE index. These results validate the effectiveness and superiority of the proposed multi-modal fusion strategy for dynamic target observation and depth retrieval in aquatic environments.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于多源数据融合的动态目标深度估计方法，融合光学RGB图像与神经形态视觉(NeuroIV)数据，利用超图结构建立动态与静态节点的关联权重，以逐元素乘法替代点积注意力降低计算复杂度，并引入轻量级可变形注意力金字塔(DAP)与扩散模型优化深度图像边缘，在MAE指标上提升超过20%。
AI.motivation: 复杂水下遥感环境中存在严重的光学衰减以及运动目标深度提取时的动态特征提取困难问题，现有单模态方法难以有效应对。
AI.method: 1) 以RGB图像与神经形态视觉(NeuroIV)数据为联合输入，构建三通道特征提取与融合网络；2) 利用超图结构建立动态（时序）节点与静态（空间）节点间的关联权重，捕获时空相关性；3) 采用逐元素乘法替代传统点积注意力，降低高维多模态数据的计算复杂度；4) 引入轻量级可变形注意力金字塔(DAP)与扩散模型，细化深度图像边缘，抑制估计结果的突变与不连续性。
AI.result: 相比单模态光学图像，融合多模态数据获得更优的信噪比与前景区对比度，MAE指标提升超过20%。
AI.conclusion: 验证了所提多模态融合策略在水域环境中动态目标观测与深度检索的有效性与优越性。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：85%。该论文本身就是水下遥感领域的深度估计研究，可从以下方面改进：1) 将NeuroIV数据替换或融合更适用于遥感平台的星载/机载事件相机数据，提升大尺度动态场景的适应能力；2) 引入多光谱或高光谱波段替代RGB，增强在水体浑浊环境中的穿透性；3) 超图结构可扩展至图注意力网络(GAT)变体，以处理更复杂的遥感时空图数据；4) DAP模块可迁移至遥感视频流中的运动小目标深度估计任务。

title: High-Resolution Inversion, Driving Mechanisms, and Source Apportionment of Near-Surface Ozone in Arid Urban Clusters: A Case Study of the Tianshan North Slope Urban Agglomeration
summary: Ozone (O3), as a key secondary pollutant, exhibits pronounced spatiotemporal heterogeneity, posing significant challenges to coordinated regional air pollution control. However, systematic understanding of high-resolution O3 spatial inversion and its driving mechanisms in arid urban agglomerations remains limited. In this study, the Tianshan North Slope Urban Agglomeration (TNSUA) was selected as the study area, and a multi-model comparative framework was established to comprehensively evaluate the O3 inversion performance of 16 machine learning and deep learning models, including Extreme Gradient Boosting (XGBoost), Random Forest (RF), Extremely Randomized Trees (ET), and Gradient Boosting Decision Tree (GBDT). Based on the optimal model performance, high-precision daily O3 spatial reconstruction for the year 2023 was achieved across the study region. The contributions of individual driving factors and their nonlinear response relationships were quantitatively interpreted using Shapley Additive Explanations (SHAP). Furthermore, a backward trajectory model combined with the Weighted Potential Source Contribution Function (WPSCF) and Weighted Concentration Weighted Trajectory (WCWT) methods was employed to identify potential source regions and transport pathways of O3. The results indicate that: (1) The XGBoost model exhibited the best performance (R2 = 0.93, RPD > 3). The reconstructed results reveal that high O3 concentrations in 2023 were primarily distributed in southern Urumqi, southern Changji, and southern Tacheng, with southern Urumqi identified as the most prominent hotspot. (2) The spatial variability of O3 was predominantly driven by downward shortwave radiation (DSR) and air temperature (TEM), both of which showed significant nonlinear responses and threshold effects on O3 formation. (3) Source apportionment analysis indicates that westerly transport serves as a major exogenous contribution pathway, with potential source regions mainly located in the surrounding areas of the northern Tianshan slope as well as Central Asia, particularly eastern Kazakhstan and northern Kyrgyzstan. This study systematically elucidates the formation mechanisms of O3 pollution in arid urban agglomerations from three aspects—high-precision inversion, driving mechanism analysis, and cross-regional transport identification—thereby providing a scientific basis for precise air pollution control strategies.

AI.tldr: 本研究以天山北坡城市群为研究区，构建了包含XGBoost、随机森林等16种机器学习/深度学习模型的多模型对比框架，基于最优模型（XGBoost，R²=0.93）实现了2023年高精度日尺度O₃空间反演，并利用SHAP、后向轨迹模型及潜在源贡献方法揭示了O₃空间分异的驱动机制（向下短波辐射和气温主导）及跨区域传输路径（西风输送，主要源区为中亚东部地区）。
AI.motivation: 臭氧作为关键二次污染物具有显著时空异质性，对区域联防联控构成挑战，而干旱区城市群高分辨率O₃空间反演及其驱动机制的系统理解仍然有限。
AI.method: (1) 构建16种机器学习与深度学习模型（XGBoost、RF、ET、GBDT等）对比框架，评估O₃反演性能；(2) 基于最优模型实现2023年高精度日尺度O₃空间重建；(3) 采用SHAP方法量化单因子贡献及非线性响应关系；(4) 结合后向轨迹模型、加权潜在源贡献函数(WPSCF)和加权浓度权重轨迹(WCWT)识别潜在源区和传输路径。
AI.result: (1) XGBoost模型性能最优（R²=0.93，RPD>3）；2023年高O₃浓度主要分布在乌鲁木齐南部、昌吉南部和塔城南部，乌鲁木齐南部最为突出。(2) 向下短波辐射(DSR)和气温(TEM)是O₃空间变异的主要驱动因子，均表现出显著非线性响应和阈值效应。(3) 西风输送是主要外源贡献路径，潜在源区位于天山北坡周边及中亚地区（哈萨克斯坦东部和吉尔吉斯斯坦北部）。
AI.conclusion: 本研究从高精度反演、驱动机制分析和跨区域传输识别三个层面系统揭示了干旱区城市群O₃污染的形成机制，为精准大气污染防控策略提供了科学依据。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：90%。该论文本身属于遥感与环境交叉研究，可改进方向包括：(1) 引入卫星遥感（如TROPOMI、OMI）的O₃柱浓度产品作为辅助特征或验证数据，进一步提升反演精度和空间覆盖度；(2) 融合多源遥感数据（如MODIS气溶胶光学厚度、VIIRS火点数据）作为驱动因子，增强对O₃前体物和气象条件的表征能力；(3) 利用遥感反演的地表参数（如地表温度、植被指数、土地利用类型）替换或补充地面站点输入，解决站点稀疏区域的空间插值问题；(4) 结合高光谱遥感数据（如EMIT、PRISMA）获取VOCs等O₃前体物信息，完善化学驱动机制分析。

title: A Multi-Frequency SAR Framework for Methane Emission Estimation in Thai Rice Paddies
summary: Rice cultivation is a major source of methane (CH4) emission in the agricultural sector, with a significantly higher global warming potential than carbon dioxide. Accurate and scalable quantification of CH4 from rice paddies is essential for carbon accounting. This study presents an automated framework for estimating rice CH4 emissions from irrigated paddies in the central plain of Thailand, integrating multi-sensor Synthetic Aperture Radar (SAR) observations with the IPCC methodology. The framework combines Sentinel-1 C-band SAR time series for phenological detection, ALOS-2 PALSAR-2 L-band full-polarimetric SAR for water regime classification, and IPCC water-scaling factors corresponding to Continuous Flooding, Single Drainage, or Multiple Drainage regimes. Evaluated across five stratified holdout sets, the phenology detection algorithm achieved planting and harvesting date Mean Absolute Errors of 6.1 ± 1.4 and 8.3 ± 1.7 days, with a 97.0% ± 2.7% operational detection rate. Water regime classification employed rice growth stage-specific Support Vector Machine classifiers with Radial Basis Function kernels (SVM-RBF), achieving per-stage test Balanced Accuracy ranging from 0.59 to 0.89. End-to-end integration using a four-track counterfactual decomposition yielded a full-pipeline mean absolute error of 18.5 ± 4.5 kgCH4ha−1 (21.4% of the mean ground-based CH4 calculation) and a mean bias of 3.5 ± 5.8 kgCH4ha−1. Water level classification was confirmed as the dominant algorithmic uncertainty source, while the IPCC Tier 1 emission factor structural range (−32% to +48% of the default) exceeded all algorithmic errors combined. The proposed framework provides a spatially explicit approach for integrating multi-frequency SAR data into IPCC-compliant methane estimation, supporting Monitoring, Reporting, and Verification applications.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个自动化框架，融合多频SAR数据（Sentinel-1 C-band和ALOS-2 PALSAR-2 L-band）与IPCC方法，实现对泰国中部平原灌溉稻田CH4排放的估算。物候检测MAE为6.1天（种植）和8.3天（收获），水分状态分类平衡精度0.59-0.89，全流程MAE为18.5 kgCH4/ha（21.4%）。水层分类是主要算法不确定性来源，而IPCC Tier 1排放因子结构范围（-32%至+48%）超过所有算法误差总和。
AI.motivation: 水稻种植是农业部门CH4排放的主要来源，全球变暖潜能远高于CO2。目前缺乏可扩展、准确的稻田CH4排放量化方法，亟需结合遥感与IPCC方法学的自动化框架以满足碳核算需求。
AI.method: (1) 利用Sentinel-1 C-band SAR时间序列进行水稻物候检测（种植与收获日期）；(2) 利用ALOS-2 PALSAR-2 L-band全极化SAR进行水分状态分类（连续淹水、单次排水、多次排水），采用水稻生长阶段特定的SVM-RBF分类器；(3) 结合IPCC水分缩放因子与物候/水分信息，通过四轨道反事实分解进行端到端集成，估算CH4排放量。
AI.result: 物候检测：种植日期MAE 6.1±1.4天，收获日期MAE 8.3±1.7天，检测率97.0%±2.7%。水分分类：各生育期测试平衡精度0.59-0.89。全流程MAE 18.5±4.5 kgCH4/ha（占地面计算的21.4%），平均偏差3.5±5.8 kgCH4/ha。
AI.conclusion: 该框架提供了一种空间显式的多频SAR数据与IPCC方法整合方案，可支持MRV应用。水层分类是主要算法误差源，但IPCC Tier 1排放因子本身的结构不确定性远大于算法误差，提示未来改进应优先关注排放因子本土化。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：95%。改进方案：(1) 引入国产高分-3（C-band）和/or 高分-7（L-band）替代部分Sentinel-1/ALOS-2数据，降低对国外卫星依赖；(2) 将水分分类模型从SVM-RBF升级为深度学习模型（如时序Transformer或ConvLSTM），利用时序上下文提升分类精度；(3) 结合光学遥感（如Sentinel-2 NDVI/LSWI）与SAR进行多模态融合，弥补SAR在水分状态判别上的歧义性；(4) 增加土壤质地、有机质含量等辅助数据作为排放因子校正项，降低IPCC Tier 1因子不确定性带来的系统性偏差；(5) 扩展至中国南方复杂水稻种植制度（双季稻/再生稻），验证框架在不同农作制度下的泛化能力。

title: Inundation Monitoring in Rice Fields Using ALOS-2 PALSAR-2: A Case Study of An Giang, the Mekong Delta in Vietnam
summary: Accurate monitoring of inundation in rice paddies is essential for optimizing water use efficiency and mitigating methane emissions; yet, detecting water beneath dense rice canopies remains a major challenge. This study proposed a reliable classification approach applied to the Winter–Spring 2025 season in An Giang province, Vietnam, by integrating multi-temporal ALOS-2 PALSAR-2 (L-band) and Sentinel-1 (C-band) SAR data with in situ field surveys. Time-series Sentinel-1 observations were used to estimate rice phenology (rice age), while multi-polarization backscatter from ALOS-2 PALSAR-2 was analyzed to discriminate inundated from non-inundated conditions across different growth stages. Results demonstrated that L-band signals, particularly in VV polarization, penetrated dense vegetation effectively, enabling classification of inundated vs. non-inundated fields with an overall accuracy of 81% and a Kappa coefficient of 0.77. The resulting multi-date inundation maps revealed distinct flooding regimes consistent with local field survey observations. These findings demonstrated the potential of L-band VV SAR data for characterizing sub-canopy inundation conditions under rice canopies. Crucially, the approach provides essential data for greenhouse gas inventories and supports the verification of low-emission water management practices, such as Alternate Wetting and Drying (AWD). Overall, the study demonstrated the value of multi-frequency SAR integration for advancing agricultural monitoring and climate-smart management in rice-growing regions.

AI.tldr: 本文通过融合多时相ALOS-2 PALSAR-2（L波段）和Sentinel-1（C波段）SAR数据，提出了一种可靠的水稻淹水监测分类方法，在越南安江省2025年冬春季节实现了81%的分类精度，证明了L波段VV极化穿透稠密水稻冠层检测水下淹水状态的潜力，为温室气体清单和节水灌溉管理（如干湿交替）提供了关键数据支持。
AI.motivation: 水稻田淹水状态的精确监测对于优化水分利用效率和减少甲烷排放至关重要，但稠密水稻冠层下的水体检测一直是重大挑战，现有方法难以穿透冠层获取可靠的淹水信息。
AI.method: 利用Sentinel-1时间序列数据估算水稻物候（水稻年龄），结合ALOS-2 PALSAR-2多极化后向散射数据，分析不同生长阶段淹水与非淹水条件下的信号差异，特别是L波段VV极化的穿透能力，通过多源SAR数据集成与实地调查验证进行分类。
AI.result: L波段VV极化信号有效穿透稠密植被，淹水与非淹水田块分类总体精度达81%，Kappa系数为0.77，生成的多时相遇水图与实地观测结果一致。
AI.conclusion: 多频SAR集成（L波段+C波段）在水稻冠层下淹水监测中具有显著潜力，可为温室气体清单和低排放水管理实践（如AWD）提供关键数据支持，推动农业监测和气候智慧型管理的发展。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：90%。改进方案：（1）可引入极化分解技术（如Freeman-Durden、Yamaguchi分解）进一步分离体散射和面散射分量，增强淹水信号提取能力；（2）结合光学遥感数据（如Sentinel-2 NDVI）提高水稻物候估计精度；（3）引入深度学习模型（如CNN或Transformer）替代传统分类器，挖掘时空SAR特征中的深层淹水模式；（4）利用时序InSAR相干性分析辅助区分淹水与非淹水区域；（5）扩展至多频段（如X波段TerraSAR-X）对比不同波长穿透冠层的能力，优化波段选择策略。

title: Village-Scale Winter Wheat Yield Prediction in Coastal Saline–Alkali Farmland Using a Three-Stage Fusion XGBoost Framework and SHAP
summary: Accurately estimating village-level winter wheat yield in coastal saline–alkali farmland is challenging because this region has strong spatial differences and multiple environmental stresses. In this study, Huanghua City, Hebei Province, was selected as a typical coastal saline–alkali area. Sentinel-2 images, climate factors, and topographic variables, including elevation, topographic wetness index, distance to the coastline, and distance to water systems, were combined to build a phenology-guided feature set for winter wheat yield prediction in coastal areas. The results showed that Phenology-Guided Feature Integration XGBoost achieved an R2 of 0.6382 and an RMSE of 450.15 kg/ha, which was slightly better than Gradient Boosting (R2 = 0.6256) and Random Forest (R2 = 0.6098), and clearly better than SVR (R2 = 0.4792), Ridge regression (R2 = 0.4582), and a single Decision Tree (R2 = 0.3088). Then, a three-stage branch was designed to identify the main drivers of SI, NDVI, and winter wheat yield at different stages, helping explain how environmental constraints and vegetation responses jointly affect final yield. The Three-Stage Fusion XGBoost Model achieved an R2 of 0.6439, an RMSE of 446.24 kg/ha, and an MAE of 363.38 kg/ha, showing a slight improvement in prediction accuracy. SHAP analysis showed that SI, distance-related factors, elevation, TWI, and NDVI were important drivers of winter wheat yield variation. Spatial prediction results showed higher winter wheat yield in inland areas (5145 kg/ha) and lower yield in coastal areas (4198 kg/ha). This framework supports village-scale winter wheat yield prediction in coastal saline–alkali farmland and improves model interpretability.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种物候引导的特征集成方法，结合Sentinel-2影像、气候和地形变量，利用XGBoost模型在河北省黄骅市沿海盐碱农田区域进行村庄尺度冬小麦产量估算。物候引导的XGBoost模型R²=0.6382，三阶段融合XGBoost模型R²=0.6439，SHAP分析表明盐度指数、距离因子、高程等是关键驱动因子，内陆产量(5145 kg/ha)显著高于沿海(4198 kg/ha)。
AI.motivation: 沿海盐碱农田区域空间异质性强、多重环境胁迫并存，准确估算村庄尺度冬小麦产量极具挑战，现有方法在该区域精度不足且缺乏可解释性。
AI.method: (1) 构建物候引导的特征集，融合Sentinel-2遥感影像、气候因子、地形变量（高程、地形湿度指数、距海岸线距离、距水系距离）；(2) 采用XGBoost作为核心回归模型，并与Gradient Boosting、Random Forest、SVR、Ridge回归、决策树对比；(3) 设计三阶段分支机制，识别不同阶段盐度指数(SI)、NDVI和产量的主要驱动因子；(4) 利用SHAP分析进行模型可解释性分析。
AI.result: 物候引导特征集成XGBoost的R²=0.6382，RMSE=450.15 kg/ha，优于其他对比模型。三阶段融合XGBoost模型R²=0.6439，RMSE=446.24 kg/ha，MAE=363.38 kg/ha，精度略有提升。SHAP分析显示SI、距离因子、高程、TWI和NDVI是关键驱动因子。内陆区域平均产量5145 kg/ha，沿海区域仅4198 kg/ha。
AI.conclusion: 提出的物候引导框架能够有效支持沿海盐碱农田村庄尺度冬小麦产量预测，并显著提升了模型的可解释性，揭示了环境胁迫与植被响应对产量的联合影响机制。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：75%。改进方案：(1) 可引入微波遥感数据（如Sentinel-1 SAR）以克服沿海地区多云天气对光学影像的限制；(2) 可结合高光谱遥感数据提取更精细的盐分胁迫特征，替代单一盐度指数(SI)；(3) 可引入深度学习模型（如CNN-LSTM或Transformer）捕捉时空序列特征，替代传统树模型；(4) 可加入土壤理化参数（如土壤含盐量、pH值、有机质）作为辅助变量提升精度。

title: Scale Effects on Dominant Drivers of Commercial Plantation Productivity: Novel Insights from High-Resolution Multi-Sensor UAV Remote Sensing and Interpretable AI
summary: Subtropical mountain economic tree plantations are constrained by pronounced spatial heterogeneity in resource availability, yet the spatial scales at which soil properties, topography, and canopy structure regulate vegetation vigor remain poorly resolved. To address this gap, a spatially consistent multi-scale dataset combining 10 m high-density soil sampling, UAV-LiDAR, and multispectral remote sensing was used to quantify the scale-dependent drivers of the Leaf Chlorophyll Index (LCI) across 3–50 m within a Chinese hickory (Carya cathayensis Sarg.) plantation. The relative contributions of canopy, soil, and topography to LCI were decomposed across scales using an interpretable machine-learning framework (XGBoost–SHAP). At fine scales (3–10 m), vegetation vigor was primarily controlled by tree-level canopy structure, particularly tree height, reflecting localized resource acquisition. At intermediate scales (10–20 m), a distinct coupling window emerged, characterized by increased interaction complexity: LCI was predominantly driven by interactions between canopy structure and soil nutrient availability, whereas single-factor effects weakened. Notably, at 20 m this interaction pattern largely weakened and reverted to single-metric dominance. At broader scales (>30 m), complex interactions re-emerged, and dominant SHAP contributions shifted from nutrients and canopy structure toward topography and soil texture. These findings reconcile strong fine-scale drivers with weaker predictability at intermediate extents and demonstrate that soil–canopy relationships reorganize across spatial scales rather than remaining static. On the basis of these findings, a scale-hierarchical framework for precision forestry is proposed that aligns management interventions with the ecological scales at which dominant correlates operate across spatial supports.

AI.tldr: 本研究通过多尺度数据集（10米高密度土壤采样、无人机LiDAR和多光谱遥感）结合可解释机器学习（XGBoost–SHAP），揭示了亚热带山地经济林（山核桃）叶片叶绿素指数（LCI）在3–50米尺度上的驱动因素变化规律：细尺度（3–10米）由树冠结构主导，中尺度（10–20米）出现树冠-土壤耦合窗口，大尺度（>30米）转向地形和土壤质地主导，并据此提出了尺度分层的精准林业管理框架。
AI.motivation: 亚热带山地经济林受资源可用性空间异质性限制，但土壤属性、地形和冠层结构调控植被活力的空间尺度尚未明确，亟需解析多尺度驱动机制以支撑精准林业。
AI.method: 构建空间一致的多尺度数据集（10米高密度土壤采样、无人机LiDAR、多光谱遥感），采用可解释机器学习框架（XGBoost–SHAP）分解冠层、土壤和地形对叶片叶绿素指数（LCI）在3–50米尺度上的相对贡献。
AI.result: 细尺度（3–10米）由树高主导；中尺度（10–20米）出现冠层-土壤耦合窗口，交互作用主导而单因子效应减弱；20米处交互模式退化；>30米尺度交互作用重现，主导因子转向地形和土壤质地。
AI.conclusion: 土壤-冠层关系随空间尺度重组，而非静态不变；基于此提出尺度分层的精准林业框架，使管理干预与生态尺度对齐。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：95%。该论文本身就是遥感与森林生态的交叉研究。改进方案：（1）可将方法框架迁移至其他遥感植被指数（如NDVI、LAI、SIF）的尺度依赖性分析；（2）引入高光谱或热红外遥感，进一步区分生理胁迫（水分、病虫害）与冠层结构的影响；（3）在更大空间范围（区域级）结合Sentinel-2或Landsat时序数据，检验尺度驱动模式的普适性；（4）将SHAP交互作用分析与因果推断（如结构方程模型）结合，提升机制解释力。

title: Diffusion-Model-Based Data Augmentation for Target Detection in Side-Scan Sonar Images
summary: Side-scan sonar images play an important role in underwater target detection, seabed mapping, and marine environment monitoring. However, the performance of deep learning-based detectors is often limited by the small scale of available sonar datasets, the high cost of data acquisition, and class imbalance among target categories. To address these issues, this paper proposes a diffusion-model-based data augmentation method for side-scan sonar target detection. A FLUX.1 diffusion model is adopted as the base generative framework and is fine-tuned using low-rank adaptation (LoRA) to adapt the pretrained model to the side-scan sonar image domain under limited training data conditions. The generated samples are further filtered and added only to the training set, while the validation and test sets are kept unchanged and contain only real sonar images. To ensure a fair evaluation of the augmentation strategy, all detection experiments are conducted using a fixed YOLOv8n (You Only Look Once version 8 nano) detector under the same training hyperparameters and three random seeds. Compared with training on the original dataset, the proposed FLUX+LoRA augmentation improves mean average precision (mAP)@0.5 from 0.7400 ± 0.0132 to 0.8582 ± 0.0328 and mAP@0.5:0.95 from 0.3994 ± 0.0187 to 0.5115 ± 0.0164. It also outperforms conventional augmentation methods under the same real-only validation/test protocol. In addition, Fréchet Inception Distance (FID)/Kernel Inception Distance (KID)-based image quality evaluation, generated-sample amount ablation, screening-strategy ablation, LoRA-rank sensitivity analysis, and a controlled 600-sample diffusion-backbone comparison are conducted. The results show that the 600-sample manually annotated FLUX+LoRA subset selected from generated samples achieves better image quality and detection performance than FLUX-base and SD1.5+LoRA under the same annotation budget. These findings demonstrate that FLUX+LoRA-generated sonar images can provide useful structural diversity for detector training and improve target detection performance under limited-data conditions.

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于FLUX扩散模型和LoRA微调的数据增强方法，用于侧扫声纳图像目标检测。在有限数据条件下，该方法将mAP@0.5从0.740提升至0.858，优于传统增强方法，并验证了生成图像的结构多样性对检测器训练的有效性。
AI.motivation: 侧扫声纳图像目标检测面临数据集规模小、采集成本高、类别不平衡等挑战，现有深度学习检测器性能受限，亟需有效的数据增强方法。
AI.method: 采用FLUX.1扩散模型作为基础生成框架，通过LoRA低秩适应微调预训练模型以适应侧扫声纳图像域；生成样本经过筛选后仅加入训练集，使用固定YOLOv8n检测器进行公平评估。
AI.result: FLUX+LoRA增强将mAP@0.5从0.7400±0.0132提升至0.8582±0.0328，mAP@0.5:0.95从0.3994±0.0187提升至0.5115±0.0164，优于传统方法；600张精选子集在图像质量和检测性能上均优于FLUX-base和SD1.5+LoRA。
AI.conclusion: FLUX+LoRA生成的声纳图像能够为检测器训练提供有用的结构多样性，在有限数据条件下有效提升目标检测性能。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：90%。具体方案：(1) 将该方法直接迁移至遥感图像目标检测（如船舶、飞机检测），解决遥感领域同样面临的小样本和类不平衡问题；(2) 结合遥感图像的多光谱/高光谱特性，在扩散模型条件生成中引入波段通道控制，生成多模态遥感增强样本；(3) 针对遥感目标尺度差异大（如大型舰船vs小型车辆）的特点，设计尺度感知的LoRA微调策略或分级生成框架。该方法的筛选策略和消融实验设计也可直接借鉴。

title: Land-Cover-Stratified Validation and Uncertainty Prioritization for SSP-Based NDVI Projection at 1 km Resolution in Northeast China
summary: At 1 km resolution, NDVI projections for heterogeneous landscapes can appear spatially coherent in aggregate while concealing substantial class-level prediction weaknesses, a limitation that has received limited systematic attention in the NDVI projection literature. This study applies a four-component assessment workflow to Northeast China (NEC) for 2040 under SSP1-2.6, SSP2-4.5, and SSP5-8.5, integrating multi-stage model selection, land-cover-stratified validation, quantile-regression-based uncertainty characterization, and validation-priority ranking. Among three candidate tree-based models evaluated using spatial block cross-validation, temporal holdout validation, long-jump extrapolation, and climatic perturbation tests, LightGBM showed the most balanced and consistent performance, with spatial CV R2 = 0.654 ± 0.123, temporal holdout R2 = 0.710, and long-jump R2 = 0.671, and was therefore selected for the 2040 projection. Projected regional mean NDVI increased modestly from 0.393 in 2020 to 0.414–0.417 across scenarios, with limited divergence among SSP pathways at this near-term horizon. Class-stratified validation of the 2020 holdout prediction revealed that global model performance masked strong class-level heterogeneity, with R2 values ranging from 0.576 for Construction land to −0.886 for Unused land. Water bodies and Unused land exhibited negative R2 values, indicating weak class-level predictive support relative to a simple class-mean benchmark. Residual decomposition showed that Water bodies combined high random error with elevated systematic deviation, whereas Unused land was mainly characterized by systematic bias, suggesting different needs for class-specific model improvement. The Uncertainty Risk Index (URI), derived from 95% prediction intervals, was highest in Construction land and lowest in Cropland across all scenarios. Integrating historical residuals with future URI-identified Water bodies, Unused land, and Construction land as the highest-priority classes for future targeted validation. These priorities arise from both limited class representation and intrinsic NDVI-related complexity, including low vegetation signal, mixed-pixel effects, and heterogeneous land-surface composition. These results demonstrate that land-cover-stratified error decomposition and uncertainty-informed priority ranking reveal class-specific projection limitations that aggregate accuracy metrics can conceal.

AI.tldr: 本研究针对1km分辨率NDVI预测中存在的类别级预测弱点被聚合指标掩盖的问题，开发了四组件评估流程，应用于中国东北地区2040年NDVI预测。结果表明，尽管全局指标尚可，但建设用地、未利用地和水体等类别预测效果极差（R²为负值），需通过土地覆盖分层验证和不确定性优先级排序来揭示这些隐藏的局限性。
AI.motivation: 现有NDVI预测文献缺乏对土地覆盖类别层面预测性能的系统性关注，全局聚合指标（如整体R²）可能掩盖特定类别（如建设用地、未利用地）的严重预测缺陷，导致对模型实际效能的误判。
AI.method: 四组件评估流程：(1)多阶段模型选择（对比三种树模型，LightGBM胜出）；(2)土地覆盖分层验证；(3)基于分位数回归的不确定性表征；(4)验证优先级排序。模型评估采用空间分块交叉验证、时间留出验证、长距离外推和气候扰动测试。
AI.result: LightGBM表现最佳（CV R²=0.654±0.123）。2040年NDVI从0.393增至0.414-0.417，SSP间差异小。类别层验证：耕地R²=0.576，建设用地R²=0.576，未利用地R²=-0.886，水体R²为负。残差分解表明未利用地以系统偏差为主，水体随机误差与系统偏差均高。URI显示建设用地风险最高，耕地最低。
AI.conclusion: 土地覆盖分层误差分解与不确定性优先级排序能揭示被聚合精度指标掩盖的类别级预测局限性，水体、未利用地和建设用地是未来针对性验证的最高优先级类别，其问题源于样本不足和NDVI复杂性（低植被信号、混合像元效应、地表异质组成）。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：95%。本文本身就是遥感NDVI预测论文，改进方向：(1)引入多源遥感数据（如Sentinel-1 SAR、夜间灯光）增强建设用地和水体的特征空间；(2)采用混合像元分解方法处理1km分辨率下的亚像素异质性；(3)集成深度学习方法（如CNN-LSTM）捕捉类别内NDVI的时空依赖性；(4)对优先级类别构建独立专用模型，替代统一全区域建模策略；(5)引入迁移学习或主动学习缓解未利用地等样本稀疏类别的问题。

title: Future Climate-Driven Changes in Carbon Stocks in the Yellow River Basin of China
summary: Carbon storage dynamics in dryland and semi-arid ecosystems remain a major uncertainty in global carbon cycle assessments, particularly in regions like the Yellow River Basin (YRB). Using the Arid Ecosystem Model (AEM), we simulated the spatiotemporal evolution of four major carbon pools—total carbon (TOTC), vegetation carbon (VEGC), soil organic carbon (SOC), and litter carbon (LTRC)—from 1981 to 2060 under factorial climate scenarios. During 1981–2020, TOTC increased by 0.09 Pg C (+3.54%), driven by gains in VEGC (+0.03 Pg C, +21.43%) and SOC (+0.06 Pg C, +2.78%). LTRC showed minimal net change but was highly sensitive to interannual variability. From 2021 to 2060, under the high-emission SSP5 scenario, TOTC is projected to increase by 0.114 Pg C (+4.81%), with VEGC contributing most of the gain (+23.87%). CO2_only simulations showed similar increases, underscoring the dominant role of CO2 fertilization. In contrast, warming and precipitation alone produced weaker and more variable effects. Spatially, upper YRB regions are expected to maintain strong sink capacity, while the Loess Plateau and central-western subregions remain vulnerable to warming and moisture decline. LTRC exhibited the highest variability across scenarios (−18% to +22%), highlighting its role as a sensitive indicator of sink stability. These findings emphasize the need to account for nonlinear climate–carbon interactions and regional heterogeneity. Region-specific, adaptive strategies that integrate ecological restoration and climate adaptation will be critical to enhancing carbon sinks and supporting China’s carbon neutrality targets in the Yellow River Basin.

AI.tldr: 本文利用干旱生态系统模型（AEM）模拟了黄河流域1981-2060年四个主要碳库的时空演变，发现总碳储量增加了0.09 Pg C（+3.54%），其中CO2施肥效应是主要驱动因素；未来SSP5情景下总碳预计增加0.114 Pg C（+4.81%），枯落物碳变异性最大（-18%至+22%），是碳汇稳定性的敏感指标。
AI.motivation: 干旱和半干旱生态系统的碳储量动态是全球碳循环评估中的主要不确定性来源，尤其在黄河流域等区域缺乏充分研究。本文旨在量化该区域碳库的时空演变及其对气候变化的响应。
AI.method: 采用干旱生态系统模型（Arid Ecosystem Model, AEM）模拟总碳（TOTC）、植被碳（VEGC）、土壤有机碳（SOC）和枯落物碳（LTRC）四个碳库；设置因子气候情景（CO2单独、增温单独、降水单独及综合情景），分析1981–2020年历史时期和2021–2060年未来时期（含SSP5高排放情景）的碳动态。
AI.result: 1981-2020年，TOTC增加0.09 Pg C（+3.54%），VEGC增加0.03 Pg C（+21.43%），SOC增加0.06 Pg C（+2.78%），LTRC净变化极小但年际波动大。2021-2060年SSP5情景下，TOTC预计增加0.114 Pg C（+4.81%），VEGC贡献最大（+23.87%）。CO2单独实验效果与综合情景相似，表明CO2施肥效应主导；增温和降水单独作用效果较弱且变异更大。LTRC变异性最高（-18%至+22%），是碳汇稳定性的敏感指标。空间上，黄河流域上游保持强碳汇能力，黄土高原和中西部子区域易受增温和水分下降影响。
AI.conclusion: 黄河流域碳汇受CO2施肥效应主导，但存在显著的区域异质性和非线性气候-碳相互作用。枯落物碳是评估碳汇稳定性的关键敏感指标。需制定结合生态恢复与气候适应的区域特异性策略，以支持中国碳中和目标。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：85%。具体方案：（1）利用遥感植被指数（如NDVI/EVI、叶面积指数LAI）同化或校准AEM模型的VEGC模拟结果，提高植被碳估算精度；（2）利用遥感土壤水分产品（如SMAP、ESA CCI）约束模型中的土壤水分动态，改善SOC模拟；（3）结合遥感土地利用/覆盖变化数据，动态更新模型中的植被类型参数；（4）利用遥感火点数据校正LTRC的燃烧损失，提升枯落物碳动态模拟的准确性；（5）采用遥感反演的GPP与模型模拟对比，验证CO2施肥效应的空间分布特征。

title: Less Is More: Online Spatio-Temporal Selective Learning for Multi-Variable Meteorological Forecasting
summary: Accurate forecasting of high-dimensional meteorological fields remains challenging due to the complex spatio-temporal dynamics of atmospheric systems and the presence of heterogeneous training difficulty across space and lead time. Existing deep forecasting approaches usually optimize all prediction units uniformly, which may overemphasize low-benefit or weakly generalizable supervision signals. To address this issue, we propose Spatio-Temporal Selective Learning (ST-SL), an online training framework that estimates the learnability of each prediction unit by comparing the main model with a frozen reference model and computes the loss only over selected high-benefit spatio-temporal units. To provide an effective forecasting backbone, we further introduce VASTFormer, a variable-aware spatio-temporal Transformer that models cross-variable dependencies, incorporates physics-enhanced Solar Positional Encoding, and captures atmospheric trajectories with an efficient temporal translator. Experiments on the ERA5 reanalysis dataset show that VASTFormer outperforms representative spatio-temporal baselines, while ST-SL further improves accuracy without adding inference-time parameters or computational cost. Compared with the strongest baseline, VASTFormer+ST-SL reduces MSE, MAE, and RMSE by 8.84%, 6.70%, and 4.54%, respectively. Meteorological skill evaluation further shows an average ACC of 0.9801 and RMSESS of 0.8104, and percentile-based extreme-condition evaluations confirm consistent improvements across standard and high-impact forecasting scenarios. These results indicate that selective supervision can improve generalization in dense meteorological forecasting.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种面向高维气象场预测的时空选择性学习框架（ST-SL），通过选择性计算高效益时空单元的损失来提升模型泛化能力，并搭配变量感知的VASTFormer骨干网络，在ERA5数据集上取得了显著优于现有方法的性能。
AI.motivation: 高维气象场存在时空异质性训练难度，现有深度预测方法对所有预测单元进行统一优化，可能过度强调低效益或弱泛化能力的监督信号，导致模型性能受限。
AI.method: 提出ST-SL在线训练框架，通过主模型与冻结参考模型对比估计每个预测单元的可学习性，仅选择高效益时空单元计算损失；同时提出VASTFormer骨干网络，包含变量感知Transformer建模跨变量依赖、物理增强太阳位置编码以及高效时序翻译器捕获大气轨迹。
AI.result: 在ERA5再分析数据集上，VASTFormer优于代表性基线方法；ST-SL在不增加推理参数和计算成本的情况下进一步提升精度，相比最强基线MSE降低8.84%、MAE降低6.70%、RMSE降低4.54%，平均ACC达0.9801，RMSESS达0.8104，极端条件评估也有一致改进。
AI.conclusion: 选择性监督可以有效提升密集气象预测的泛化能力。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：95%。该工作本身就是气象遥感领域的预测方法，可直接迁移至遥感时间序列预测任务。改进方向：（1）将ST-SL的选择性学习策略引入遥感影像时空预测，如海面温度、植被指数等长时序预测中处理时空异质性；（2）VASTFormer的变量感知机制可扩展至多模态遥感数据融合（如光学-SAR联合）；（3）太阳位置编码可推广至其他与光照、角度相关的遥感任务（如正射校正、阴影检测）；（4）时序翻译器结构可用于遥感视频或卫星时序数据的轨迹建模。

title: A Spatiotemporal Fusion-Based Machine Learning Framework for Long-Term SSC Retrieval in the Three Gorges Reservoir Area
summary: Conventional remote sensing faces challenges in regions characterized by complex terrain, frequent cloud and fog cover, image scarcity, and mixed pixels. This study develops an integrated framework that sequentially combines spatiotemporal fusion, water masking, feature engineering, and machine learning to enable long-term SSC retrieval. Key results include: (1) RASTFM achieved the highest spectral fidelity among four fusion algorithms; (2) development of an adaptive machine learning model for independent hydrological stations and a water body masking strategy; (3) mainstream SSC decreased by 21.2% temporally and a 93.8% longitudinally from 2006 to 2020, generating 15-year along-channel mainstream SSC data for the Three Gorges Reservoir area.

AI.tldr: 针对复杂地形、多云雾、影像稀缺及混合像元等遥感难题，本文构建了融合时空融合、水体掩膜、特征工程与机器学习的集成框架，实现了三峡库区2006-2020年长时间序列悬浮泥沙浓度反演，发现主流SSC时空分别下降21.2%和93.8%。
AI.motivation: 传统遥感在复杂地形、多云雾覆盖、影像稀缺及混合像元严重区域难以实现高精度长时间序列悬浮泥沙浓度反演，亟需一种集成多策略的解决方案。
AI.method: (1) 对比四种融合算法，选用RASTFM进行时空融合；(2) 构建自适应机器学习模型与水体掩膜策略；(3) 结合特征工程进行悬浮泥沙浓度反演。
