AI.result: (1) RASTFM在四种融合算法中光谱保真度最高；(2) 建立了针对独立水文站的自适应机器学习模型及水体掩膜策略；(3) 2006-2020年间主流SSC时间上下降21.2%，沿河道方向下降93.8%，生成了三峡库区15年沿河道主流SSC数据集。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的集成框架能够有效应对复杂环境下的遥感反演挑战，为长期悬浮泥沙浓度监测提供了可靠的技术路径。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：95%。改进方案：(1) 将RASTFM与其他先进融合方法（如深度学习时空融合）对比优化；(2) 引入多尺度特征工程与注意力机制提升模型泛化能力；(3) 可扩展至其他浑浊水体（如长江口、黄河口）的悬浮泥沙监测；(4) 与大气校正模块深度耦合，进一步提升反演精度。

title: Experiences of the Scan of Existing Bridge Structures with Multiple Real-World Case Studies in Germany
summary: Efficient bridge scanning and documentation are crucial for creating reliable digital 3D models. However, scanning workflows often rely on implicit practitioner experience rather than standardized protocols. This paper presents practical insights derived from a Multiple Case Study (MCS) of ten heterogeneous, real-world bridges in Germany. The study evaluates Terrestrial Laser Scanning (TLS), Mobile Laser Scanning (MLS) and Unmanned Aerial Systems (UAS) photogrammetry. The findings isolate distinct performance trade-offs. TLS offers high accuracy but suffers from shadowing occlusions. Conversely, UAS provides operational flexibility but introduces geometric vulnerabilities, including photogrammetric reconstruction noise on fine structures and SLAM trajectory drift on vibrating spans. To unify these insights, a generalized, BPMN-compliant process model mapping the complete data acquisition lifecycle under legal and spatial constraints is defined. This research provides an actionable, practical guide to optimize data quality and efficiency in structural engineering workflows.

AI.tldr: 本文通过多案例研究法评估了十座真实桥梁的三种扫描技术（TLS、MLS、UAS），揭示了各自性能权衡，并定义了符合BPMN标准的通用流程模型，为结构工程中的数据采集提供了实践指南。
AI.motivation: 桥梁扫描工作流常依赖从业者隐性经验，缺乏标准化协议。为建立可靠的数字3D模型，亟需系统的、可复用的实践指导来优化数据质量和效率。
AI.method: 采用多案例研究法（MCS），对德国十座异构真实桥梁进行评估，涉及地面激光扫描（TLS）、移动激光扫描（MLS）和无人机（UAS）摄影测量三种技术，并基于BPMN标准构建通用流程模型。
AI.result: TLS精度高但存在阴影遮挡问题；UAS操作灵活但存在几何脆弱性（细结构摄影测量重建噪声及振动跨径上的SLAM轨迹漂移）；MLS表现居中。最终整合出涵盖法律和空间约束的完整数据采集生命周期流程模型。
AI.conclusion: 研究提供了一个可操作的实用指南，帮助工程实践者在不同桥梁场景下权衡精度与效率，优化数据采集策略。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：85%。本文直接聚焦遥感技术在土木工程中的应用，特别是三种遥感扫描方式的对比。改进方案：1）引入多模态数据融合策略，利用TLS的高精度约束UAS的SLAM漂移，实现互补校正；2）针对振动跨径问题，可结合时序InSAR或地基雷达干涉测量补充动态形变监测；3）将BPMN流程模型扩展至遥感数据后处理与语义分割管线，实现从采集到分析的端到端标准化。

title: A Comparative Evaluation of UAV-Based Remote Sensing and Geophysical Techniques for Landmine Detection on a Seeded Minefield
summary: Reliable and scalable landmine detection technologies are essential for humanitarian mine action (HMA), yet standardized benchmarks for Unmanned Aerial Vehicle (UAV)-based sensing in operationally relevant environments remain limited. This study presents a comprehensive evaluation of 34 multimodal datasets acquired over a standardized seeded test site for landmine and unexploded ordnance detection. Nine sensing modalities, including RGB, thermal, multispectral, hyperspectral, LiDAR, and Synthetic Aperture Radar (SAR), are evaluated using the Anomaly, Identifiable Anomaly, Unique Identifiable Anomaly (AIU) index to establish a unified framework for quantifying detection fidelity. Results indicate that RGB imagery achieves the highest surface detection rate (94.8%), with 45.4% of targets classified as uniquely identifiable, reducing false-positive risk. For sub-surface detection, handheld electromagnetic induction (EMI) and magnetometry exceed 95% detection for ferrous items but fall below 10% for plastic ordnance. Ground-penetrating radar (GPR) is the only modality capable of detecting buried plastic targets (55.6% for cart-based systems), whereas UAV-mounted GPR remains limited (18.2%) at current operational flight heights. Based on the comparative analysis, we discuss the gaps in current detection capabilities, compare false-positive rates across modalities, and perform a cost–benefit analysis fitting contamination scenarios with the most cost-effective detection method. All datasets are publicly released, along with an interactive web-map, to support reproducible benchmarking and cross-modality comparison in UAV-enabled explosive hazard detection.

AI.tldr: 本文系统评估了34个多模态数据集（9种传感模态）在标准化的地雷与未爆弹药检测测试场上的性能。RGB影像地表检测率最高（94.8%），手持电磁感应和磁力仪对地下铁质目标检测率>95%，而探地雷达是唯一能检测地下塑料目标（车载55.6%，无人机载18.2%）的模态。基于AIU指数建立统一检测保真度评估框架，并公开数据集以支持可重复基准测试。
AI.motivation: 人道主义排雷行动迫切需要可靠、可扩展的地雷探测技术，但当前缺乏基于无人机的多模态传感在作战相关环境下的标准化基准，导致不同传感技术之间难以进行公平、可重复的性能比较。
AI.method: 在标准化种子测试场采集34个多模态数据集，涵盖RGB、热红外、多光谱、高光谱、LiDAR、合成孔径雷达等9种传感模态。采用Anomaly, Identifiable Anomaly, Unique Identifiable Anomaly (AIU)指数作为统一量化框架评估检测保真度，并进行成本效益分析与误报率对比。
AI.result: RGB对地表目标检测率达94.8%（45.4%唯一可识别）；手持电磁感应和磁力仪对地下铁质目标>95%，但对塑料目标<10%；车载GPR对埋藏塑料目标检测率55.6%，无人机载GPR仅18.2%。
AI.conclusion: 不同传感模态在探测场景中存在显著的性能差异，尚无单一模态能全覆盖所有目标类型；应结合成本效益分析选择最优检测方案；公开数据集和交互式网络地图为未来的可重复比较和跨模态融合研究提供了标准化基准。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：85%。本文可直接作为遥感地雷探测领域的标准化评估基准。改进方向：（1）多模态融合策略可借鉴遥感中经典的特征级/决策级融合方法（如稀疏表示、多核学习）提升检测鲁棒性；（2）AIU指数框架可推广至遥感其他目标检测任务（如隐蔽目标、伪装目标）的保真度评估；（3）UAV-GPR的低检测率问题可引入遥感中的多角度观测或时序InSAR思路提升地下目标信号增强效果；（4）可将本文数据集与深度学习模型结合，探索跨模态迁移学习或自监督预训练策略。

title: A Two-Stage Reference-Guided Workflow for Improving VIIRS Leaf Area Index Retrieval over Mixed Pixels
summary: Moderate-resolution leaf area index (LAI) retrieval over heterogeneous landscapes is affected not only by unresolved subpixel composition in coarse-resolution predictors, but also by structural bias in supervisory labels aggregated from higher-resolution products. To address this issue, we developed a reference-guided two-stage workflow to improve LAI retrieval from the Visible Infrared Imaging Radiometer Suite (VIIRS). In the first stage, aggregated Sentinel-2 LAI was calibrated against Ground-Based Observations for Validation (GBOV) LP3 reference LAI using subpixel plant functional type (PFT) fractions and forest-sensitive hinge terms to generate corrected 500 m labels. In the second stage, a random-forest model was trained using VIIRS spectral reflectance, viewing geometry, vegetation indices, texture, and subpixel compositional variables. Model development was based on 2020–2021 data from 11 U.S. GBOV sites. Performance was evaluated by same-site temporal transfer to 2019 and 2022 and by strict leave-one-site-out (LOSO) validation. Label calibration improved agreement with GBOV from a coefficient of determination (R2) of 0.752 and a root mean square error (RMSE) of 1.110 to an R2 of 0.908 and an RMSE of 0.676. Under LOSO validation, the final model achieved an R2 of 0.901 with an RMSE of 0.703. On the 2019/2022 overlap subset shared by the final VIIRS retrieval, the official VNP product, and the GBOV reference, the final model achieved an R2 of 0.905 and an RMSE of 0.609, compared with 0.755 and 0.978 for the official VNP product. These results show that reference-guided label correction, combined with explicit subpixel compositional information, can substantially improve VIIRS LAI retrieval over mixed pixels within the evaluated study domain.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种参考引导的两阶段工作流，通过校正聚合标签中的结构偏差并引入亚像素组分信息，显著提升了VIIRS叶面积指数（LAI）反演精度。第一阶段利用GBOV参考LAI和亚像素PFT分数对聚合的Sentinel-2 LAI进行校正；第二阶段使用随机森林模型结合VIIRS光谱、观测几何、植被指数、纹理和亚像素组分变量进行训练。在美国11个GBOV站点验证显示，标签校正后R²从0.752提升至0.908，RMSE从1.110降至0.676；最终模型在LOSO验证下R²达0.901，RMSE为0.703，效果显著优于官方VNP产品。
AI.motivation: 中等分辨率LAI反演在异质景观中受到两个关键问题影响：一是粗分辨率预测因子中未解决的亚像素组分信息，二是从高分辨率产品聚合得到的监督标签存在结构偏差。现有方法未能同时有效解决这两个问题，导致LAI反演精度受限。
AI.method: 提出参考引导的两阶段工作流：第一阶段，利用GBOV参考LAI、亚像素PFT分数和森林敏感铰链项，对聚合的Sentinel-2 LAI标签进行校正以消除结构偏差；第二阶段，以校正后的500m标签为目标，使用随机森林模型训练VIIRS光谱反射率、观测几何、植被指数、纹理和亚像素组分变量。基于2020-2021年11个美国GBOV站点数据建模，并通过同站点时间迁移（2019、2022）和严格留一站点交叉验证评估性能。
AI.result: 标签校正后与GBOV一致性从R²=0.752、RMSE=1.110提升至R²=0.908、RMSE=0.676。LOSO验证下最终模型R²=0.901、RMSE=0.703。在2019/2022重叠子集上，最终模型R²=0.905、RMSE=0.609，显著优于官方VNP产品（R²=0.755、RMSE=0.978）。
AI.conclusion: 参考引导的标签校正结合显式亚像素组分信息，能够显著改善混合像元场景下VIIRS LAI反演精度，验证了该方法在异质景观中的应用潜力。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：95%。本文本身就是一篇遥感领域（LAI反演）的论文，可从以下方面改进：（1）将两阶段工作流扩展到其他中分辨率传感器（如MODIS、SLSTR）的LAI产品校正；（2）引入时序信息或深度学习模型（如LSTM、Transformer）替代随机森林，挖掘光谱-时间动态特征；（3）将亚像素PFT分数替换为更精细的连续植被组分（如从Sentinel-2时间序列提取的植被覆盖度），减少离散分类带来的不确定性；（4）在全球更多生态站点（如ChinaFLUX、EuroFLUX）进行跨区域验证，评估方法泛化能力；（5）探索采用不确定性量化方法（如贝叶斯深度学习）为LAI反演结果提供置信度区间。

title: DST-SARNet: A Dual-Stage Texture-Aware SAR Prior Network for Cloud Removal in Optical Remote Sensing Images
summary: Cloud contamination obscures ground objects, interferes with surface reflectance, and disrupts spatial continuity. In thick-cloud regions, surface structures and spectral information are often extensively missing. CNN-based cloud removal methods can recover local textures, but they are less effective at modeling global structures and color consistency over large cloud-covered areas. Transformer-based methods capture long-range dependencies; however, standard self-attention introduces high computational and memory costs for high-resolution remote sensing images. Efficient attention reduces this cost but may weaken edge and texture discriminability. SAR imagery can penetrate clouds and provide surface structural information, yet repeated SAR injections may propagate speckle noise, cross-modal misalignment, and imaging discrepancies through deep restoration layers. To address these issues, this paper proposes DST-SARNet, a dual-stage SAR structural guidance network for optical remote sensing image cloud removal. In this framework, dual-stage refers to two explicit SAR-guidance positions: early structural skeleton guidance at the input side and late high-frequency modulation near the output. The Texture-Aware Asymmetric Retrieval module is placed between these two stages as a bottleneck memory retrieval operation rather than as a third dense SAR injection stage. With this design, SAR provides structural skeletons, readable texture memory, and terminal detail compensation, while the optical branch remains responsible for color, semantics, and spectral appearance recovery. Experiments on the SMILE-CR and SEN12MS-CR datasets show that DST-SARNet effectively restores cloud-contaminated imagery with a compact model scale, demonstrating its potential for efficient SAR-assisted optical cloud removal.

AI.tldr: 本文提出DST-SARNet，一种双阶段SAR结构引导网络，通过早期结构骨架引导、后期高频调制和纹理感知非对称检索模块，实现光学遥感图像去云，在压缩模型规模的同时有效恢复云污染图像。
AI.motivation: 现有基于CNN的方法难以建模大面积云覆盖下的全局结构和色彩一致性，Transformer方法在高分辨率遥感图像上计算和内存成本过高，而直接注入SAR图像会传播散斑噪声、跨模态错位和成像差异。需要一种既能有效利用SAR结构信息又能避免其负面传播的去云方法。
AI.method: 提出DST-SARNet双阶段框架：(1) 早期结构骨架引导（输入侧），提供SAR结构先验；(2) 后期高频调制（输出侧附近），提供终端细节补偿。两阶段之间放置Texture-Aware Asymmetric Retrieval模块作为瓶颈记忆检索操作，避免密集SAR注入。光学分支独立负责颜色、语义和光谱恢复。
AI.result: 在SMILE-CR和SEN12MS-CR数据集上的实验表明，DST-SARNet能够有效恢复云污染图像，且模型规模紧凑。
AI.conclusion: 双阶段SAR引导策略能够平衡结构信息利用与噪声传播问题，实现高效、低成本的SAR辅助光学遥感图像去云。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：98%。本文本身就是遥感去云论文。改进方向：(1) 可引入多时相光学信息与SAR信息融合，增强时序一致性；(2) 纹理感知检索模块可扩展为多尺度特征交互，更好处理不同尺寸云块；(3) 可结合扩散模型或生成式方法进一步提升大区域云覆盖下的纹理真实性；(4) 考虑引入自适应云检测模块，实现端到端的云识别与修复联合优化。

title: Physics-Guided Physical-Coordinate Center Detection for Measured Radar Point Targets Under Ground Clutter
summary: Measured radar point-target detection under ground clutter is difficult because weak target echoes often compete with clutter peaks, and image-space detections do not directly represent physical range-Doppler coordinates. This paper proposes a waveform- and physics-guided center detector (WPG-Center) for measured radar maps. The method reformulates detection as continuous physical-coordinate center localization, constructs a four-channel clutter-aware range-Doppler (RD) representation, uses an anisotropic backbone with range-clutter response modulation, and supervises the center heatmap with waveform-resolution-aware Gaussian targets. Conditional physical-prior decoding is used as a targeted candidate reranking step for low-bandwidth, near-zero-Doppler cases. Experiments are conducted on the measured LSS-Ku-1.0 dataset using a strict blocked 5-fold linear frequency-modulated (LFM) protocol with physical localization tolerances and decoded-center detection metrics. WPG-Center achieves a probability of detection (Pd) of 0.850±0.101 and a range root-mean-square error (RMSE) of 18.16±12.19 m, giving the best average decoded-center detection probability and range accuracy among the compared learned and constant false-alarm rate (CFAR)-style baselines, including an independent radar feature pyramid network (Radar-FPN) heatmap detector. The fixed-sigma ablation is substantially weaker, supporting the need for resolution-aware supervision. Fold-wise, qualitative, and stepped-frequency waveform (SFW) analyses are reported as auxiliary evidence to define the scope of the measured LFM conclusion.

AI.tldr: 本文提出波形与物理引导的中心检测器（WPG-Center），用于实测雷达地图中点目标检测。该方法将检测重新定义为连续物理坐标中心定位，构建四通道杂波感知距离-多普勒表示，使用各向异性骨干网络和距离-杂波响应调制，并以波形分辨率感知的高斯目标监督中心热图。在实测LSS-Ku-1.0数据集上，WPG-Center的检测概率达到0.850±0.101，距离RMSE为18.16±12.19 m，优于对比的Radar-FPN热图检测器和CFAR类方法。
AI.motivation: 实测雷达点目标检测面临两大挑战：弱目标回波常与杂波峰值竞争；图像空间检测无法直接表示物理距离-多普勒坐标。现有方法难以在强杂波环境下实现精确的物理坐标定位。
AI.method: 1) 将检测重构为连续物理坐标中心定位问题；2) 构建四通道杂波感知距离-多普勒（RD）表示；3) 采用各向异性骨干网络结合距离-杂波响应调制；4) 使用波形分辨率感知的高斯目标监督中心热图；5) 条件物理先验解码作为低带宽、近零多普勒场景的候选重排序步骤。
AI.result: 在实测LSS-Ku-1.0数据集上，采用严格分块5折LFM协议评估，WPG-Center检测概率0.850±0.101，距离RMSE 18.16±12.19 m，在解码中心检测概率和距离精度上均优于Radar-FPN热图检测器和CFAR类基线。固定sigma消融实验性能显著下降，证实了分辨率感知监督的必要性。
AI.conclusion: 所提WPG-Center方法在实测雷达点目标检测任务中优于现有学习和CFAR类方法，波形分辨率感知的监督策略是关键组件。论文还通过逐折、定性分析和SFW波形分析限定了实测LFM结论的适用范围。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：95%。1) 遥感SAR图像目标检测可直接借鉴四通道杂波感知RD表示和多模态特征融合思路，提升复杂地物背景下弱小目标检测能力；2) 各向异性骨干网络与距离-杂波响应调制可迁移至高分辨率遥感影像中方向性特征提取（如道路、舰船检测）；3) 波形分辨率感知的高斯标签生成策略可用于遥感中不同分辨率传感器标注统一化；4) 条件物理先验解码可作为遥感多目标检测的后处理精调步骤，提升定位精度。

title: Replacing Yield Detrending with Direct Spatiotemporal Inputs Improves LSTM-Based Rice Yield Estimation
summary: Accurate rice yield estimation is essential for food security. Two key factors affecting estimation accuracy are the long-term upward trend in yield over time and regional heterogeneity across space. Current studies predominantly employ statistical detrending methods (e.g., moving averages, linear regression) to isolate temporal trends. However, such methods rely on prior assumptions about the time–yield relationship and may introduce systematic bias when these assumptions break down. Meanwhile, the individual contributions of temporal and spatial information, and their interactive effects, have not been systematically evaluated within a unified framework. We selected 112 rice-growing counties across six U.S. states (2000–2021), using vegetation index (Normalized Difference Vegetation Index), meteorological indicators (growing degree days, killing degree days, and cumulative precipitation), and spatiotemporal variables (year, longitude, and latitude). We designed six input configurations to compare conventional detrending against direct temporal variable inclusion, testing across four model architectures (Long Short-Term Memory, Random Forest, XGBoost, and Transformer). Results showed that: (1) directly inputting year significantly outperformed detrending across all models, with the combined spatiotemporal configuration achieving the best performance (LSTM R2 = 0.61 vs. 0.54 for detrending); (2) year was the most important predictor in SHAP analysis, with spatiotemporal variables ranking higher than most meteorological and remote sensing variables; (3) spatial information consistently improved accuracy and mitigated systematic bias for extreme yield regions; (4) the combined configuration performed best across different states, years (including extreme climate events), and yield levels, achieving near-end-of-season accuracy at the grain-filling stage (1.5–2 months before harvest). This study demonstrates that integrating raw spatiotemporal data directly into deep learning models is more effective than statistical detrending, offering a simpler and more robust approach for large-scale crop yield estimation.

AI.tldr: 本文研究美国六州112个水稻主产县（2000-2021年），发现将原始时空变量（年份、经纬度）直接输入深度学习模型（LSTM、随机森林、XGBoost、Transformer）进行产量估算，比传统统计去趋势方法更有效。直接输入年份的配置优于去趋势方法，时空联合配置性能最佳（LSTM R²=0.61 vs 0.54），年份是SHAP分析中最重要的预测因子，空间信息可提高精度并减轻极端产区的系统性偏差，且在灌浆期（收获前1.5-2个月）即可达到近季末精度。
AI.motivation: 现有作物产量估算方法多采用统计去趋势（如移动平均、线性回归）来分离时间趋势，但这类方法依赖对时间-产量关系的先验假设，假设不成立时会引入系统性偏差。同时，时间和空间信息的个体贡献及其交互效应尚未在统一框架下被系统评估。
AI.method: 选取美国六州112个水稻种植县2000-2021年数据，使用NDVI、气象指标（GDD、KDD、累积降水）及时空变量（年份、经度、纬度），设计六种输入配置比较传统去趋势与直接输入时空变量的效果，在四种模型架构（LSTM、随机森林、XGBoost、Transformer）上进行测试，并用SHAP进行特征重要性分析。
AI.result: (1)直接输入年份在所有模型中显著优于去趋势方法，时空联合配置最优（LSTM R²=0.61 vs 去趋势0.54）；(2)SHAP分析中年份是最重要预测因子，时空变量排名高于多数气象和遥感变量；(3)空间信息持续提高精度并减轻极端产区的系统性偏差；(4)联合配置在不同州、年份（含极端气候事件）和产量水平下均表现最佳，在灌浆期（收获前1.5-2个月）即可达到近季末精度。
AI.conclusion: 将原始时空数据直接集成到深度学习模型中比统计去趋势更有效，为大规模作物产量估算提供了一种更简单、更稳健的方法。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：95%。该研究的核心思想——用原始时空变量替代统计去趋势并直接输入深度学习模型——可直接应用于遥感作物估产领域。具体方案：(1)将年份作为显式输入特征纳入现有基于遥感植被指数的产量估算模型中，取代传统的时间序列去趋势预处理；(2)将经纬度作为空间编码输入，与遥感影像特征融合，代替传统的区域分层或空间滤波方法；(3)在UNet、ConvLSTM、3D-CNN等遥感时空模型中引入该策略，可提升跨区域、跨年份的作物产量估算泛化能力；(4)该思路可拓展至其他遥感时序分析任务（如森林物候监测、草地生物量估算），以简化预处理流程并减少模型偏差。

title: UAV-Based Soil Salinity Estimation Using Stagewise Feature Optimization and Dual-Backbone Deep Learning Fusion
summary: Accurate soil salinity estimation under small-sample agricultural conditions continues to pose a formidable challenge, attributed to the scarcity of labeled data, inherent representational limitations of single-backbone neural networks, and the heightened complexity of subsurface salinity inversion. To mitigate these intertwined challenges, this study developed a UAV-enabled soil salinity estimation framework that integrated lightweight convolutional neural networks and staged feature optimization, leveraging both RGB and multispectral imagery. A feature selection framework integrating random forest recursive feature elimination (RF-RFE), the one-standard-error (One-SE) criterion, and variance inflation factor (VIF) analysis was employed to reduce 129 candidate variables to a unified 16-channel feature set, which served as the common input for estimating both surface and subsurface soil salinity. Three lightweight single-backbone (VGGNet, ResNet, and DenseNet) and dual-backbone feature-level fusion networks (DenseResNet, DenseVGGNet, and ResVGGNet) were constructed and systematically evaluated for their performance in estimating both surface and subsurface soil salinity. Among the single-backbone networks, ResNet yielded the highest overall statistical accuracy, while DenseNet exhibited superior performance in preserving estimation trends. For surface soil salinity estimation, ResVGGNet achieved the best performance among all evaluated models, with an R2 of 0.820, RMSE of 0.626 g/kg, MAE of 0.409 g/kg, and RPD of 2.31 on the test dataset. SHAP analysis further highlighted the dominant role of vegetation and salinity-sensitive indices, together with selected spectral mean features, and revealed spatially complementary response patterns among major input channels. Collectively, the integration of lightweight multi-backbone feature-level fusion with streamlined feature optimization strategies effectively enhances the accuracy, robustness, and interpretability of UAV-enabled soil salinity estimation, particularly under the constraint of small agricultural sample sizes.

AI.tldr: 本文针对小样本农业条件下土壤盐分估算的难题，提出了一种结合轻量级卷积神经网络和分阶段特征优化的无人机土壤盐分估算框架。通过RF-RFE、One-SE准则和VIF分析将129个候选变量精简为统一的16通道特征集，构建了三种单骨干（VGGNet、ResNet、DenseNet）和三种双骨干特征级融合网络（DenseResNet、DenseVGGNet、ResVGGNet）。其中ResVGGNet在地表盐分估算中表现最优（R²=0.820，RMSE=0.626 g/kg），SHAP分析揭示了植被和盐分敏感指数的主导作用。该方法有效提升了小样本条件下无人机土壤盐分估算的准确性、鲁棒性和可解释性。
AI.motivation: 小样本农业条件下土壤盐分精确估算面临标记数据稀缺、单骨干神经网络表征能力有限以及地下盐分反演复杂度高等三重挑战，现有方法难以有效应对。
AI.method: 1) 采用无人机搭载RGB和多光谱传感器采集数据；2) 构建RF-RFE、One-SE准则和VIF分析相结合的特征选择框架，将129个候选变量降维至16通道特征集；3) 构建三种轻量级单骨干网络（VGGNet、ResNet、DenseNet）和三种双骨干特征级融合网络（DenseResNet、DenseVGGNet、ResVGGNet）；4) 利用SHAP分析进行模型可解释性评估。
AI.result: 单骨干网络中ResNet统计精度最高，DenseNet在趋势保持方面表现更优。双骨干网络ResVGGNet在地表盐分估算中表现最佳：R²=0.820，RMSE=0.626 g/kg，MAE=0.409 g/kg，RPD=2.31。SHAP分析表明植被指数和盐分敏感指数起主导作用，主要输入通道间存在空间互补响应模式。
AI.conclusion: 轻量级多骨干特征级融合与精简特征优化策略的结合，能够有效提升小样本条件下无人机土壤盐分估算的准确性、鲁棒性和可解释性。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：95%。改进方案：1) 可引入注意力机制（如CBAM、SE模块）增强双骨干网络的特征融合效果；2) 结合时序遥感数据（如Sentinel-2）扩展时间维度信息，提升盐分动态监测能力；3) 探索半监督或自监督学习范式进一步缓解小样本依赖；4) 将SHAP分析与物理模型（如HYDRUS）耦合，增强反演过程的物理一致性；5) 扩展至大区域尺度时，可融合星-地-无人机多源遥感数据，提升模型泛化能力。

title: Memory-Guided Adaptive Spectral–Spatial Perception Model for Hyperspectral Image Classification
summary: Accurate hyperspectral image classification is fundamental to geospatial applications but is often constrained by annotation scarcity. To achieve high classification performance under small-sample conditions, we propose the Memory-Guided Adaptive Spectral–Spatial Perception model, which incorporates a three-level globalization strategy. At the single-sample level, an adaptive perception Transformer combines deformable and dilated convolutions with a Transformer encoder to capture global context from individual samples. At the intra-batch level, we introduce a metric learning strategy that explicitly captures structural dependencies and feature relationships among samples within each mini-batch, enabling comprehensive feature aggregation in a localized context. At the cross-batch level, a memory-guided strategy constructs a dynamic memory bank to store and retrieve features from same-class samples across training iterations, bridging past and present distributions to enhance generalization. Using only 1% of the SaliLMSS, Pavia University and Kennedy Space Center datasets and 0.5% of the WHU-LongKou dataset as training samples, our method achieves outstanding overall accuracy of 96.15%, 97.81%, 89.22% and 99.32%, respectively, outperforming existing methods.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种记忆引导的自适应光谱-空间感知模型，通过三级全局化策略（单样本级、批内级、跨批级）实现小样本高光谱图像分类，在四个数据集上以极少量训练样本取得优异性能。
AI.motivation: 高光谱图像分类在标注稀缺的小样本条件下性能受限，现有方法难以有效捕获全局上下文和跨批次特征关联，需要一种能够在小样本条件下高效利用全局信息的分类模型。
AI.method: 提出三级全局化策略：1）单样本级：自适应感知Transformer，融合可变形/扩张卷积与Transformer编码器捕获个体样本全局上下文；2）批内级：度量学习策略捕获小批量样本间的结构依赖和特征关系；3）跨批级：记忆引导策略构建动态记忆库，跨训练迭代存储和检索同类别样本特征。
AI.result: 仅用1%训练样本在SaliLMSS、Pavia University、Kennedy Space Center上分别达96.15%、97.81%、89.22% OA，0.5%样本在WHU-LongKou上达99.32% OA，均优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的三级全局化策略通过多粒度全局信息融合，有效解决了小样本高光谱分类难题，记忆引导机制显著提升了模型泛化能力。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：95%。作为遥感高光谱分类论文，改进方向：1）可引入多源遥感数据融合机制，如将LiDAR或SAR数据特征纳入记忆库；2）动态记忆库可扩展为类别均衡采样策略，缓解长尾分布问题；3）自适应感知Transformer可结合光谱解混先验知识，提升复杂地物边界区域的分类精度；4）三级策略中可加入跨场景迁移学习模块，增强模型在不同遥感区域的泛化能力。

title: UAV Remote Sensing for Drought-Adaptive Sesame Breeding: Flight-Altitude Benchmarking, Predictive Modelling, and Composite Stress Tolerance Indexing
summary: Early-generation sesame (Sesamum indicum L.) breeding requires high-throughput phenotyping of large unreplicated populations across contrasting environments. A DJI Phantom 4 Multispectral UAV was flown at 40, 80, and 120 m above ground level (AGL) over 588 M2 genotypes under full irrigation (ENV1) and terminal drought (ENV2; irrigation withheld from reproductive onset) on four dates (July–September 2025). Structure-from-motion canopy height models were compared with ground measurements, and four spectral reflectance indices—Normalised Difference Vegetation Index (NDVI), Normalised Difference Red Edge (NDRE), Green Normalised Difference Vegetation Index (GNDVI), and Leaf Chlorophyll Index (LCI)—were derived from 40 m imagery. Ordinary least squares (OLS), Random Forest, and Gradient Boosting were evaluated under leave-one-genotype-out (LOGO), leave-one-environment-out (LOEO), and leave-one-date-out (LODO) cross-validation; genotypic repeatability was quantified by intraclass correlation (ICC), and drought performance was ranked by a composite Stress Tolerance Index (STI) validated against an independent breeder assessment. The 40 m altitude gave the highest height accuracy (R2 = 0.812 in ENV1; 0.663 in ENV2). LOGO accuracy (R2 ≈ 0.83) fell to R2 ≈ 0.55 under LODO—the operationally relevant figure for a new phenological stage—and the full structural–spectral OLS model collapsed (R2 = −0.203) where tree ensembles remained stable. Spectral-index repeatability was up to ~2-fold higher under stress (ICC(3,4) > 0.84). The composite STI flagged 38 elite genotypes (7.6% of 498); 10 of its top 30 were confirmed in the breeder’s 48-best selection from all 588 rows—a 4.1-fold enrichment over chance (hypergeometric p = 4.5 × 10−5).

AI.tldr: 本文研究了利用大疆Phantom 4多光谱无人机在三个高度（40、80、120米）对588个芝麻基因型进行高通量表型获取，评估了结构（冠层高度模型）和光谱（NDVI、NDRE、GNDVI、LCI）指标在不同交叉验证策略下的预测能力，并构建了复合胁迫耐受指数（STI）筛选耐旱基因型。结果表明40米高度精度最高，树集成模型在时间外推中更稳健，复合STI可显著富集优良基因型（富集倍数4.1倍）。
AI.motivation: 早期芝麻育种需要在对比环境下对大量未重复群体进行高通量表型分析，传统地面测量效率低下，急需一种高效、非破坏性的遥感表型获取方法以加速耐旱品种筛选。
AI.method: 在40、80、120米三个高度使用DJI Phantom 4多光谱无人机采集588个M2基因型数据（全灌溉ENV1和终端干旱ENV2），通过运动恢复结构生成冠层高度模型并与地面实测对比，从40米影像提取四种光谱指数；采用普通最小二乘法、随机森林和梯度提升三种模型，在留一基因型、留一环境和留一日期的交叉验证下评估；通过组内相关系数量化基因型重复性，构建复合胁迫耐受指数并用超几何检验验证。
AI.result: 40米高度冠层高度精度最高（ENV1: R²=0.812, ENV2: R²=0.663）；留一基因型交叉验证R²≈0.83，留一日期降至R²≈0.55；全结构-光谱OLS模型在时间外推中崩塌（R²=-0.203），树集成模型保持稳定；胁迫下光谱指数重复性提高约2倍（ICC(3,4)>0.84）；复合STI筛选出38个优良基因型，其前30名中有10个出现在育种者48个最佳选择中，富集倍数4.1倍（p=4.5×10⁻⁵）。
AI.conclusion: 无人机多光谱遥感在芝麻早期育种中具有高通量表型获取的潜力，40米飞行高度是最佳折中方案；树集成模型在应对新物候期（时间外推）时比线性模型更可靠；基于多指标融合的复合STI能有效筛选耐旱基因型，显著提升育种选择效率。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：95%。该文本身就是遥感育种应用研究，可从以下方面改进：（1）引入时间序列分析（如动态时间规整或LSTM）捕捉生育期动态变化，替代单点交叉验证；（2）融合更高光谱分辨率（高光谱传感器）或热红外数据以增强胁迫检测能力；（3）尝试深度学习方法（如3D-CNN或图神经网络）同时建模空间邻域结构和光谱-高度关系；（4）增加多传感器融合（如激光雷达与多光谱）提升冠层结构重建精度；（5）在交叉验证中引入空间自相关校正（如空间留出法）以避免空间伪重复造成的乐观估计。

title: Assessing Urban Ventilation Resistance and Surface Warming Using Multi-Source Data: A Case Study of Kaifeng City
summary: Changes in urban form strongly affect surface thermal conditions, yet long-term quantitative assessments of this relationship, particularly the role of ventilation resistance, remain limited. To address this gap, this study integrates XGBoost, SHapley Additive explanations (SHAP), and multi-scale geographically weighted regression (MGWR) to examine how six morphological, ecological, and human-activity factors influence land surface temperature (LST) in Kaifeng City. The results indicate three main findings. First, LST increased significantly from 1986 to 2024, while interannual variability declined, indicating a gradual reduction in regional thermal fluctuations. Second, NTL was consistently the dominant indicator across the five representative years, while BF and NTL together captured the effects of urban expansion and intensified human activity. Third, FAD coefficients were more spatially heterogeneous in urban fringe areas than in the urban core. In 2020, the dispersion of FAD coefficients in fringe areas was 2.74 times greater than that in the central area, indicating stronger spatial differentiation in ventilation-related morphological constraints during urban expansion. Although FAD made only a modest contribution to overall predictive accuracy, it provided supplementary diagnostic information not captured by conventional density indicators and showed nonlinear, directional, and spatially heterogeneous responses. Compared with previous studies that mainly examined short-term or single-dimensional relationships between urban morphology and LST, this study integrates building densification, ventilation-related morphological resistance, ecological conditions, and human activity intensity into a long-term LST-driver framework, providing evidence to support heat-risk management during urban regeneration and outward expansion.

AI.tldr: 本研究集成XGBoost、SHAP和MGWR方法，分析了1986-2024年开封市城市形态、生态条件、人类活动强度对地表温度（LST）的影响，发现NTL是主导因子，建筑形态因子（BF）和夜间灯光（NTL）共同反映了城市扩张与人类活动加剧的影响，迎风面积密度（FAD）在城郊结合部空间异质性显著高于城市核心区，为城市热风险管理提供了长期框架依据。
AI.motivation: 城市形态变化显著影响地表热环境，但长期定量评估城市形态与地表温度关系的研究仍有限，尤其是通风阻力因素（如迎风面积密度FAD）的作用尚不明确。本研究旨在填补这一空白，构建长期LST驱动因子框架。
AI.method: 集成XGBoost（梯度提升决策树）、SHAP（SHapley Additive explanations，可解释性分析）、多尺度地理加权回归（MGWR）三种方法，分析六种形态、生态和人类活动因子对开封市1986-2024年LST的影响。
AI.result: 1) 1986-2024年LST显著上升，年际变率下降，热波动减小；2) NTL在五个代表年份中均为主导因子，BF与NTL共同反映了城市扩张与人类活动增强；3) FAD系数在城郊结合部的空间异质性达到城市核心区的2.74倍（2020年），FAD虽对预测精度贡献有限，但提供了密度指标无法捕获的非线性、方向性和空间异质性信息。
AI.conclusion: 相比以往聚焦短期或单一维度城市形态与LST关系的研究，本研究将建筑密度化、通风阻力、生态条件和人类活动强度整合进长期LST驱动框架，为城市更新与向外扩张过程中的热风险管理提供了证据支持。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：95%。该研究已充分利用遥感地表温度反演（LST）和夜间灯光（NTL）数据，属于遥感与城市热环境交叉的典型范例。改进方向：1) 可将LST数据源拓展至更高空间分辨率的遥感数据（如Landsat 8/9 TIRS、ECOSTRESS），以捕捉更精细的热岛空间格局；2) 引入多源遥感数据（如Sentinel-1 SAR建筑高度、GF系列高光谱）改进FAD和BF的形态参数提取；3) 结合大气遥感数据（如MODIS气溶胶、风场产品）进一步解析通风阻力对LST的物理机制；4) 利用遥感时序分析（如Google Earth Engine）扩展研究范围至其他典型城市，增强模型泛化能力。

title: Lagged Response of Groundwater Storage to Extreme Precipitation Using Machine-Learning-Downscaled GRACE Data at the Watershed Scale
summary: Understanding how groundwater storage responds to extreme precipitation is essential for assessing aquifer resilience under climate variability. In this study, we developed a 1 km groundwater storage anomaly (GWSA) dataset for the Baiyangdian Watershed from 2002 to 2024 by downscaling GRACE observations with a Light Gradient Boosting Machine (LightGBM) model. The downscaled GWSA showed good consistency with independent hydrological datasets, including GLDAS and groundwater-level anomalies. Based on the downscaled product, we characterized long-term groundwater changes and quantified GWSA responses to extreme precipitation events (EPEs). Groundwater storage exhibited three distinct phases: rapid depletion before 2014 (−1.35 cm/yr), a slower decline during 2014–2019 (−1.04 cm/yr), and marked recovery after 2020 (+3.45 cm/yr). Spatially, GWSA generally increased from the southwest to the northeast of the watershed. Composite analysis of 11 EPEs revealed a delayed groundwater response, with the strongest signal occurring approximately two months after precipitation. Monthly effective precipitation was more closely associated with GWSA recovery than short-duration daily precipitation extremes, and the response was stronger in plains than in mountainous areas. These findings indicate that EPEs provide episodic recharge pulses, while sustained groundwater recovery depends on cumulative climatic inputs and human water-management influences.

AI.tldr: 本研究利用LightGBM降尺度GRACE数据，构建了2002-2024年白洋淀流域1km分辨率地下水储量异常数据集，揭示了地下水储量的三阶段演变（快速消耗—缓慢下降—显著恢复），并分析了极端降水事件对地下水的滞后响应（约2个月）及空间差异（平原强于山区）。
AI.motivation: 理解地下水储量对极端降水的响应机制，对于评估气候变化背景下含水层的恢复力至关重要。然而，高分辨率、长时序的地下水监测数据缺乏，限制了对此问题的深入分析。
AI.method: 采用Light Gradient Boosting Machine (LightGBM)模型对GRACE卫星观测数据进行降尺度处理，生成2002-2024年白洋淀流域1km空间分辨率的地下水储量异常数据集，并利用GLDAS和地下水位异常数据进行独立验证。
AI.result: （1）白洋淀流域地下水储量呈现三阶段特征：2014年前快速消耗(−1.35 cm/yr)、2014-2019年缓慢下降(−1.04 cm/yr)、2020年后显著恢复(+3.45 cm/yr)；（2）地下水储量异常从西南向东北递增；（3）极端降水事件对地下水响应的滞后时间约为2个月；（4）月尺度有效降水比短时强降水对地下水恢复更关键，平原区响应强于山区。
AI.conclusion: 极端降水事件仅提供间歇性补给脉冲，持续的地下水恢复依赖于累积气候输入和人为水资源管理措施的共同作用。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：95%。改进方向：（1）可将LightGBM降尺度框架迁移至其他数据稀缺流域，建立全球高分辨率地下水监测产品；（2）可融合Sentinel-1 InSAR形变数据与GRACE数据，提高地下水储量反演精度；（3）可引入多源遥感数据（如SMAP土壤水分、MODIS蒸散发）作为LightGBM特征，增强模型物理约束；（4）极端降水事件识别可采用 TRMM/GPM降水雷达数据，提高事件检测精度及时空连续性。

title: SAGE: Saliency and Geometry Enhanced Transferable Attacks for LiDAR Point Cloud Perception in Remote Sensing
summary: LiDAR point clouds are widely used in remote sensing perception scenarios, such as autonomous driving. However, LiDAR-based perception models remain vulnerable to adversarial perturbations, which may compromise the reliability of safety-critical 3D perception systems. Among different attack paradigms, transfer-based attacks are particularly practical because they generate adversarial examples on accessible surrogate models and apply the generated examples directly to unknown target models. Nevertheless, existing transferable attacks on point clouds often perturb regions that are discriminative for the surrogate model but insufficiently stable across different architectures, leading to limited transferability and noticeable geometric distortion. To address this problem, we propose SAGE, a Saliency And Geometry Enhanced transferable attack framework for LiDAR point cloud perception in remote sensing. Specifically, SAGE unifies point-coordinate priors with source-model gradient signals to generate a saliency map, which serves as a transferable indicator of vulnerable local structures. SAGE further leverages this map through saliency-guided perturbation allocation and explicit geometric constraints to enhance transferability while preserving point-cloud geometry. To demonstrate the effectiveness of SAGE, we evaluate SAGE on point-cloud classification benchmarks and further validate it on LiDAR-based 3D object detection using KITTI and nuScenes. Experimental results show that SAGE consistently outperforms existing transferable attack methods in attack success rate while preserving favorable geometric quality of adversarial point clouds. These findings demonstrate that SAGE offers an effective and practical framework for assessing the transfer robustness of LiDAR-based remote sensing perception systems.

AI.tldr: SAGE是一种针对LiDAR点云感知模型的迁移攻击框架，通过结合点坐标先验与源模型梯度生成显著性图，指导扰动分配并施加几何约束，从而在保持点云几何质量的同时提升攻击可迁移性。
AI.motivation: 现有基于点云的迁移攻击往往扰动对源模型有区分性但跨架构不稳定的区域，导致迁移性有限且产生明显的几何畸变。需要一种能兼顾攻击可迁移性与点云几何质量的方法。
AI.method: SAGE框架：1) 统一点坐标先验与源模型梯度信号生成显著性图，作为脆弱局部结构的可迁移指示器；2) 通过显著性引导的扰动分配机制，将扰动集中于迁移性更强的区域；3) 引入显式几何约束，在优化过程中保持点云几何结构。
AI.result: 在点云分类基准以及KITTI、nuScenes数据集上的3D目标检测任务中，SAGE在攻击成功率上持续优于现有迁移攻击方法，同时保持对抗点云的良好几何质量。
AI.conclusion: SAGE为评估基于LiDAR的遥感感知系统的迁移鲁棒性提供了一个有效且实用的框架，证明了结合显著性感知与几何约束可显著提升攻击的可迁移性与实用性。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：90%。本文本身就是面向遥感感知（自动驾驶中的LiDAR感知）的迁移攻击方法。改进方向：1) 可扩展至多模态遥感感知场景（LiDAR+相机），利用跨模态显著性图增强攻击稳定性；2) 结合点云补全或去噪方法进一步约束几何质量；3) 探索基于频域或拓扑结构的显著性替代方案以提升跨领域迁移性；4) 在真实遥感场景（如机载LiDAR地形分类、城市三维重建）中验证防御鲁棒性。

title: Finding the Features with LiDAR and SAR: Automated Detection of Archaeological Earthworks at Cahokia
summary: Archaeological feature detection at complex, mixed-environment sites requires accurate, efficient methods for identifying subtle morphological signatures. This study presents a semi-automated remote sensing pipeline for the detection and delineation of archaeological earthworks at Cahokia Mounds (Illinois, USA), a major Mississippian urban center and UNESCO World Heritage Site. Three LiDAR datasets, two collected via UAV-mounted sensors and one from a piloted aircraft survey, were processed into Digital Terrain Models and transformed into Local Relief Models (LRM). K-means clustering was applied to segment the LRMs into feature classes, followed by contour bounding using the OpenCV library to outline mounds and borrow pits. Additionally, SAR-derived Local Incidence Angle (LIA) rasters from PALSAR-3 and Sentinel-1 were processed through angular deviation mapping to identify slope anomalies associated with archaeological features. Results across all five datasets demonstrate the complementary strengths of LiDAR and SAR: LiDAR excels at resolving elevation-defined features such as mound footprints, while LIA captures directional slope behavior that highlights mound edges, borrow pit rims, and linear features such as causeways. Comparative analysis of LiDAR acquisition frequencies reveals minimal differences in archaeological feature recovery between pulse settings, suggesting that sensor platform choice matters more than power-density tradeoffs for this application. Despite the need for human review to filter modern disturbances and natural false positives, the integrated workflow meaningfully accelerates prospection and reduces interpretive subjectivity. The methods are scalable, site-invariant, and work with open-access data, making them applicable to archaeological landscapes worldwide.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种半自动化遥感管线，融合LiDAR（多源DTM转LRM+K-means聚类+OpenCV轮廓）和SAR（LIA角偏差映射），用于卡霍基亚土墩遗址的考古遗迹检测。结果表明LiDAR擅长高程特征，SAR擅长坡度异常，集成工作流可加速勘探并降低主观性，方法可扩展且适用于全球考古景观。
AI.motivation: 复杂混合环境下的考古遗迹检测需要精确高效的方法来识别微妙的地貌形态特征，传统方法在效率与客观性上存在不足。
AI.method: 1) 多源LiDAR数据（无人机+有人机）生成DTM并转换为局部起伏模型(LRM)；2) K-means聚类对LRM进行特征分割；3) OpenCV库进行轮廓边界提取；4) SAR数据（PALSAR-3、Sentinel-1）生成局部入射角(LIA)栅格，通过角偏差映射识别与遗迹相关的坡度异常。
AI.result: LiDAR在识别 mounds 足迹等高程特征上表现优异；SAR的LIA能捕捉方向性坡度行为，突出 mound 边缘、取土坑边缘及堤道等线性特征；不同LiDAR采集频率在遗迹恢复上差异微小，传感器平台选择比功率密度权衡更重要。
AI.conclusion: 集成工作流可加速考古勘探、减少主观性，虽仍需人工审核过滤现代干扰和假阳性，但方法具备可扩展性、与遗址无关性，且基于开源数据，适用于全球考古景观。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：95%。本文本身就是遥感考古论文，改进方案：1) 引入深度学习（如U-Net/Transformer）替代K-means聚类，提升复杂地貌下的分割精度；2) 将LiDAR的LRM与SAR的LIA特征进行多模态融合（如注意力机制），提升弱信号遗迹检测能力；3) 引入InSAR形变监测识别地下遗迹引起的微地表形变；4) 结合多时相SAR极化分解（如Paul分解）增强对人工地貌的辨识能力。

title: YOLO-DC: A Crop Detection and Counting Network for UAV-Based Agricultural Scenes
summary: Crop targets in UAV aerial images are typically characterized by small scale, dense distribution, severe mutual occlusion, and complex backgrounds, which often lead to low detection accuracy and large counting errors for existing deep learning models. To address these issues, this study proposes an improved YOLOv12-based crop detection and counting model, named YOLO-DC. By introducing an attention mechanism (LGCB-AM) and a multi-scale detection head (MS-DH), the proposed model effectively enhances local texture extraction, global modeling, foreground–background contrast, and boundary perception for dense small objects. Subsequently, a series of comparative experiments, ablation studies, and transfer experiments were conducted on the wheat and rice datasets. The results show that YOLO-DC achieves a favorable balance among detection accuracy, counting error, and model efficiency and overall outperforms the other comparison models. Ablation studies further verify the effectiveness of the proposed design, showing that LGCB-AM is the key contributor to the performance improvement, while the boundary branch and repulsion branch play critical roles in dense-target discrimination. In addition, an appropriate module insertion strategy can effectively balance high-level semantic enhancement and feature fusion stability. Transfer experiments demonstrate that pretraining on the wheat dataset and fine-tuning on the rice dataset significantly outperform training from scratch, indicating strong cross-crop transfer potential. Overall, the proposed YOLO-DC provides an effective solution for high-precision crop detection and counting in agricultural scenarios.

AI.tldr: 本文提出YOLO-DC模型，通过在YOLOv12基础上引入LGCB-AM注意力机制和多尺度检测头MS-DH，有效提升了无人机航拍图像中密集小尺度作物目标的检测精度与计数准确性，在小麦和水稻数据集上的实验验证了其优越性能与跨作物迁移潜力。
AI.motivation: 无人机航拍图像中的作物目标通常具有小尺度、密集分布、严重相互遮挡和复杂背景等特点，导致现有深度学习模型检测精度低、计数误差大。
AI.method: 基于YOLOv12改进，提出YOLO-DC模型，核心设计包括：(1) LGCB-AM注意力机制，增强局部纹理提取、全局建模和前景-背景对比度；(2) 多尺度检测头MS-DH，提升密集小目标的边界感知能力；(3) 引入边界分支和排斥分支，加强密集目标区分。
AI.result: 在小麦和水稻数据集上的对比实验、消融实验和迁移实验表明，YOLO-DC在检测精度、计数误差和模型效率之间取得了良好平衡，整体优于其他对比模型。消融实验验证了LGCB-AM是性能提升的关键贡献者，边界分支和排斥分支对密集目标判别至关重要。迁移实验表明，小麦数据集预训练后在水稻数据集上微调效果显著优于从头训练。
AI.conclusion: YOLO-DC为农业场景中的高精度作物检测与计数提供了有效解决方案，且具有良好的跨作物迁移能力。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：95%。本文本身就是基于无人机遥感影像的作物检测与计数研究，与遥感领域高度契合。改进方案：(1) 可将LGCB-AM注意力机制迁移至其他遥感目标检测任务（如车辆检测、建筑物提取），验证其通用性；(2) MS-DH多尺度检测头可进一步优化以适应遥感图像中极大多尺度变化场景（如从大型建筑物到微小地物）；(3) 边界分支和排斥分支可推广至遥感图像中的密集地物分割任务（如密集屋顶分割、树冠分割）；(4) 预训练-微调的迁移策略可拓展至不同传感器（如卫星与无人机）或不同作物类型间的跨域迁移学习。

title: Flood-Driven Landscape Dynamics in Southeastern Amazon Delta-Estuary Watersheds
summary: Extreme meteorological and climate events, such as floods and prolonged droughts, cause socio-environmental disasters in several regions of the world, including the Amazon. The Amazon Delta-Estuary, which is shaped by coastal and river environments, has constantly changing land use patterns, making it vulnerable to such events. This study aimed to evaluate rainfall regimes and flood scenarios in the tributaries of the Amazon Delta-Estuary, known as the Ottocoded River sub-basins, which are located in the municipalities of Abaetetuba and Barcarena in the Brazilian state of Pará. The Climate Hazards Group InfraRed Precipitation with Stations (CHIRPS) dataset was used to analyze rainfall dynamics. The Height Above the Nearest Drainage (HAND) model was employed for flood modeling. The geomorphological, altimetric, bathymetric, and hydrodynamic components of the water bodies were also analyzed. Flood susceptibility was zoned as follows: Very High, High, Medium, Low and Very Low. Of the surveyed buildings, 28.8% were classified as ‘Very High’, 29.1% as ‘High’, 20.2% as ‘Medium’, 13.4% as ‘Low’, and 8.5% as ‘Very Low’. Many of these buildings are located in flood-prone areas, posing a significant risk of socio-environmental disasters. This research could inform public policies aimed at managing the risks associated with environmental disasters and extreme events.

AI.tldr: 本研究利用CHIRPS降雨数据和HAND模型对亚马逊三角洲-河口的支流流域进行洪水易发性分区，发现57.9%的建筑物位于高至极高洪水风险区，面临严重的社会环境灾害风险。
AI.motivation: 亚马逊三角洲-河口地区受极端气候事件（洪水和干旱）影响严重，土地利用不断变化，急需评估该地区的降雨规律和洪水 scenarios，以支持灾害风险管理。
AI.method: 使用CHIRPS数据集分析降雨动态；采用HAND（Height Above the Nearest Drainage）模型进行洪水建模；结合水体的地貌、高程、测深和水动力组分进行分析；将洪水易感性分为五个等级（极低、低、中、高、极高）。
AI.result: 调查建筑中28.8%处于极高洪水风险，29.1%处于高风险，20.2%处于中风险，13.4%处于低风险，8.5%处于极低风险。大量建筑位于洪水易发区，面临显著的社会环境灾害风险。
AI.conclusion: 该研究可为制定环境灾害和极端事件风险管理相关的公共政策提供科学依据。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：85%。该研究已使用CHIRPS遥感降水数据和HAND模型，可在以下方面进一步提升：（1）引入多源遥感数据（如Sentinel-1 SAR影像）进行洪水实际淹没范围的验证与校准，提高HAND模型的精度；（2）结合Landsat/Sentinel-2时间序列分析土地利用/覆盖变化对洪水风险的影响；（3）引入高分辨率DEM（如ALOS PALSAR或TanDEM-X）替代现有DEM以提升HAND模型的局部精度；（4）集成微波遥感（如GPM IMERG）与红外降水产品，提高降雨估算的时空分辨率与可靠性；（5）利用InSAR技术监测地表形变，评估地面沉降对洪水风险的叠加效应。

title: A Hybrid VRT-S-BR Method for Composite Electromagnetic Scattering from Targets Above Vegetated Rough Surfaces
summary: This paper proposes a hybrid Vector Radiative Transfer Shooting (VRT-S)-Bouncing Ray (BR) method, referred to as the VRT-S-BR method, for predicting composite electromagnetic scattering from targets above vegetation-covered rough surfaces. In this proposed framework, the vegetation layer is modeled as a stratified random medium and incorporated into the BR solver through VRT-S-derived amplitude modulation and deterministic phase compensation. Specifically, an offline database of vegetation-induced complex reflection coefficients is first generated using the VRT-S model over a set of incidence angles. During the BR ray-tracing process, these coefficients are used to replace the conventional Fresnel reflection terms on a per-interaction basis, thereby accounting for vegetation-induced attenuation and coherent scattering effects. In addition, a facet-dependent phase compensation scheme is introduced to describe propagation-path variations of individual rays through the vegetation canopy, avoiding the empirical random phase perturbation used in previous hybrid models. The proposed method is validated against field-measured backscattering data over natural grassland, achieving root mean square height (RMSE) values of 1.82 dB and 3.10 dB for horizontal-horizontal (HH) and vertical-vertical (VV) polarizations, respectively. Numerical results further demonstrate the capability of the method to characterize target–vegetation coupled scattering under different percentages of vegetation cover, vegetation heights, terrain backgrounds, and bistatic observation geometries.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种混合VRT-S-BR方法，用于预测植被覆盖粗糙表面上目标的复合电磁散射。该方法通过VRT-S模型生成植被诱导复反射系数数据库，替代传统菲涅尔反射项，并引入面元依赖的相位补偿方案，实现对植被衰减和相干散射效应的精确建模。在天然草地实测数据验证中，HH和VV极化的RMSE分别为1.82 dB和3.10 dB。
AI.motivation: 现有混合模型在植被覆盖粗糙表面与目标复合电磁散射建模中，通常采用经验随机相位扰动来描述植被对传播路径的影响，缺乏物理一致性；同时传统BR方法无法有效刻画植被层的衰减和相干散射效应，导致预测精度受限。
AI.method: 将植被层建模为分层随机介质，通过VRT-S模型离线生成入射角依赖的植被诱导复反射系数数据库；在BR射线追踪过程中，用该系数逐次替代传统菲涅尔反射项；引入面元依赖的确定性相位补偿方案描述射线穿过植被冠层的传播路径变化，替代经验随机相位扰动。
AI.result: 在天然草地实测后向散射数据验证中，HH极化RMSE为1.82 dB，VV极化RMSE为3.10 dB。数值实验表明该方法能有效表征不同植被覆盖率、植被高度、地形背景及双站观测几何下的目标-植被耦合散射特性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的VRT-S-BR方法有效解决了植被覆盖场景下复合电磁散射的建模问题，相比传统经验方法具有更高的物理一致性和预测精度，为植被环境下目标电磁散射特性分析提供了新途径。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：95%。本文方法可直接应用于遥感领域的植被覆盖地表目标检测与识别：（1）可用于合成孔径雷达（SAR）图像中隐蔽目标（如车辆、军事设施）的散射特征建模与解译；（2）引入更精确的植被层参数（如叶面积指数、含水量）可增强对复杂植被环境的适应性；（3）可扩展至多频段（L、C、X波段）散射建模，服务于多极化SAR遥感数据分析；（4）结合深度学习可构建植被环境下目标散射特性的快速预测代理模型。

title: Locally Adaptive Mamba and Multi-Scale Feature Enhancement for Optical Remote Sensing Image Change Detection
summary: Within the domain of Earth observation, tracking terrestrial transitions via high-resolution optical data plays a fundamental role. Nevertheless, current methods face critical challenges, including the difficulty in collaborative modeling of local details and global features and the singularity of bi-temporal difference representation, along with insufficient cross-scale feature communication, thereby constraining both the precision and resilience of models when applied to complicated environments. To solve these problems, we propose LADENet (Locally Adaptive Mamba and Multi-scale Feature Enhancement Network), an innovative framework that synergizes CNN, Transformer, and Mamba paradigms. By leveraging customized local contextual refinement alongside sophisticated hierarchical fusion, this integration delivers highly precise and resilient detection performance. LADENet adopts a weight-sharing multi-level Transformer encoder combined with a sequence reduction mechanism to generate multi-scale global features, achieving precise alignment of bi-temporal features and global context modeling while reducing computational complexity. To realize accurate localization and local enhancement of changed regions, we design a dual spatiotemporal adaptive local feature marking module based on State-Space Scanning (SSS). This module screens high-saliency changed regions through an adaptive scanning strategy, realizes pixel-aligned spatiotemporal feature fusion via cross-temporal state-space scanning, and introduces a sliding window boundary calibration mechanism to alleviate boundary information loss caused by window segmentation. To strengthen the feature representation of changed regions, a dual-branch difference enhancement module is constructed, which collaboratively captures global change trends and fine-grained local features through an attention-enhanced difference branch and a multi-scale convolution concatenation branch, effectively suppressing background interference. To address the semantic gap between cross-scale features, a global cross-scale spatial feature fusion decoder is proposed, which balances local detail preservation and global context perception through the synergy of spatial attention and two-dimensional selective scanning, completing refined multi-scale feature fusion and spatial resolution recovery. To rigorously validate the proposed LADENet, comprehensive experiments were conducted across four widely adopted bi-temporal benchmarks: LEVIR-CD, WHU-CD, CLCD-CD, and GVLM-CD. The presented architecture establishes substantial superiority over existing cutting-edge methodologies across primary evaluation criteria. Specifically, it yields an F1-measure of 91.06% alongside an IoU of 85.28% in the LEVIR-CD tests, while registering 90.51% (F1) and 82.45% (IoU) for WHU-CD. Similarly, robust outcomes are delivered on CLCD-CD (82.15% F1, 72.83% IoU) as well as GVLM-CD (89.12% F1, 77.78% IoU). These results demonstrate that LADENet possesses excellent detection accuracy, boundary delineation capability and generalization performance in diverse and intricate bi-temporal observation environments.

AI.tldr: 提出LADENet网络，融合CNN、Transformer和Mamba三种范式，通过局部自适应标记、双分支差异增强和跨尺度特征融合等模块，在多组遥感变化检测基准上达到SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 现有遥感变化检测方法难以协同建模局部细节与全局特征，双时相差异表征单一，跨尺度特征通信不足，限制了复杂环境下的检测精度和鲁棒性。
AI.method: 1) 权重共享的多层Transformer编码器+序列缩减机制生成多尺度全局特征；2) 基于状态空间扫描的双时空自适应局部特征标记模块；3) 双分支差异增强模块（注意力增强差分分支+多尺度卷积串联分支）；4) 全局跨尺度空间特征融合解码器（空间注意力+二维选择性扫描）。
AI.conclusion: LADENet在多种复杂双时相观测环境中具备优异的检测精度、边界描绘能力和泛化性能。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：95%。本文本身就是遥感变化检测论文。改进方向：1) 可引入半监督或弱监督学习框架以降低对像素级标注的依赖；2) 可探索将Mamba的状态空间扫描与SAR/多光谱等多模态数据融合；3) 边界校准机制可进一步与主动轮廓模型或条件随机场结合以细化边界；4) 可引入时序多时相扩展，将双时相框架推广到连续时序变化检测。

title: Efficient Sea Clutter Suppression Algorithm Based on BCD-Accelerated Dictionary Learning and TQWT Denoising
summary: Detecting weak radar targets in complex sea conditions is inherently challenging due to non-stationary sea clutter and sea spikes. Furthermore, traditional dictionary learning algorithms for clutter suppression suffer from high computational complexity. To address these issues, this paper proposes an efficient sea clutter suppression method cascading Block Coordinate Descent (BCD)-accelerated dictionary learning with Tunable Q-factor Wavelet Transform (TQWT) denoising. During dictionary learning, a BCD strategy replaces global Singular Value Decomposition (SVD) with analytical optimization. Combined with an adaptive soft-thresholding operator, this enables low-complexity joint optimization of dictionary atoms and sparse coefficients, drastically reducing training time. Subsequently, a batch-adaptive Orthogonal Matching Pursuit (OMP) algorithm featuring Gram matrix precomputation and a dual-stop mechanism achieves efficient reconstruction and preliminary cancellation of clutter components. Finally, TQWT is applied to filter out residual non-stationary clutter and noise by leveraging its narrowband feature representation and shift invariance. Experiments on measured radar data from the IPIX database and datasets published by the Journal of Radars demonstrate that the proposed method significantly outperforms traditional K-SVD-based algorithms. Specifically, it improves the average signal-to-clutter-plus-noise ratio (SCNR) by 17.48 dB and requires a total execution time of only 7.99 s, achieving a highly favorable trade-off between suppression performance and computational efficiency.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合块坐标下降（BCD）加速字典学习与可调Q小波变换（TQWT）去噪的海杂波抑制方法，在IPIX实测雷达数据上相比传统K-SVD算法平均SCNR提升17.48 dB，执行时间仅7.99秒，实现了抑制性能与计算效率的良好平衡。
AI.motivation: 复杂海况下弱目标检测面临非平稳海杂波和海尖峰干扰，且传统字典学习算法计算复杂度高，难以满足实时处理需求。
AI.method: 1) 采用BCD策略替代全局SVD，结合自适应软阈值算子实现字典原子与稀疏系数的低复杂度联合优化；2) 提出批自适应OMP算法，引入Gram矩阵预计算和双停止机制实现高效重构与杂波初步消除；3) 利用TQWT的窄带特征表示和移位不变性滤除残余非平稳杂波和噪声。
AI.result: 在IPIX数据库和《雷达学报》数据集的实测雷达数据上，平均SCNR提升17.48 dB，总执行时间仅7.99秒。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在抑制性能和计算效率之间取得了非常有利的权衡，显著优于传统K-SVD算法。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：95%。该方法是面向雷达海杂波抑制的，本身属于遥感（雷达遥感）领域。改进方向：1) 可将BCD加速字典学习扩展至SAR图像去噪与目标检测任务中，替代传统K-SVD以降低训练时间；2) TQWT可结合极化SAR特征进行海面目标增强；3) 批自适应OMP的Gram预计算策略可推广至遥感高光谱图像稀疏解混；4) 可尝试将BCD策略与深度字典学习结合，进一步提升特征表达能力。

title: MCPF-Net: Multi-Stage LiDAR-Image Collaborative Perception Fusion Network for Point Cloud Semantic Segmentation of Urban Scenes
summary: Multimodal fusion unlocks the potential of point cloud semantic segmentation, thereby driving advancements in surface observation and visual perception tasks. Although light detection and ranging (LiDAR) systems capture precise 3D structural geometry and optical images provide rich semantic and textural information, existing fusion methods struggle with limited cross-modal perception and insufficient information complementarity. To address these limitations, we propose a multi-stage LiDAR-image collaborative perception fusion network (MCPFNet) for point cloud semantic segmentation of urban scenes. At the middle fusion stage, the network incorporates an elevation-guided geometric-aware fusion module and a semantic-aware cross-attention fusion module to enable bidirectional feature injection between LiDAR and image modalities. In the late fusion stage, a bidirectional adaptive fusion module further refines semantic representations through gated weighting and bidirectional cross-attention mechanisms. Extensive experiments on three multimodal datasets with different resolutions, i.e., ISPRS Vaihingen, N3C-California, and UAVScenes, demonstrate that MCPFNet outperforms existing fusion methods, achieving mIoUs of 74.51%, 95.15%, and 62.76%, respectively. Hence, our multi-stage fusion and bidirectional interaction strategy is more reliable and accurate than existing methods in performing segmentation across diverse and complex urban scenes.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种多阶段LiDAR-图像协同感知融合网络（MCPFNet），通过中间融合阶段的高程引导几何感知模块和语义感知交叉注意力模块，以及后期融合阶段的双向自适应融合模块，实现点云语义分割中的跨模态双向特征注入。在三个多模态数据集上（ISPRS Vaihingen、N3C-California、UAVScenes）分别达到74.51%、95.15%和62.76%的mIoU，优于现有融合方法。
AI.motivation: 现有LiDAR-图像融合方法在处理跨模态感知时存在局限性，表现为跨模态感知能力有限以及信息互补性不足，难以充分挖掘两种模态数据的优势。
AI.method: 提出MCPFNet多阶段融合网络，包含：1）中间融合阶段：高程引导几何感知融合模块（EG-GAFM）和语义感知交叉注意力融合模块（SACAFM）实现双向特征注入；2）后期融合阶段：双向自适应融合模块（BAFM）通过门控加权和双向交叉注意力机制进一步优化语义表征。
AI.result: 在ISPRS Vaihingen（mIoU 74.51%）、N3C-California（mIoU 95.15%）和UAVScenes（mIoU 62.76%）三个不同分辨率的多模态数据集上均优于现有融合方法。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的多阶段融合和双向交互策略在多样且复杂的城市场景分割中比现有方法更可靠、更准确。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：95%。该论文本身就是遥感领域的点云语义分割工作。改进方向：1）可引入多尺度特征融合策略，提升对不同尺度地物的适应性；2）可加入时序信息或视频帧序列，增强动态场景下的分割稳定性；3）可探索将高程引导模块与深度估计或数字表面模型（DSM）结合，进一步提升几何感知能力；4）可引入轻量化设计或知识蒸馏，降低计算开销以适应边缘部署场景。

title: Total Ozone Column Changes over Northeast China: Trends and Variability Analysis
summary: Based on the Multi-Sensor Reanalysis Version 2 (MSR-2) and ERA5 datasets, variations in monthly mean total ozone column (TOC) over Northeast China (40–53°N, 115–135°E) from 2015 to 2024 are analyzed. Local ground-based observations at the regional WMO/GAW Longfengshan Station are also used. The aim is to investigate regional seasonality in TOC pattern and the relationship between TOC and ozone concentration and air temperature in the stratosphere and at the surface. No statistically significant linear trend was found for TOC; however, the annual mean TOC in the study region exceeds the zonal mean TOC by 25 DU (7.4%), and the annual maximum in February and minimum in August are observed one and two months earlier, respectively, than in the Northern Hemisphere mid-latitudes. A climatological decrease in TOC from the northeastern (~415 DU) to southwestern (~330 DU) parts of Northeast China was found. We also found a strong correlation, approaching |r| = 0.8–0.9, between TOC and ozone concentration (positive) and temperature (negative) at the surface. The time series from Longfengshan Station for 2015–2022 closely match the MSR-2 data averaged over Northeast China: the monthly mean difference varies within ±15 DU (±4.2%), validating the reliability of the station data as a representative proxy for regional TOC variability. The role of the Brewer–Dobson circulation, quasi-stationary waves, and the Northeast China cold vortex in the detected patterns and quantitative associations of TOC is discussed. The findings of this work can be applied to analyze the ozone observations, TOC variability, and stratosphere–troposphere coupling in East Asia.

AI.tldr: 基于MSR-2和ERA5数据，分析了2015-2024年中国东北地区(40-53°N, 115-135°E)月平均总臭氧柱(TOC)的变化，结合龙凤山站地面观测验证了数据可靠性。研究揭示了该区域TOC的季节特征：年均TOC高于纬向均值25 DU(7.4%)，2月最大、8月最小，分别比北半球中纬度提前1和2个月；TOC从东北(~415 DU)向西南(~330 DU)递减；TOC与地表臭氧浓度正相关、与温度负相关(|r|=0.8-0.9)。讨论了Brewer-Dobson环流、准定常波和东北冷涡的影响。
AI.motivation: 中国东北地区是东亚重要区域，但该地区长时间序列的TOC变化特征及其与地表臭氧、温度等要素的关联尚缺乏系统分析。本研究旨在填补这一空白，揭示区域TOC的季节性特征，并验证地面观测站数据作为区域TOC变化代理指标的可靠性。
AI.method: 利用MSR-2再分析数据和ERA5数据集，统计分析了2015-2024年中国东北地区月平均TOC的时空变化特征；采用龙凤山WMO/GAW站地面观测数据进行交叉验证；通过相关性分析探究TOC与地表臭氧浓度、温度的定量关系；结合Brewer-Dobson环流、准定常波和东北冷涡等机制进行物理解释。
AI.result: (1) 未检测到统计显著的TOC线性趋势；(2) 区域年均TOC高于纬向均值25 DU(7.4%)；(3) 年最大值出现在2月（提前1个月），最小值在8月（提前2个月）；(4) TOC从东北(~415 DU)向西南(~330 DU)气候态递减；(5) TOC与地表臭氧正相关、与温度负相关，相关系数达0.8-0.9；(6) 龙凤山站数据与MSR-2吻合良好，月均差异在±15 DU(±4.2%)内。
AI.conclusion: 中国东北地区TOC具有独特的时空分布特征和季节相位偏移，与地表臭氧和温度存在强相关关系。地面观测站数据可作为区域TOC变化的可靠代理。相关发现可用于东亚地区臭氧观测分析、TOC变化研究及平流层-对流层耦合研究。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：85%。改进方案：(1) 可引入TROPOMI、OMI等卫星遥感传感器的高分辨率TOC产品，与MSR-2再分析数据融合，提高区域TOC空间分布细节（尤其是东北-西南梯度刻画）；(2) 结合CALIPSO或CloudSat云/气溶胶数据，评估云层对TOC反演的影响，提高不确定性估算精度；(3) 利用GOSAT或AIRS等热红外卫星数据补充平流层臭氧廓线信息，增强对Brewer-Dobson环流影响的诊断能力；(4) 可将地面观测站数据用于遥感产品的区域偏差校正，建立本地化校正模型。

title: Impervious Surface Area Changes and Urban Expansion in China’s Three Major Urban Agglomerations over the Past 40 Years
summary: Analyzing the impervious surface area (ISA) of China’s three major urban agglomerations and expansion pattern of representative cities is of great significance for formulating context-specific urban planning policies and enhancing the resilience of urban development. This research employs impervious surface expansion indicators to reveal the spatiotemporal dynamics of impervious surface area, and further applies the location centrality index (LCI) to investigate the expansion structures and patterns of five megacities. The results indicate that the ISA of China’s three major urban agglomerations expanded from 22,544.10 km2 to 69,348.59 km2 from 1985 to 2024; both the expansion rate and intensity have exhibited a distinct decelerating trend. However, significant regional variation exists in the peak expansion phases: the Guangdong–Hong Kong–Macao Greater Bay Area Urban Agglomeration (GBA) peaked during the Initial Exploratory Phase (1985–1995), whereas the Yangtze River Delta Urban Agglomeration (YRD) and Beijing–Tianjin–Hebei Urban Agglomeration (BTH) reached their peaks during the High-speed Development Phase (2005–2015). At the urban scale, LCI-based analysis of urban expansion across five megacities reveals that adjacency expansion type has become the predominant form of growth, exceeding 50% in most cities. These findings enhance our understanding of evolutionary trajectories of ISA within urban agglomerations and the expansion patterns of five megacities, providing a scientific basis for sustainable urban planning and urban resilience.

AI.tldr: 本文基于不透水面扩张指标和区位中心性指数（LCI），分析了1985-2024年中国三大城市群（大湾区、长三角、京津冀）的不透水面时空动态及五个超大城市的扩张模式。结果显示，三大城市群不透水面从22,544.10 km²扩张至69,348.59 km²，但扩张速率和强度呈明显减缓趋势；不同城市群的峰值扩张阶段存在显著差异；邻接扩张已成为五个超大城市的主要扩张形式。
AI.motivation: 分析中国三大城市群的不透水面面积及代表性城市的扩张模式，对于制定因地制宜的城市规划政策和增强城市发展韧性具有重要意义。
AI.method: 采用不透水面扩张指标揭示不透水面时空动态，并运用区位中心性指数（LCI）研究五个超大城市的扩张结构和模式。
AI.result: （1）1985-2024年三大城市群不透水面从22,544.10 km²增至69,348.59 km²；（2）扩张速率和强度均呈现明显减缓趋势；（3）不同城市群峰值扩张阶段存在显著区域差异（大湾区在1985-1995年早期探索阶段达峰，长三角和京津冀在2005-2015年高速发展阶段达峰）；（4）邻接扩张已成为五个超大城市的主导扩张形式，占比超过50%。
AI.conclusion: 研究增强了对城市群内不透水面演化轨迹和五个超大城市扩张模式的理解，为可持续城市规划和城市韧性提供了科学依据。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：95%。该论文的核心数据源为不透水面遥感产品，属于遥感与城市规划的交叉研究。改进方案：（1）可引入更高分辨率遥感数据（如Sentinel-2的10m或亚米级影像）以提升不透水面提取精度；（2）可结合夜间灯光遥感数据（如NPP-VIIRS）补充社会经济维度分析；（3）可引入时序InSAR技术监测地表形变，评估城市扩张引发的地面沉降风险；（4）可利用深度学习语义分割方法（如U-Net、DeepLabV3+）实现更高精度的不透水面自动提取与变化检测。

title: MSIA-YOLO: A Multi-Scale Semantic Interaction and Alignment Network for Small Object Detection in Low-Altitude UAV Remote Sensing Images
summary: Small object detection is fundamentally constrained by the lack of discriminative fine-grained features. Although introducing higher resolution detection scales can improve performance, it also amplifies background noise. In addition, the independently decoupled design of conventional detection heads is insufficient to address the persistent challenges of missed detections and false positives for small objects. To this end, we propose MSIA-YOLO, a YOLOv11-based detector with multi-scale semantic interaction and alignment, optimized from three complementary perspectives: feature modeling, high resolution semantic compensation, and task coordinated alignment. First, Receptive Field Attention Convolution (RFAConv) is integrated into the backbone to enhance critical local details, such as edge and texture cues, via receptive field aware attention. Second, to alleviate fine detail attenuation caused by repeated downsampling, we construct a CHSP-P2 small object detection framework with an additional P2 branch. A scale sequence fusion mechanism is further introduced to perform high resolution semantic compensation through cross scale hybrid inputs. Finally, we design a DTIA-Head (Dynamic Task Interaction and Alignment Head), which promotes joint optimization of classification and localization through dynamic task interaction and spatial alignment. Extensive experiments on the public datasets VisDrone, TinyPerson, and RSOD show that, compared with the YOLOv11n baseline, MSIA-YOLO improves mAP50 by 7.7%, 10.3%, and 1.0%, respectively, while also outperforming several advanced detectors. These results demonstrate the effectiveness and generalization capability of the proposed method in small object, dense object, and complex scene object detection scenarios.

AI.tldr: MSIA-YOLO是一种基于YOLOv11的小目标检测器，通过多尺度语义交互与对齐从三个互补角度优化：特征建模（集成RFAConv增强局部细节）、高分辨率语义补偿（构建CHSP-P2框架引入P2分支和尺度序列融合机制）、任务协同对齐（设计DTIA-Head实现分类与定位联合优化）。在VisDrone、TinyPerson、RSOD数据集上相比YOLOv11n基线，mAP50分别提升7.7%、10.3%和1.0%，超越多个先进检测器。
AI.motivation: 小目标检测面临两个核心瓶颈：一是缺乏判别性细粒度特征，引入高分辨率检测尺度虽能提升性能但会放大背景噪声；二是传统检测头独立解耦的设计无法解决小目标的漏检和误检问题。
AI.method: 1) 在骨干网络中集成RFAConv（感受野注意力卷积），通过感受野感知注意力增强边缘和纹理等关键局部细节；2) 构建CHSP-P2小目标检测框架，增加P2分支，引入尺度序列融合机制通过跨尺度混合输入实现高分辨率语义补偿，缓解重复下采样造成的细粒度特征衰减；3) 设计DTIA-Head（动态任务交互与对齐头），通过动态任务交互和空间对齐促进分类和定位的联合优化。
AI.result: 在VisDrone、TinyPerson、RSOD公开数据集上，相比YOLOv11n基线，mAP50分别提升7.7%、10.3%和1.0%，并超越多个先进检测器。
AI.conclusion: MSIA-YOLO在小目标、密集目标和复杂场景目标检测任务中表现出良好的有效性和泛化能力。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：95%。该文已在RSOD遥感数据集上验证，且方法本身适用于遥感场景。改进方案：1) RFAConv可针对遥感目标的多方向性扩展为旋转感知注意力机制；2) CHSP-P2框架可结合遥感图像的多分辨率特性，引入自适应尺度选择策略；3) DTIA-Head可进一步融合遥感目标的几何先验（如长宽比、方向角）以提升检测精度；4) 可将该方法推广至遥感旋转框检测任务。
